Title: 1-20 (Starting City Quests)
SubTitle: These quests are designed to help new players (from level 1-20) get acquainted with their starting cities and the surrounding areas.

Fayspire.Alchemist:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Silnea Aesiowe  
Speak to Silnea Aesiowe, the guildmaster. You are instructed to go buy a thick blue uniform. Go to Initiate Firebringer and buy the thick blue uniform (for free of course). Return to Silnea Aesiowe and you will receive **430 XP**.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Silnea Aesiowe  
When you are ready, speak to Silnea Aesiowe. She will tell you to go to Elinos, the spiritmaster. After you have bound yourself, Elinos will tell you to seek out Coachman Thirtreel. Once you have done so, return to Silnea. **2,200 XP**.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Silnea Aesiowe  
Speak to Silnea Aesiowe. You are instructed to talk to Venathorn, whom you will find in his residence in the center courtyard that binds the guildhalls. Venathorn sends you out to collect a damaged firefly wing and tarantula leg tips from slaying sparkflies and spiderlings in the area just south of the courtyard. Return with the items to Venathorn to receive your reward — **6,900 XP** and a **scroll: Hardening Agent**.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Venathorn  
Venathorn will need a few components. He sends you to collect a drained poison sac from the green snakes that dwell in the nearby forest and to purchase a set of burlap bracers from Tailor Sinthios. Once you have these items, return to Venathorn to receive **17,000 XP** and **Venomguard Bracers**.

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Venathorn  
Venathorn wants to test your battle skills. A shipment of important components for potion experiments was stolen. Find the hatebone orc thief **Grethmyrk the Shade** — he is the culprit.

**Note:** Grethmyrk is at one of the hatebone orc camps near the road not too far from town. Follow the road out of town heading southeast until the road curves left, continue heading southeast between two hills until you see one of the hatebone orc camps. The mob is wandering around the area. Kill Grethmyrk and return the stolen goods to Venathorn for your reward — **36,500 XP** and a **Crude Refinement Scroll**.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Venathorn  
Venathorn needs a **Shalebone Wolf Pelt** to continue his experiments. The Shalebone Wolf wanders the shores to the north. At level 7, the mob cons yellow to you. Watch out for aggressive high-level mobs while hunting the Shalebone Wolf. Kill it and return the pelt to Venathorn to collect **157,474 XP**, a **Crude Sublimation Scroll**, and **Frostguard Boots**.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Amelie  
You will be asked to find two items and bring them to her.  
**Radiant Sunfly Wings** are found on Sunflies in Thedruk — near the tunnel, on a hilltop west of the river south of the bridge between Tethelin and Fayspires, and in a meadow east of the river near the tunnel.  
**Pixie Nettle Wings** are found on Pixie Nettles in Shon-To (SE). To get there, you must go through the Thedruk tunnel. Some mobs in the tunnel see through invisibility, so bring a group. From the tunnel exit, go west; the pixies are in a meadow in Shon-To (SE) at the base of the mountains. They are level 12.  
It’s a good idea to get the **Moradhim Coach**, so you won’t have to fight through the tunnel later. From the tunnel exit, head west through the valley to Moradhim (C). The coach is outside.  
Bring these items to Amelie and she will send you to Venathorn in Fayspires for your reward — **528,916 XP** and an **Alchemist Apprentice Staff**.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Venathorn  
He asks for a **Green Lightning Wing** from a Green Lightning Bug near the **Mindwhipper Hive**, east of Fayspires. They glow green and roam near a mountain by the crossroads.  
The hive is near Kara Village. From the Fayspires coach, go ENE to the guard tower, then east to the village. The hive is on the right side of the road past the village. The bugs are on the left side near the gray hill. They con yellow to level 13. Grab the **Klik’Anon Coach** while nearby.  
Bring the wing to Venathorn; he then asks for **Red Burn Berries** from **Nindle Longsho** in the **Shon-To Monastery**, who sells them for 225 tunar.  
If you have the Moradhim coach, go there, then follow the mountain northeast past the cave and lake to the monastery tunnel. Otherwise, fight through the Thedruk tunnel and head northwest.  
Your reward: **523,785 XP** and the **Crude Quickening** ability (lets you brew potions for Liquid Alacrity – increases movement speed).

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Venathorn  
He asks for a **Forger Wolf Fang** from a Forger Wolf in the Misty Thicket area to the southwest, in the narrow passage leading to the center of the forest.  
Travel south to Thedruk (but not through the tunnel). Follow the mountains SE → Castle Feldstar SW → North Kithikor NW → N → NE until you can go due south, then west to Rivervale. Get the coach there, then head west to enter Misty Thicket. The Forger Wolf is near goblins along the path; it cons yellow to level 15.  
Venathorn then asks you to go to Rivervale to speak with **Anduon Twotoe** (in the inn near the coachman). He gives you **Yellowjack Water**. Bring it to Venathorn.  
Your reward: **830,764 XP**, a **Faulty Refinement Spell**, and a **Robe of Wonders**.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Venathorn  
Venathorn says a **Book of Solutions** has fallen into the wrong hands. **Mathew** has it. Go to **Kara Village** and speak to **Drindan Lightfoot** (in the inn, second floor).  
Drindan says Mathew is in **Collonridge Cemetery**, sitting by a mushroom patch inside the gates. You must retrieve the book and return it to Drindan.  
To get there: from Kara, run southeast one zone, or from Klik’Anon exit south, go southwest along the right side of a tall hill toward a river. Follow it to the castle in the (C) part of the zone. Entrance is on the right side, full of undead — bring a healer. Mathew is inside, level 21, but easy to solo at level 22.  
Return the book to Drindan, then to Venathorn. He asks you to fetch a **Locking Book Safe** from **Trulen** next door (costs 550 tunar). Bring it back for your final reward — **2,814,929 XP** and your class choice:  
- **Path 1:** Mace and **Student’s Knack** (increases power pool and regen)  
- **Path 2:** Book and **Klick’Anon Cocktail** (AoE damage)  
Most alchemists choose Student’s Knack for power regen.
Fayspire.Cleric:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Tesserina Starshimmer  
Tesserina asks you to purchase a Nature's Mantle from Priestess Misona for free.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Priest Elgares  
Elgares sends you to Spiritmaster Muselender, who binds you and sends you to Coachman Thirtreel.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Priest Lighthand  
Lighthand wants you to bring him two sparkfly wings. Kill sparkflies and return with the wings.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Bellia Silkspinner  
Bellia will make you a new weapon if you bring her the following items:
- Strip of Leather - Purchase from Merchant Grener
- Iron Ore - Purchase from Merchant Grener
- Two cracked rat claws

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Tessarina Starshimmer  
Talk to Tessarina, she sends you to kill Hatebone Theives, who spawn in the hills south of town. Kill, loot Tome, return.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Tessarina  
Tessarina sends you to kill an orc Lockpicker for a bank key. He is by the bridge on the south road. Return her the key.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Tessarina  
1. Talk to Tessarina, who sends you to Dolby, who is across the bridge to the south.
2. Dolby sends you to kill an Orc Arsonist and loot his Mallet.
3. Dolby sends you to kill an Orc Chemist and loot his metal flakes.
4. Return to Dolby these items.
5. Dolby sends you to get some powder (Free) from Grocer Peltham, in Teth, up the ramp next to the Coach. Return to Dolby.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Dolby  
1. Talk to Dolby, who is just north of the river on the path between Tethelin and Fayspire. He can be found wandering around the underpass on the path. Dolby sends you to kill a Blue-Ribboned Snake (CONs Yel), and loot a Blue-Ribboned Venom Sack. To find the snake; Start at Tethelin and follow the coast north until you pass out of the snowy area, and come across a spire under construction next to a barge. The snake is directly north of the spire, on a hill side. Kill, loot, return to Dolby.
2. Dolby sends you to kill a Zapper Bug (CONs Yel) for its Zapper Stinger. Cross the bridge to the west and follow the river south. Zapper Bugs are found alongside the shore a short run from the bridge. Kill, loot, return to Dolby.
3. Dolby sends you to Grocer Peltham, in Teth, by the coach, to buy a Clay Mixing Vial (it's free). Return to Dolby.
4. Dolby sends you to kill a Brown Recluse (CONs Yel), just west of the Blue-Ribboned Snake, by the snowy area, and loot its Recluse Spider Silk. Return to Dolby.
5. Dolby sends you to kill Razor Fang Piranha (CONs Yel), and loot itz Fish Stomach. The fish you need is in the river just to the southwest. From the bridge, swim in a south a small way. kill, loot, return to Dobly.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Dolby  
1. Talk to Dolby, he sends you to kill Orc Brutes and loot two (2) Orcish War Medallions. These orcs can be found northeast of the Orc's Lair across the river.
2. Dolby sends you to Tethelin to buy a Silver Glowing Bar for 260 Tunaria from the grocer, you can find him up the first ramp by the coachman.
3. Dolby will give you a Sealed burlap bag, and sends you to Arion, who is located beside the Fayspire Coach.
4. Arion sends you to kill an Orc Raider and bring back Orcish Medal of Bravery. Raiders are found in the same place as the Brutes. Kill, loot, return to Arion.
5. Arion sends you back to Dolby.
6. Dolby rewards you.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Tessarina Starshimmer  
1. Talk to Tessarina, she sends you to Ullie Darktoe in Moradim. Ullie is in the Inn that is located just North of Coachman Doba. The Inn is on the West side of the road.
2. Ullie sends you to Goldfeather Erie to kill an Aviak Basher (CONs Wht) and loot two (2) Tillian bracelets. From the coach area head northwest along the mountains until you enter Aviak country. You will be able to tell by the snow on the ground. Look for a guard tower. To the East of the guard tower, on the hill, find two aviak bashers. Kill, loot two Tillion Bracelets, return to Ullie.
   **Note:** While you're there kill a thrasher and loot a necklace that you'll need for step 4.
3. Ullie Darktoe sends you to to Trinter Yon, across the road, to buy a metal testing kit. Return to Darktoe.
4. Ullie Darktoe sends you to to kill one of the Aviak Thrashers. Return to the same place as the you found the Aviak Bashers. Kill, loot necklace, return to Darktoe.
5. Ullie Darktoe sends you back to Tessarina.
6. Tessarina rewards you.

# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Felilnthar Silspin
Felilnthar Silspin wants you to buy a Red Student's Robe. Get one from Initiate Firebringer for free and return to Silspin.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Professor Skysign
Skysign sends you to Spiritmaster Elino, who binds you and then sends you to Coachman Thritreel.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Professor Skysign
Skysign wants you to collect two tarantula leg tips for him. Go out of town and kill spiders and return with the leg tips.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Ghelwin Lightweaver
Ghelwin will make you a new staff. To do so, he needs you to fetch the following ingredients:

- **Strip of Leather** — Purchase from Merchant Grener
- **Bough of Wood** — Purchase from Lylora the Bowyer
- **Two Firefly Thoraxes**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Fethinar Silspin
Hatebone Thieves have stolen the Elddar Tome. Your job is to kill them and get the seeds. They spawn in the hills south of town.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Fethinar
Talk to Fethinar. He asks you to get the bank keys from the Orc Lock Picker. The orc is located west of the bridge on either side of the path leading to Tethelin.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Fethinar Silspin
1. Talk to Fethinar, who sends you to Dolby, who is across the bridge to the south.
2. Dolby sends you to kill an **Orc Arsonist** and loot his **Mallet**.
3. Dolby sends you to kill an **Orc Chemist** and loot his **Metal Flakes**.
4. Return these items to Dolby.
5. Dolby sends you to get some **powder (free)** from **Grocer Peltham** in Teth, up the ramp next to the coach. Return to Dolby.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Dolby
1. Talk to Dolby, who is just north of the river on the path between Tethelin and Fayspire. He can be found wandering around the underpass on the path.
   
   Dolby sends you to kill a **Blue-Ribboned Snake** (CONs Yel) and loot a **Blue-Ribboned Venom Sack**.
   
   To find the snake: Start at Tethelin and follow the coast north until you pass out of the snowy area and come across a spire under construction next to a barge. The snake is directly north of the spire on a hillside. Kill, loot, return to Dolby.

2. Dolby sends you to kill a **Zapper Bug** (CONs Yel) for its **Zapper Stinger**. Cross the bridge to the west and follow the river south. Zapper Bugs are found alongside the shore a short run from the bridge. Kill, loot, return to Dolby.

3. Dolby sends you to **Grocer Peltham** in Teth, by the coach, to buy a **Clay Mixing Vial** (it's free). Return to Dolby.

4. Dolby sends you to kill a **Brown Recluse** (CONs Yel), just west of the Blue-Ribboned Snake near the snowy area, and loot its **Recluse Spider Silk**. Return to Dolby.

5. Dolby sends you to kill a **Razor Fang Piranha** (CONs Yel) and loot its **Fish Stomach**. The fish is in the river just to the southwest. From the bridge, swim south a small distance. Kill, loot, return to Dolby.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Dolby
1. Talk to Dolby. He sends you to kill **Orc Brutes** and loot **two (2) Orcish War Medallions**. These orcs can be found northeast of the Orc's Lair across the river.

2. Dolby sends you to Tethelin to buy a **Silver Glowing Bar** for **260 Tunaria** from the grocer, located up the first ramp by the coachman.

3. Dolby gives you a **Sealed Burlap Bag** and sends you to **Arion**, located beside the Fayspire coach.

4. Arion sends you to kill an **Orc Raider** and bring back an **Orcish Medal of Bravery**. Raiders are found in the same place as the Brutes. Kill, loot, return to Arion.

5. Arion sends you back to Dolby.

6. Dolby rewards you.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Felilnthar Silspin
1. Talk to Felilnthar Silspin. She sends you to **Ullie Darktoe** in **Moradim**. Ullie is in the inn just north of Coachman Doba, on the west side of the road.

2. Ullie sends you to **Goldfeather Erie** to kill an **Aviak Basher** (CONs Wht) and loot **two (2) Tillian Bracelets**.

   From the coach area, head northwest along the mountains until you enter Aviak country (snow on the ground). Look for a guard tower. To the east of the tower on a hill are two Aviak Bashers. Kill, loot two Tillian Bracelets, return to Ullie.

   **Note:** While you're there, kill a **Thrasher** and loot a **Necklace** that you'll need for step 4.

3. Ullie Darktoe sends you to **Trinter Yon**, across the road, to buy a **Metal Testing Kit**. Return to Darktoe.

4. Ullie Darktoe sends you to kill one of the **Aviak Thrashers**. Return to the same place where you found the Aviak Bashers. Kill, loot necklace, return to Darktoe.

5. Ullie Darktoe sends you back to Felilnthar Silspin.

6. Felilnthar Silspin rewards you.

**Quest NPC:** Lyriam Kaelean  
Lyriam wants you to obtain a **Robe of the Initiate**. You can get one from **Initiate Firebringer**.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Professor Blacklake  
Talk to **Spiritmaster Elinos**, who sends you to **Coachman Thirtreel**.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Professor Blacklake  
Blacklake wants you to get him **two rat furs**. Head out of town, kill rats, and return.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Ghelwin Lightweaver  
Ghelwin will make you a staff. He needs you to bring him the following ingredients:

- **Strip of Leather** — Purchase from *Merchant Grener*
- **Bough of Wood** — Purchase from *Lylora the Bowyer*
- **Two Cracked Snake Fangs*

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Lyriam Kaelean  
Talk to Lyriam. She sends you to kill **Hatebone Thieves**, who spawn in the hills south of town. Kill them, loot **Elddar Seeds**, and return.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Lyriam Kaelean

1. Talk to Lyriam. She sends you to **Werlib Quackook**, who is straight back from the entrance.
2. Werlib sends you to talk to **Zidgar** (spelling uncertain) in **Kara Village**. He has an air elemental next to him.
3. Zidgar sends you to kill a wasp directly north of him. Kill it, loot the **eye**, return to Zidgar, then return to Lyriam.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Lyriam Kaelean

1. Talk to Lyriam. She sends you to **Fibble Gearcharmen**, located in Kara Village on the right side of the town.
2. Fibble sends you to kill **three orc thieves** south of Kara Village. Kill them, loot the **device**, and return to Fibble.
3. Fibble sends you to **Gligbin Gearcharmer** in Klik'Anon, located after the bridge and guard tower on the right on a wall. He needs **197 tunar**.
4. Gligbin sends you to kill a **Hatebone Witchdoctor** in a cave near Fayspire. Kill it, loot **resin**, return to Gligbin, then return to Fibble.
5. Fibble sends you back to Lyriam.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Lyriam Kaelean

1. Talk to Lyriam, who sends you to **Siltha** in the small elf town north of Tethelin.
2. Siltha sends you to kill **Royal Guard Wasps** for **four wings**. The wasp nest is near Tethelin.
3. Siltha sends you to kill an **Orc Gatewatcher**, found in Thedruk Cave just inside and to the right. Kill it, loot the **spyglass**, return to Siltha.
4. Siltha sends you to kill **Vitsh Sah**, whose tomb is north of Thedruk Cave. Kill him, loot the **skull**, return to Siltha.  *Vitsh Sah has two skeletal guards and may require multiple kills for the drop.*

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Lyriam Kaelean

1. Talk to Lyriam. She sends you to **Overseer Evief**, who is on a barge northeast of Fayspire.
2. Overseer Evief sends you to **Diren Village** to talk with **Dorrun Hammerfist**. Diren Village is west of Moradhim.
3. Dorrun sends you to kill a bear called **Trapmaw** (cons DB), located south of Diren Village along the small river behind the village. Kill it, loot, return to Dorrun, then return to Overseer Evief.
4. Overseer Evief sends you to **Freeport** to talk with **Hardlin**.  Travel east from Fayspire past Kara Village → Klick’Anon → Rouge Clockworks → shoreline → then south past Neriak, Nektulos, Bobble-by-Water, Hodstock, and Temby to Freeport.
5. Hardlin sends you to kill a **Nasahir Sandcaster**, located south in Northern Ro. Follow the road to the bandit camp on the east side behind hills. Kill it, loot, return.
6. Overseer Evief sends you to kill **Pirate Mason**, located east of Fayspire in Rouge Clockworks on the shore.  Circle around the back of the camp (go west around it). Mason is standing alone by a large rock. Kill him, loot, return to Evief.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Lyriam Kaelean

1. Talk to Lyriam, who sends you to **Yiprew Yuprew** in Kara Village. (You may want to bind in Kara.) Yiprew is next to a well.
2. Yiprew sends you to kill **Thailav'yal** (cons yellow), a dark elf necromancer north of Fayspires. He hides in a tomb under old spires. He has the **Necromancer's Handbook**.  Go to Fayspire and head north across the lake. As you see the spires being erected, look for the two tall mountain peaks. Head to the left peak and follow it into a valley of undead. The crypt is at the end.  Thailav'yal has **4 undead guards** (2 dark blue, 2 light blue, 1 green Decaying Guardian). Kill him, loot, return to Yiprew.
3. Yiprew sends you to **Snafitzer**, in Snafitzer's House (SW).
4. Snafitzer sends you to **Pete** in the village of **Chiasta**. Chiasta is east of Moradhim in the Shon-To Monastery region through a mountain passage. Pete is under the pavilion. You need **525 tunar**. Return to Snafitzer, then to Yiprew.
5. Yiprew sends you to kill **Crumbling Bones** (corpse) (cons yellow) in **Collonridge Cemetery**. Inside the fortress in West Collonridge Cemetery you'll find them. Kill, loot what your log requires, return to Yiprew.
6. Yiprew sends you to kill a **Maundering Soul** (cons 20) in **Crest of the Duelists**, east of Collonridge Cemetery. On the plateau, near a tree at the edge, the soul spawns. Kill several if needed, loot, return to Yiprew.
7. Return to **Lyriam Kaelean** for your final reward.

Lyriam gives you a choice:

- **Option 1:** Spell **Burning Clash** (high direct damage, low aggro) and the **Deep Flame Staff**
- **Option 2:** Spell **Mental Focus** (greatly increases max power) and the **Deep Flame Wand**

Freeport.Alchemist:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Dilina McNerian  
Speak to Dilina McNerian, the Guildmaster. Go downstairs to Merchant Yulia and pick up the Burnt Uniform. Report back to Dilina.  
**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Dilina McNerian  
Speak to Dilina. Go to Spiritmaster Alshan, who is just outside the building at the bottom of the ramp. She will bind you and send you to Coachman Ronks, who will sign you into his ledger. Return to Dilina.  
**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Dilina McNerian  
Dilina sends you to Gilderman Vanks. He sends you off to collect a spider leg tip and beetle carapace fragment. Head out the north gate (blacksmith) to find beetles and spiders. Farm until you have what you need and return the supplies to Gilderman Vanks.  
**6,900 XP** & a **Hardening Agent** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Gilderman Vanks  
These items are required to make your new rapier:

- Purchase **tailored gloves** from Merchant Yulia, who is at the merchant's tent near the bottom of the ramp.  
- **Ant Leg Segment** — head north outside of FP and farm ants until you have what you need.

Return to Gilderman Vanks.  
**17,000 XP** & the **Burnt Gloves**

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Gilderman Vanks  
Gilderman sends you back to see Dilina McNerian; Highwaymen have hijacked caravans into Freeport. Dilina wants you to hunt down and kill the Highwaymen and return the stolen goods to her.

Go out the exit by the Blacksmith (north), follow the road for a few minutes, then head off to the right and look for a grassy hill with a druid stone on top. You will find the Highwaymen here — kill them, loot their goods, and return to Vanks.  
**36,500 XP** & the **Crude Refinement** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Dilinia McNerian  
Talk to Dilinia, and she will explain that the guild is running low on a needed component. Collect a **firespew gland** from the firespew ant.

**Note:** Follow the coast north to Temby. Travel to Temby and from Squire Janxt, go up the hill to get to the ant (**cons yellow @ 7**). Kill the ant, loot the firespew gland, and return to Dilinia.  
**157,474 XP**, **Crude Sublimation** spell, & the **Burnt Alchemist's Boots**

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Dilina McNerian  
Dilina needs another component for her potion. She sends you to slay water rats along the river north of Freeport until one drops a **poison gland**.

Return it to Dilina, who then sends you to buy a **bottle of blessed water** from Alana in the **Temple of Marr**, just north of Freeport at the mouth of the river. (The Church of the Marr Twins is along the coastline northeast from the north gate.) Return to Dilina.  
**556,753 XP** & receive the **Small Dirk**

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Dilina McNerian  
**Zone:** Freeport

Dilina needs your help to obtain a rare feather. A small flock of **blue ravens** has been spotted south of Freeport on the western side of the road. Dilina needs a feather from the blue raven to further her experiments.

**Note:** From the south gate head southwest following the path across the desert. Stay just west of the path to spot the blue ravens between the hillsides. At level 13, they con light blue to white.

Retrieve the feather and bring it back to Dilina. She now sends you to **Hodstock** to speak with **Johnny Jorn** about the olive oil needed for her experiment.

**Note:** Follow the river's edge north and take the path heading north when it appears. The path leads straight into Hodstock. Johnny Jorn is standing outside the building in the centre of town.

Johnny tells you that **yerg olive oil** must be purchased from **Merchant Lorili** in **Marr's Fist**.

From Freeport, exit out the north gate and travel along the mountainside to reach Marr's Fist. Purchase the seeds from Merchant Lorili Ashgo and return to Dilina.  
**550,698 XP** & **Crude Quickening** spell

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Dilina McNerian  
**Zone:** Freeport

Speak with Dilina; she has run out of **fish liver oil**, and the closest shop that sells it is **Charlie's in Highpass**.

**Note:** Follow the Eastern Highpass Trade Road out of Freeport to reach Highpass, east of Bastable. Travel west following the road.

Once you reach Highpass, sign the coachman's ledger if needed, then speak to Charlie (just inside the gate). Return to Dilina with the liver oil.

Dilina needs one more ingredient: an **albino rat tail**.

Albino rats (**cons white @ 15**) are found mostly by **Bobble-by-Water** (north of Freeport, follow the river). Farm until you get a tail, then return.

Dilina next sends you to Hodstock to help Johnny Jorn. He was supposed to bring snake venom to Dilina but could not kill the snake. Johnny instructs you to hunt a **green mamba snake** (**cons white @ 15**) that lurks in the woods east of Hodstock. From Johnny's house, travel northeast to the river.

Return the venom to Johnny Jorn to finish his potion. Then return to Dilina.  
**883,791 XP**, **Faulty Refinement** scroll, & the **Robe of Waterfalls**

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Dilina McNerian  
**Zone:** Freeport

Talk to Dilina McNerian, who needs several things to finalize her experiment. She sends you to Highpass to speak with **Elice Lowsong** about **blackened wolf fangs**.

Elice normally buys her fangs from **Windy Sandstorm** in **Kithicor**, just east of Rivervale. Follow the path east through the forest to reach Kith Village.

Windy doesn't have any fangs, but she tells you where to find them — and she also needs **spider silk**.

Kill **blacktoed wolves** (outside the village and along the hillside) and **wolf spiders** (further out, near the end of the mountain) for the fangs and a **shimmering silk strand**. Return to Windy, then return to Dilina.

Dilina now needs a **recipe** from Windy. Windy lost hers, but you can get it from **Shanti Candlewick**, in the **Hidden Valley** near **Shon-To Monastery** by Moradhim.

**Note:** The entrance to Hidden Valley is in the side of the mountain east of Moradhim, across the lake.

The last item Dilina needs is **pixie tears**, which you can get from **Archer Straightshot** in **Tethelin**.

**Note:** To find Archer Straightshot: from the coachman in Teth, travel south over the hills. He stands on the south side of the hill.

Return to Dilina and you're done!  
**2,814,929 XP**

Choose between:
- A **club** and **Student's Knack** (Increase Max HP by 200, Increase Power per tic by 20)  
- A **book** and the **Klick A'non Cocktail** spell (AoE potion)
Freeport.Bard:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** William Corufost  
Speak to William Corufost. Purchase a beginner's drum from Merchant Dolson. Return to William Corufost.  
**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** William Corufost  
Corufost sends you to speak with Spiritmaster Imaryn. To find her, go downstairs and exit the building to the west. The archway to the north leads to the Midroad. Follow the Midroad south to the end. Enter an archway to the west, and continue west to the west gate. Spiritmaster Imaryn is north of the west gate. You'll be bound and sent to Coachman Ronks (on the coast). Return to Corufost.  
**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
**Quest Area:** Freeport  
To prove your worth, Solenia wants you to kill dragonflies around the city. Exit the city through the west gate and kill damselflies/drakeflies until you get two damaged dragonfly wings. Return to Solenia Freyar.  
**6,900 XP** & **Chant of Battle** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Solenia will make you a better weapon if you bring her the following ingredients:

- **Iron ore + leather strip** — Merchant Shohan (in the Bazaar near the blacksmith)  
- **Beetle leg segment** — slay beetles in the field until you get it

Return to Solenia with the items.  
**17,000 XP** & **Traveler's Rapier**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Talk to Freyar, who tells you that bandits have been raiding caravans into the city. Their thefts of imported goods include food and supplies for the poor. Stop the Highwaymen and recover the stolen goods.

Go out the exit by the Blacksmith (north), follow the road for a few minutes, then head off to the right and look for a grassy hill with a druid stone on top. You will find the Highwaymen here — kill them, loot their goods, and return to Freyar.  
**36,500 XP** & **Funeral March** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Talk to Freyar. Someone has placed a **Chichan Eel** in the waters that flow to Freeport. Find and kill the eel (**cons yellow @ 7**) and loot its venom sac.

**Note:** Go out the north exit, run north until you reach the river, and follow the river. You’ll see a small house where the Orc Ransacker is. The eel spawns in the river nearby. Kill, loot the venom sac, and return to Freyar.  
**157,474 XP**, **Artful Strike** scroll, & **Silken Leggings**

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Talk to Freyar. She sends you to **Guard Sareken**, located at the North Gate by the bank.

Guard Sareken needs **147 tunar** and **3 tough pike scales**. Pike can be found in the river north of Freeport. Go out the north exit, follow the river north to the dam, and farm large pike (**CON DB @ 10**) until you have the 3 scales.

Return to Sareken. He now wants the boots of an **Orc Ransacker** wandering in the old house north of Freeport. Go out the north exit and head north along the river until you see the small old shack. Kill the Orc Ransacker (**cons white @ 10**), loot his boots, and return to Guard Sareken.  
**556,753 XP** & **Sturdy Short Sword**

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
Speak with Freyar. The **Shining Shield** has brought in an outsider named **Ilenar Crelwin**. Solenia arranges to hire you as an assistant to Ilenar while he's in town. Do whatever Ilenar asks and learn what you can about him.

Ilenar's robe was damaged in his journey to Freeport. Take his robe to **Delvin Stitchfinger** in **Bobble-by-Water** to fix it. Travel north along the river from Freeport to reach Bobble-by-Water. Delvin is in a building north from the coachman.

Delvin won’t complete the work until you help him. He sends you to buy **fine chocolates** from **Grocer Fritz Belgor**, who is in the same building. You need 120–250 tunar. Buy them and return to Delvin.

Delvin gives you back a **chocolate-stained robe**. Return to Ilenar, who is displeased. He gives you a **poisoned chocolate** to give to Delvin. Inform Solenia of Ilenar's plan. Solenia determines the chocolates are poisoned. After she fixes them, deliver them to Delvin. Delvin falls unconscious and appears dead. Return to Ilenar.  
**550,698 XP** & **Anthem of Light** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Ilenar Crelwin  
Talk to Ilenar Crelwin, who needs several items to complete his research.

- **Nightworm roots** — banned for poisonous properties. Contact **Dagget Klem** in Temby (bring 260 tunar).  
- **Blood of a Madman** — travel south from Freeport to kill a Madman (**cons yellow @ 15**) near a spire surrounded by undead. Loot his blood.

Return the items to Ilenar, then back to Solenia.  
**883,791 XP**, **Crashing Verses** scroll, & **Thespian Leggings**

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Solenia Freyar  
**The Grimoire** — Report to Ilenar as an undercover agent. Retrieve **Geldwin's Grimoire** from the library in the **Temple of Light**, west of Ilenar's location.

**Crim Arikson** — Ilenar knows a forger who will create a letter for you. Crim is at an inn in **Bastable Village**. He requires 525 tunar and a document with Sir Hanst's seal.

**Page Joseph Robert** — find the page traveling through Bastable, kill him away from guards, loot the Qeynos missive, and return to Crim. Trade 525 tunar for the forged letter.

**Amulet of Deception** — collect from the remains of **Swiftwind Galeehart** on Hangman's Hill (east of Bobble-by-Water). Kill the skeleton and loot the amulet. Return to Ilenar with the amulet and forged letter.

**The Library** — Travel to the **Temple of Light**, locate **Leandro Novan**, present the forged letter, follow him to the forbidden texts, and speak with **Praetor Gunner** to obtain **Geldwin's Grimoire**.

**Conclusion** — Return the book to Solenia Freyar. She gives you a fake copy to deliver to Ilenar.  
**2,814,929 XP**

Choose between:
- **Power Dance** — a group spell that transfers some of your power to your group, increases Power per tic by 51, comes with a magic foil.  
- **Sweeping Combat** — a group spell that increases everyone’s combat effectiveness in battle, increases STR, STA, DEX, AGI by 45, comes with a magic sabre.
Freeport.Cleric:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Denouncer Alshea  
Speak to Denouncer Alshea, the Guildmaster. Go outside of the building, to the northeast, to Merchant Olkan to pick up a **Petitioner's Cap**. Report back to Denouncer Alshea.  
**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Denouncer Alshea  
Speak to Denouncer Alshea. Go to **Spiritmaster Keika**, near the docks to the south. Speak to **Coachman Ronks**, who is west of the Spiritmaster. Return to Denouncer Alshea.  
**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Sister Falhelm  
Report to Sister Falhelm, upstairs. To prove your worth, kill spiderlings in the desert outside the city. Return with **two tarantula legs** to Sister Falhelm.  
**6,900 XP** & **Minor Blessing** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Sister Falhelm  
Sister Falhelm needs 3 items to make your new mace:

- Purchase **iron ore** and a **leather strip** from Merchant Shohan (in the Bazaar near the blacksmith)  
- Slay **ants** in the field until you get one **ant leg segment**

Return with the supplies to Sister Falhelm.  
**17,000 XP** & **Acolyte's Mace**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Sister Falhelm  
Talk to Falhelm. The roads are plagued by **Highwaymen**, and they have stolen goods from your group. Stop them and recover the stolen items.

Go out the exit by the Blacksmith (north), follow the road for a few minutes, then head right to a grassy hill with a druid stone on top. Kill the Highwaymen, loot their goods, and return to Falhelm.  
**36,500 XP** & **Holy Shock** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Sister Falhelm  
Talk to Falhelm. Someone has placed a **Chichan Eel** in the waters that flow to Freeport. Find and kill the eel (**CONs yellow @ 7**) and loot its venom sac.

Go out the north exit, run north until you reach the river, and follow it. You’ll see a small house where the Orc Ransacker is. The eel spawns in the river nearby. Kill, loot the **Venom Sac**, and return to Falhelm.  
**157,474 XP** & **Endure Ailment** scroll, **Trubar's Leggings**

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Sister Falhelm  
Talk to Falhelm. She sends you to **Guard Sareken** at the North Gate by the bank.

Guard Sareken needs **147 tunar** and **3 tough pike scales**. Pike can be found in the river north of Freeport. Go out the north exit, follow the river to the dam, and farm **large pike (CON DB @ 10)** until you have 3 scales.

Return to Sareken with the scales and tunar. He now wants the **pouch of an Orc Ransacker** wandering in the old house north of Freeport. Kill the Orc Ransacker (**cons white @ 10**), loot his pouch, and return to Sareken.  
**556,753 XP** & **Sturdy Mace**

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Sister Falhelm  
Speak with Falhelm. An important wizard, **Ilenar Crelwin**, is in town. Do whatever he asks.

Ilenar's robe was damaged. Take it to **Delvin Stitchfinger** in **Bobble-by-Water**. Travel north along the river from Freeport. Delvin is in a building north from the coachman.

Delvin won’t complete the work until you help him. Buy **fine chocolates** from **Grocer Fritz Belgor** (120–250 tunar). Return to Delvin.

Delvin gives you a **chocolate-stained robe**. Return to Ilenar. He gives a **poisoned chocolate** to give to Delvin. After Delvin dies, return to Ilenar.  
**550,698 XP** & **Ward Death** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Ilenar Crelwin  
Talk to Ilenar, who needs several items for his research:

- **Nightworm roots** — contact **Dagget Klem** in Temby (bring 260 tunar)  
- **Blood of a Madman** — travel south from Freeport, kill a **Madman (CONs yellow @ 15)**, and loot his blood

Return the items to Ilenar, then to Sister Falhelm.  
**883,791 XP** & **Endure Affliction** scroll, **Reverent Bracers**

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Sister Falhelm  
**The Grimoire** — Report to Ilenar Crelwin to retrieve **Geldwin's Grimoire** from the **Temple of Light**.

**Crim Arikson** — He will forge a letter for the paladins. Crim is in **Bastable Village**. He requires **525 tunar** and a document with Sir Hanst's seal.

**Page Joseph Robert** — find the page traveling through Bastable, kill him away from guards, loot the **Qeynos missive**, and return to Crim. Trade tunar for the forged letter.

**Amulet of Deception** — collect from **Swiftwind Galeehart** on Hangman's Hill (east of Bobble-by-Water). Kill the skeleton, loot the amulet, and return to Ilenar with the forged letter.

**The Library** — Travel to the temple, find **Leandro Novan**, present the forged letter, follow him to the forbidden texts, and speak to **Praetor Gunner** to obtain **Geldwin's Grimoire**.

**Conclusion** — Return the book to Ilenar Crelwin. He provides enchanted weapons to Sister Falhelm.

Return to Sister Falhelm for your reward: **2,814,929 XP**

Choose between:
- **Disease Ward** — Increase Resist Disease by 100, comes with a magic staff  
- **Field Dress** — instant healing spell, increases Hitpoints by 125, +25% based on CHA, comes with an enchanted mace
Freeport.Enchanter:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Azlynn  
Speak to Azlynn, the Guildmaster. You are sent to pick up a **Bronze Ring**. Go find **Merchant Yulia**, who is outside the building to the northeast. Return to Azlynn.  
**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Azlynn  
Azlynn sends you to **Spiritmaster Alshan**, who binds you and sends you to **Coachman Ronks**. You are signed into the ledger, return to Azlynn.  
**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Opanheim  
Report to Opanheim, who is on the other side of the ramp from Azlynn. To prove your worth, bring him **two beetle carapace fragments**. Go outside the city (south of the coach along the coast) and farm beetles until you have what you need. Return to Opanheim.  
**6,900 XP** & **Crawling Skin** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Opanheim  
Opanheim will make you a new yellow robe if you bring him the following items:

- **A Plain Robe** — Purchase from Merchant Yulia (her shop is outside the Academy)  
- **A Silk Cord** — Purchase from Merchant Yesam (she is in the first room off the coach in a building of merchants)  
- **Ruined Spider Fur** — farm spiders outside of Freeport

Return the supplies to Opanheim.  
**17,000 XP** & **Yellow Enchanter's Robe**

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Opanheim  
Talk to Opanheim. The roads are plagued by highwaymen and they have stolen goods being sent to the Academy. You must stop them and recover the stolen goods.

Go out the exit by the Blacksmith (north), follow the road for a few minutes, then head right to a grassy hill with a druid stone on top. Kill the Highwaymen, loot their goods, and return to Opanheim.  
**36,500 XP** & **Heavy Arms** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Azlynn  
Talk to Azlynn. Thieves broke into the library and stole an ancient **rune stone**. Go north to **Temby**, find the smuggler named **Bandelan (CONs yellow)**, and secure the stone.

**Note:** Exit Freeport via the north gate and travel north along the coastline to reach Temby. Bandelan can be found by the well in a merchant booth in the centre of town. Return to Azlynn with the **Rune Stone of Ghizsa**.  
**157,474 XP** & **Endure Arcane** scroll, **Papyrus Wrist Wraps**

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Azlynn  
Report to Azlynn. A sparkling green gem was stolen from his courier. The gem was taken by bandits south of Hodstock. Travel north of Freeport and locate the bandits.

**Note:** Follow the riverbank north of Freeport until you reach a broken bridge. Wait until nightfall for **Novandear** to appear. The weak bandits around the ramps con light blue and blue@lvl 10; Novandear family members con yellow. Kill the bandits until **Glarik Novandear** appears.

Slay **Glarik Novandear** and retrieve the **sparkling green gem**. Return it to Azlynn. Then purchase **Lantern Oil** from **Merchant Landi** (NE of the bank) for **296 tunar**, and return it to Azlynn.  
**556,753 XP** & **Rod of Eyes**

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Azlynn  
Deliver a **bag of coins** to **Agent Wilkenson** at the docks. Take a **note** from him and deliver it to **Duminven in Saerk's Tower**.

**Note:** Exit the north gate, follow the road west to reach **Kithicor Forest**, then climb the hill east of the second guardtower to reach Saerk's Tower.

Give the note to Duminven. He instructs you to head southeast into **Bastable**, locate the thief **Eliene**, and follow her. Kill Eliene and her contact, then return to Duminven.  
**550,698 XP** & **Lumbering Arms** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Azlynn  
Azlynn wants to make you new armour and sends you to **Tailor Weynia** on an island near the lighthouse south of Freeport. Collect **Poacher's Leggings**.

**Instructions:**

- Slay a **Sidewinder Snake** in the hills west of Weynia and collect the **pristine snake skin**  
- Collect a **pristine sand skipper carapace** along the southern beach  
- Collect a **bundle of pristine silk** from **Gargantula** in the western ruins (CONs yellow, other mobs con red)  
- Purchase **vulture feathers** from **Dteven Savis** for 273 tunar

Return all components to **Tailor Weynia**, then deliver the **Poacher's Leggings** to Azlynn.  
**883,791 XP** & **Leggings of Insight** and **Alarming Visage** scroll

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Azlynn  
Azlynn has discovered the mark you found is a fake. Retrieve the real mark and deliver it to **William Nothard**. Speak to **Wilkenson** at the docks for guidance.

**The Troll:** Speak to **Madame Telina** east of Wilkenson's location. She says the mark is in the hands of a Troll named **Roj Eir Sew' Eil** (nasehir cutthroat, db@20). Find, kill, loot the **Mark of Lougmanta**, and return it to Telina.

**The Pirates:** Telina sends you south along the coast to **Muniel's Tea Garden (MTG)**. Use the coach if possible. Locate an island NE of the coach with skeleton pirates (LB to yellow@20). Open sand-covered chests until you retrieve the **Chiseled Great Axe of Doom**. Return it to Telina.

**The Waterlogged Chest:** Travel to a deep valley south of FP via the gypsy village. Climb the Razor Back Fang mountains, fall into the pool near a small obelisk, and retrieve the **Etched Helmet of Greatness**. Take it to Telina. She gives you a note to pass to Azlynn.

**Reward:** **2,814,929 XP**

Choose between:
- **Spacious Mind** — Increase Maximum Power by 160, Increase Power by 110, comes with a scepter  
- **Power Boon** — Boosts target's Power by 100 for a short time, comes with a book
Freeport.Magician:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Malsis  
Speak to Malsis, the Guildmaster. Go outside the building; to the northeast is **Merchant Yulia**. Pick up an **Iron Ring** from her and report back to Malsis.  
**430 XP**

---

- *A silk cord* from **Merchant Yesam** (she is in the first room off the coach in a building of merchants)

Return the supplies to Kellina.

**Quest NPC:** Kellina  
Talk to Kellina. Highwaymen have hijacked caravans into Freeport. Hunt down and kill the highwaymen and return the stolen goods to her. Go out the exit by the Blacksmith (north), follow the road, then head right to a grassy hill with a druid stone on top. Kill the highwaymen, loot their goods, and return to Kellina.  
**36,500 XP** & **Motivate** scroll

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Kellina  
Talk to Kellina. A **Chichan Eel** has been placed in the waters that flow to Freeport. Find and kill the eel (**CONs Yellow @7**) and loot its **Venom Sac**. Exit the north gate, run north to the river, follow it, and locate the small house near the Orc Ransacker (the eel spawns nearby). Kill and loot, then return to **Athera**.

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Kellina

Guard Sareken needs **147 tunar** and **3 Tough Pike Scales**. Farm large pike in the river north of Freeport (**CON DB @10**) until you have the scales. Return to Sareken with the scales and money. He then requests the **club of an Orc Ransacker** wandering in the old house north of Freeport. Kill the Orc Ransacker (**CONs White @10**), loot his club, and return it to Sareken.  
**556,753 XP** & **Sturdy Staff**

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Kellina  
Speak with Kellina. **Ilenar Crelwin** has arrived in Freeport to conduct business. Deliver his damaged robe to **Delvin Stitchfinger** in Bobble-by-Water to fix it. Travel north along the river from Freeport to reach Delvin.

Delvin requires you to buy **fine chocolates** from **Grocer Fritz Belgor** (120-250 tunar). Return the chocolates to Delvin, who gives back a chocolate-stained robe. Deliver it to Ilenar. He gives you a poisoned chocolate to return to Delvin. After he dies, return to Ilenar.  
**550,698 XP** & **Lava Wind** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Ilenar Crelwin  
Talk to Ilenar Crelwin. He needs a few items to complete his research.

1. **Nightworm Roots** — Obtain from **Dagget Klem** in Temby (take 250 tunar). Kill the **Bloodfin Brood Shark Mother** (**CONs Yellow @15**), loot the tooth, and return to Dagget. Pay him 250 tunar to receive the roots.
2. **Madman’s Blood** — Travel south from Freeport, kill a Madman (**CONs Yellow @15**) near the spire, loot the blood, and return to Ilenar.

**883,791 XP** & **Endure Fire** scroll, **Summoner's Garb**

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Kellina  
**The Grimoire:** Report to Ilenar Crelwin to retrieve **Geldwin's Grimoire** from the **Temple of Light** west of Freeport.

**Crim Arikson:** Travel to **Bastable Village** to meet Crim, who will forge a letter to access the Grimoire. Provide **525 tunar** and a document bearing **Sir Hanst's seal**. Kill Page Joseph Robert to obtain the missive safely, and trade the tunar for the forged letter with Crim.

**Amulet of Deception:** Collect the amulet from **Swiftwind Galeehart**’s remains on **Hangman’s Hill** (east of Bobble-by-Water). Return it and the forged letter to Ilenar.

**The Library:** Travel to the **Temple of Light**, present the forged letter to **Leandro Novan**, follow him to the forbidden texts, speak to **Praetor Gunner**, and obtain Geldwin's Grimoire.

**Conclusion:** Return the Grimoire to Ilenar, then report to Kellina.

**Reward:** **2,814,929 XP**  
Choose between:
- **Frozen Mark** — Increase INT by 25, adds offensive and defensive procs to your pet, comes with a magical staff  
- **Lava Stone** — Summons a charged item with a potent FR damage spell, comes with a mystical tome

**The Troll:** Speak to **Madame Telina** NE of Wilkenson. The mark is held by a Troll named **Roj Eir Sew' Eil** (**CON DB @20**). Travel southwest to locate and kill him. Loot the **Mark of Louoth** and return to Telina.
