# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Sivrendesh  
Deliver a **bag of coins** to **Agent Wilkenson** on the docks. Take the note from Wilkenson and deliver it to **Duminven** in **Saerk's Tower**.  

Follow the **Highpass Trade Route** to reach Kithicor Forest and Saerk's Tower. Duminven will instruct you to find the thief **Eliene** in Bastable. Follow her and her contact, kill them both, and return to Duminven. Return to Freeport and give Sivrendesh the **Mark of Lougmanta**.  
**550,698 XP** & **Elemental Guard** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Sivrendesh  
Sivrendesh sends you to **Tailor Weynia**, south of Freeport on a small island near the lighthouse, to craft new armor. Collect:

1. **Pristine Sidewinder Snake Skin** — Kill sidewinders west of Weynia’s dock, return skin.  
2. **Pristine Sand Skipper Carapace** — Farm sand skippers along the southern shore, return carapace.  
3. **Bundle of Pristine Silk** — Kill **Gargantula** (**CON Yellow @15**) in western ruins, return silk.  
4. **Vulture Feathers** — Purchase from **Dteven Savis** for 273 tunar, return to Weynia.  

Receive **Poachers Leggings**, then return to Sivrendesh.  
**883,791 XP** & **Leggings of Wrath**, **Shocking Gaze** scroll

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Sivrendesh  
Sivrendesh discovered the mark you found is fake. Find the real mark and deliver it to **William Nothard**. Speak to **Wilkenson** at the docks.

**The Troll:**  
Speak to **Madame Telina**, NE of Wilkenson. The real mark is held by a Troll, **Roj Eir Sew' Eil**, a nasehir cutthroat. Clear the area of other mobs, kill and loot the **Mark of Louoth**, and return it to Telina.

**The Pirates:**  
Telina sends you south along the coast to **Muniel's Tea Garden**. Use the coach if available. Travel to the island NE of the coach, slay skeletons (**LB–Yellow @20**), and retrieve **Chiseled Great Axe of Doom** from sand-covered chests. Return to Telina.

**The Waterlogged Chest:**  
Travel to the valley at **Razor Back Fang**. Avoid undead in the valley, locate a small obelisk in water, and retrieve the **Etched Helmet of Greatness**. Return it to Telina.  

You will receive **2,814,929 XP** and choose between:
- **Blazing Clash** — concussive blast that injures and bewilders the target  
- **Mental Focus** — restores power to you

Grobb.Shadowknight:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Underlord Solthe  
Speak to **Underlord Solthe**. Purchase **Nightkeep Gloves** from **Merchant Horgus** and return to Underlord Solthe.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Underlord Solthe  
Speak to **Underlord Solthe**. Go speak to **Spiritmaster Griffnik**, then speak to **Coachman Zuggug**.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Crusader Tursk  
**Tursk** asks you to kill **Froglok Fishermen** and return with **two Froglok Fishing Nets**. Fishermen roam just north in the swamps.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Smithy Gulkot  
Smithy Gulkot will make you a weapon if you bring:
- **Leather Strip** — Merchant Grott  
- **Iron Ore** — Merchant Beldok  
- **2 Froglok Tongues** — Random Frogloks (hill Frogloks drop tongues more often)

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Crusader Tursk  
Kill **Froglok Novitiates** (**CON White**) and return with a **Casting Stone**. Novitiates are found NW in the swamp area (Grobb NW).

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Underlord Solthe  
1. Talk to **Underlord Solthe**. Kill a **Froglok Page** (**CON Dark Blue**) between Godhand and North Crossroads signpost. Loot **Royal Tikat** and return.
2. Solthe sends you to **Godhand** to kill a **Froglok Squire** (**CON White**) for **Token of Marr**. Squires spawn at night. Pull apprentices (**CON LB–DB**) carefully. Kill, loot, return to Solthe.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Underlord Solthe  
1. Talk to Solthe; he sends you to **Grumgra**. From Grobb, follow mountains west, then south to the shore. Grumgra is in a shelter.
2. Grumgra sends you to find a **trigger-popup** along the shoreline (random locations). Return to Grumgra.
3. Return to **Underlord Solthe**.
4. Kill a **Froglok Knight** (**CON White**) with two **Squires** (**CON Dark Blue**) at Northern Crossroads (Grobb NW). Loot **Hand of Thule**, return.
5. Kill the **Traitor** (a troll, **CON Yellow**) at the **Mushroom Patch**. Climb the central rock and wait. Kill, loot, return.
6. **Underlord Solthe** rewards you.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Underlord Burgish  
1. Talk to **Underlord Burgish** in camp past the coachman. He sends you to **Scornblade D'Eleth** in Neriak via **Waysender Zapit**.
2. Scornblade sends you to **Dragoon X'Talin** (Neriak west river). Tower is north side of river (Collenridge Cemetery N).
3. Kill **Shadow Cubs** (**CON DB–White**) for **3 pelts** east of X'Talin's tower along Collenridge Cemetery NE. Return to X'Talin.
4. Return to **Scornblade D'Eleth**.
5. Kill **Elf Paladin** (**CON Yellow**) at far end of area. Loot, return.
6. Return to **Underlord Burgish** via Waysender.
7. **Underlord Burgish** rewards you.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Underlord Burgrish  
1. Go to **Smithy Cragis** in Clagga Village (north road from troll camp, northwest to Guk).
2. Kill **Bogwater** (**CON Red**, named alligator) in surrounding swamps, loot tooth, return.
3. Go to **Torgot** in **Basher Enclave** (from troll camp, west along mountains, south through valley, west along shore).
4. Kill **Lizardman Fanatic** (**CON Yellow**) for pendant. Kill multiples if necessary. Return to Torgot.
5. Torgot rewards with scroll; go back to Smithy Cragis.
6. Go to **Scornblade J'Naris** in Hazinak (north road). Return to Smith Cragis after he agrees to send weapons.
7. Smith Cragis rewards you with a **tunic**.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Underlord Solthe  
1. Talk to Solthe; he sends you to **Crelga** in **Fog Marsh (Honjour)** via **Waysender Zapgit**.

**Crelga's tasks:**
- Kill **Farmers** for **3 Pitchforks** (Bear Cave C). Loot and return.
- Kill **Froglok Baz** for wand. Southwest to blue-lighted cave, kill scouts, loot, return.
- Return to Grobb/Hazinak, speak to **Scornblade J'Narus**, then **Natzih P'Thek** at Freeport Docks.
- Kill **Root Spirit** (**CON Yellow**) at **Wailing Tree** (Green Rift). Festering Root drops; bring help. Return loot to Crelga or Solthe.

**Rewards:**
- **Bloodwasp** — Decreases Drain HP by 300; Increases 20% based on INT  
- **Shadow Tower** — Increase Hate by 750, AC by 500 for 12 seconds (Self Only)
Grobb.Shaman:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Heirophant Koligo  
Koligo asks you to get some bracers and come back to her. You can get them from **Merchant Risa** for free.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Heirophant Koligo  
Koligo sends you to **Spiritmaster Grueldor**, who binds you and sends you to **Coachman Zuggug**.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Harbinger Lacra  
Lacra wants you to slay bats and bring back **three slivers of bat meat**.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Harbinger Lacra  
Lacra will make you a weapon if you bring the following items:
- **A Branch** — Purchase from Merchant Risa
- **A Leather Strap** — Purchase from Merchant Grott
- **Two chipped python fangs**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Harbinger Lacra  
Lacra wants you to kill **Froglok Novitiates** (CON White) and return to him with a **Casting Stone**. To find them: head northwest; you'll find them in a swamp area (Grobb NW).

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Hierophant Koligo  
1. Talk to **Hierophant Koligo**. She sends you to kill **three Bloated Mosquitos** for their **Blood Sacks**. To find them: head due west from Grobb to the first swamp by the Basher camp outside Grobb. Kill, loot, return to Koligo.

2. Koligo sends you to kill a **Froglok Apprentice** on the god **Hand of Thule**. You can find the Hand by following the path north and east out of Grobb. Kill, loot **Poison Vial**, return to Koligo.

3. Koligo rewards you.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Hierophant Koligo  
1. Koligo sends you to search the swamp where you found the Froglok Novitiates. Run around the swamp until you get a **popup**. Return to Koligo.

2. Koligo sends you to the tower with the **Crazy Troll**, which is near the swamp you just searched. Once you are at the tower, go inside and stay just inside the door. Wait until it is dark. Three undead skeletons will spawn; kill one, loot the note it drops, and return to Koligo.

3. Koligo sends you to the **Mushroom Patch** to kill the murderer **Krazul** (CON White or Yellow). Head out of Grobb and head west along the mountain. Find a rock in the middle of the patch and wait until Krazul walks in. Kill, loot, return to Koligo.

4. Koligo rewards you.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Underlord Burgish  
1. Talk to **Underlord Burgish**; he is in a camp just past the coachman. He sends you to **Scornblade D'Eleth** in Neriak. Use **Waysender Zapit**, who is near the exit tunnel of Grobb.

2. Scornblade D'Eleth is in the area with the Arena, the place marked *13* on the city map of Neriak. He sends you to **Dragoon X'Talin**. To find X'Talin: head out of Neriak and go west to the river; follow the river north and then west. The tower is on the north side of the river (Collenridge Cemetery N).

3. Dragoon X'Talin sends you to kill **Shadow Cubs** (CON DB to White) for **three pelts**. The Shadow Cubs can be found east of X'Talin's tower. Head east from the tower and follow along the mountain in Collenridge Cemetery (NE). Kill, loot three pelts, return to Dragoon X'Talin.

4. Dragoon X'Talin sends you back to Scornblade D'Eleth.

5. Scornblade D'Eleth sends you to kill the **Imprisoned Wizard** (CON Yellow), who is at the other end of the Arena. Easy to kill. Kill, loot, return to Scornblade D'Eleth.

6. Scornblade D'Eleth sends you back to **Underlord Burgish**. Use the Waysender in Neriak to return to Grobb.

7. Underlord Burgish rewards you.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Underlord Burgrish  
1. Talk to **Underlord Burgrish**. He sends you to **Smithy Cragis** in Clagga Village. To find Clagga Village: take the northern road out of the Troll camp and follow it northwest until you reach Clagga Village in Guk.

2. Smithy Cragis sends you to kill a named alligator called **Bogwater** (CON Red), who spawns in one of the three swamps surrounding the village. Kill, loot the tooth, return to Smithy Cragis.

3. Smithy Cragis sends you to **Torgot** in **Basher Enclave**. To find the Basher Enclave: from the Troll camp outside Grobb, head west along the mountains. Continue west until you come to a break in the mountain range that lets you go south. Go through the valley, then continue west along the shore to reach the Basher Enclave.

4. Torgot sends you to kill a **Lizardman Fanatic** (CON Yellow) for his pendant. From the Basher Enclave, go north and slightly west. You may have to kill a few Lizardman Caitiffs standing in the center ring to get the Fanatic to spawn. You may need to kill a few Fanatics for the drop. Kill, loot pendant, return to Torgot.

5. Torgot rewards you with a **scroll** and sends you back to Smithy Cragis in Clagga Village.

6. Smithy Cragis sends you to **Scornblade J'Naris** in Hazinak. Follow the road north out of Clagga Village to Hazinak. Scornblade J'Naris is on top of a tower in the small fort in Hazinak.

7. Scornblade J'Naris agrees to send the weapons. Return to Smithy Cragis.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Koligo  
1. Talk to **Koligo**, who sends you to **Waysender Zapgit** for a trip to Honjour.

2. Talk to **Crelga**, who is in Honjour. He has **three tasks** for you.

**Task 1:** Kill **Farmers** (CON LB to DB) for **3 Bags of Seeds**. To find them: head south (Bear Cave zone) to the road, then head west. You should be able to target "farmer" from the road. Kill Farmers, not Odd Farmers. Kill, loot, return to Crelga.

*Notes:* More directions to find the Farmers: head south from Honjour until you see a farm. You will start conning some Odd Farmers and a guy named John. Go past this farm and look for a nearby road. Follow that road and you should see a windmill ahead — go to the windmill.

**Task 2:** Get the staff from a **Froglok** (check quest log for name) (CON White) in the mountain caves southwest of Honjour. Kill, loot, return to Crelga.

**Task 3:** Get the **Spirit Root** from **Root Spirit** in the **Wailing Tree** in Green Rift Zone. Return to Crelga, then return to Koligo.

**Wailing Tree:** Go to the Green Rift zone. When you come upon the rift canyon, head north. Soon in the distance you will see a very large tree (the Wailing Tree). At the bottom of the tree is a tunnel entrance — enter it. Inside the tunnels are many undead mobs (CON LB to Yellow at 20). Most don't see invis, but *one does*. As you enter the tunnel, make a left turn, then make your way past two or three large rooms. In the second or third room you will get a **POPUP** message. Pluck the root and it will appear in your inventory. **Note:** Festering Roots from the Root Spirit are *not* what you want. You may need help — the mobs swarm and have large aggro ranges. There are no safe places inside the tunnels to die and resurrect.

**Reward:**  
- **Decaying Wind** — Decrease STA by 25, Decrease Max HP by 120, Decrease AC by 106  
- **Feral Spirit** — Improved pet
Grobb.Warrior:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Warlord Jurglash  
Warlord Jurglash sends you to buy a no-cost basher shirt from **Merchant Trilip**.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Warlord Jurglash  
Visit **Spiritmaster Gugzug** and get bound; he will send you to see the coachman. Remember to sign his book before leaving. Return to Spiritmaster Gugzug. Return to Warlord Jurglash.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Underlord Krullik  
Go to the swamp and kill snakes. Bring **3 ruined python scales** to Krullik.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Underlord Krullik  
Kill blood flies or mosquitos for **2 fractured thoraxes**, then buy **iron ore** from Beldok and a **leather strip** from Grott. Bring the items to **Gulkot**. Return to Krullik.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Underlord Krullik  
Krullik wants you to kill **Froglok Novitiates** (CON White) and return to him with a **casting stone**. To find them: head northwest; you'll find them in a swamp area (Grobb NW).

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Warlord Jurglash  
1. Talk to Jurglash; he sends you to kill **Froglok Tactician**, who spawns between the raider camps north of Grobb. Kill, loot, return to Jurglash.

2. Jurglash sends you to kill the **Froglok raiding party** that is forming near God Hand. Kill, loot, return the belt to Jurglash.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Warlord Jurglash  
1. Talk to Jurglash; he sends you to talk to a **Crazed Troll**. Go to the tower to the NE. Return to Jurglash.

2. Jurglash sends you back to the tower to find out why the trolls do not return. Talk to the Crazed Troll again and **slap him**. Then go in the tower at night and kill **Vengeful Dead** until one drops a scroll and necklace. Return to Jurglash.

3. Jurglash sends you to **Heirophant Koligo**.

4. Koligo sends you to **Kuthrak**, a drunk in the Drink Place. He tells you he wants a **starcrab glog** and sends you to the **Swillmaster** nearby to get the drink.

5. Swillmaster sends you to kill **Starcrabs** for **3 starcrab shells**. Kill, loot, return to Swillmaster. Return the drink to Kuthrak. Return to Koligo.

6. Koligo sends you to the **Froglok prison**. A Froglok prisoner tells you a story about a Froglok named **Grothmal**. Return to Koligo.

7. Koligo sends you to kill **Grothmal** (CON Yellow) and get a **ruby pendant**. He comes out at night in the mushroom patch west of the war camp. Kill, loot the necklace, return to Koligo. Return to Jurglash.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Underlord Burgish  
1. Talk to Underlord Burgish; he is in a camp just past the coachman. He sends you to **Scornblade D'Eleth** in Neriak. Use the **Waysender Zapgit**, who is near the exit tunnel of Grobb.

2. Scornblade D'Eleth is in the Arena area (place marked *13* on the city map). He sends you to **Dragoon X'Talin**. To find X'Talin: head out of Neriak, go west to the river, follow the river north and then west. The tower is on the north side of the river (Collenridge Cemetery N).

3. Dragoon X'Talin sends you to kill **Shadow Cubs** (CON DB to White) for **three pelts**. The Shadow Cubs are east of X'Talin's tower; follow along the mountain in Collenridge Cemetery (NE). Kill, loot 3 pelts, return to Dragoon X'Talin.

4. Dragoon X'Talin sends you back to Scornblade D'Eleth.

5. Scornblade D'Eleth sends you to fight a **troll** (CON Yellow) in the arena. Kill, loot, return to D'Eleth.

6. To return to Grobb, pay **225 tunar** to the Dark Elf Waysender. Return to Underlord Burgish.

7. Underlord Burgish rewards you.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Underlord Burgish  
1. Talk to Underlord Burgish; he sends you to **Smithy Cragis** in Clagga Village for some weapons. To find Clagga Village: go out the north end of the war camp and run north and slightly west.

2. Smithy Cragis sends you to kill **Bogscraper** (CON White), an alligator just outside Clagga in any of the three swamps. Kill, loot, return to Cragis.

3. Smithy Cragis sends you to **Turgot** in the Bashers Enclave, which is southwest from Grobb along the southern shoreline.

4. Turgot sends you to kill a **Lizardman Fanatic** (CON Yellow) for his drum. To find him: go west out of the Enclave and head south. When you see Lizardman Caitiffs, that's the spot. If no fanatic is in the circle, kill the stationary Caitiffs and a fanatic will spawn. You may need to kill a few fanatics before you get the drum. Kill, loot, return to Turgot.

5. Turgot sends you back to Cragis.

6. Cragis sends you to **Scornblade J'Narus** in Hazinak. Go northeast from Clagga until you reach the coastline, then follow it north to Hazinak. Return to Cragis.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Warlord Jurglash  
1. Talk to Warlord Jurglash; he sends you to **Hagley** to talk to a Seer (name unknown). Use the Waysender to travel to Hagley. Find the only Seer there.

2. The Seer sends you to kill **Farmers** (CON LB to DB) for **3 Bags of Grain**. To find the Farmers: head south to the road, then west; you should be able to target "farmer" from the road. Kill Farmers, not Odd Farmers.

More directions: head south from Honjour until you see a farm; you will con Odd Farmers and a man named John. Go past this farm and look for a nearby road. Follow it until you see a windmill. Go to that windmill.

Kill, loot until you have 3 Bags of Grain, then return to the Seer.

3. The Seer sends you to kill a **Froglok Ton** (CON White) in the caves near the town. Kill, loot the sword, return to the Seer.

4. The Seer will teleport you back to Grobb. Go talk to **Scornblade** in Hazinak.

5. Scornblade sends you to someone (read the dialog for name) in **Freeport**. Take the ferry from Hazinak to Freeport. The NPC is in the house directly northeast of the dock. He tells you how to get to the **Wilting Tree**.

6. Coach to Neriak and head southwest from the gate into **The Green Rift**. Go to the NE corner of the zone, then head directly southwest. You will eventually see a huge tree on the horizon — this is your destination. Around the tree you'll find an entrance underneath it. Kill a **Root Spirit** (CON Yellow) and loot the roots.

7. Return the roots to Jurglash for your quest reward.

**Reward:**  
- **Bellow** — Increase Max HP by 350, Increase HP by 350  
- **Pillar of Might** — Increase Hate by 750, Increase AC by 500 for 12 seconds (self only)

Halas.Rogue:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Juno Felligin  
Speak to Juno Felligin. Go to **Tailor McQuaid** and pick up a **Rogue's Tunic**. Then go back to Juno Felligin. You shall receive **430 XP**.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Juno Felligin  
The Spiritmaster and the Coachman. Report back to Juno for your next quest. He sends you to speak to **Spiritmaster Dean**. After you speak with him, he will send you to **Coachman Dudley** (he is located right before the tunnel). Then return to Juno. You shall receive **2,200 XP**.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Juno Felligin  
Report to Juno. He tells you about how the *Seeing Eye* is low on a secret seasoning (spider eyes). You may find these spiders in the gates of Halas or outside (I recommend searching inside the gates). When you have the spider eyes, return to Juno and receive **6,900 XP**. You shall receive **Sneak**.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Gannon MacGibson  
Report to Gannon MacGibson. He is willing to make you a weapon but he needs some materials. He needs the following:

- An **Oilstone** from Merchant Millie  
- An **Iron Ore** from Bennon O'Leary (he may be found in the tunnel leading outside of Halas)  
- **2 Chipped Raven Beaks** — go outside Halas and farm ravens/crows/magpies until you receive 2 chipped raven beaks

When you have all these items, return to Gannon. You receive **17,000 XP**. Also you shall receive a **Chipped Raven's Beak Knife**.

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Juno Felligin  
Once you have reached level 5, go speak with Juno once again. He tells you that a band of goblins has headed toward Halas. He tells you that you must slay one and retrieve a **Warden's Headband**.

**Note:** These mobs con yellow to a level 6.

Once you have retrieved the headband, return to Juno and receive **36,500 XP**. You shall receive a **Quick Blade** scroll.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Juno Felligin  
**Watcher’s Vest.** Once you have reached level 7, go speak with Juno Felligin. Juno tells you that **Ice Fang Spiderlings** have been scaring the women out of the caravans and infecting food. He sends you to slay one and return a **Fang**.

**Note:** They can be found south of the Halas gates. They also con **RED** to a level 7.

Return the fang to Juno and receive **157,500 XP**, the **Watcher's Vest**, and **Acrobatics**.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Juno Felligin  
Talk to Juno at level 10. He tells you a bit about your tribe and wishes to test what you have learned. Slay the **Ice Spider Queen**.

She is far to the west. She may also be with a group of wolves too. She is **RED** to you at level 10.

Once you have **two strands of spider silk**, return to Juno and he shall forge a weapon for you. You receive **556,753 XP** and **The Slicer's Special**.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Iron Eagle  
Speak with **Iron Eagle** in the bank(?) after you have reached level 13. He wishes to send you on a dangerous assignment. Some goblins have been spotted outside the city. Some **Freezeblood Captains** have been seen to the west of Halas.

These goblin captains have **battle plans** that Iron Eagle wants. These captains are south by the spider queens; they can be found in a camp with an igloo, and there are named goblins roaming around it (like **Guntak**, **Truktar**). Kill the scavengers and other goblins to farm your captain. Once you've spawned one, they con yellow or red to a level 13. Approach with caution because there are some mobs that really do not like you. (TY Faurix, CLW)

Remember, you need **two battle plans**. Farm your captains, kill, loot, return to Iron Eagle. You shall receive **550,698 XP** and a **Night Breath** scroll.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Iron Eagle  
Talk to Iron Eagle after you have reached level 15. The plans you gave him before indicate that an assassin named **Numla** is in the camp. You must slay Numla before he can complete his mission.

Return to the area just north of the Freezeblood camp next to the water. You shall see a large wooden *T* at the water’s edge. There may be a **Scavenger** instead of Numla; kill the Scavenger and soon Numla shall spawn. Be careful around the camp — there are a number of goblins there that are not very nice to you. At level 15, Numla will con yellow or red to you.

Bring Iron Eagle the **Bag of Tricks** from Numla. See **Shwandy McKibbin** and buy a **Raven's Tail Feather**. Return to Iron Eagle and receive **883,791 XP**, a **Vaulter's Balance** scroll, and **Raven Stalkers**.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Juno Felligin  
Return to Juno once you have reached level 20. He tells you that Freezebloods are planning yet another attack on Halas.

Each clan will be sending a representative to speak with **Yarn Icefrost**, who has camped to the south. Take the **sealed letter** to him — he must read it and respond.

Follow the river south until you meet a fisherman named **Deltor Cyclor**. He is at the riverbank and can direct you to Yarn Icefrost. Yarn is camped **west** of Deltor. Look for a group of trees he has planted. His cabin is in the middle of all the trees.

Speak to Yarn and he will give you a letter to bring to **Bren Raven**. Go back to the river and start heading south. You will soon come to a camp on the other side of the river. Cross over to that camp and look for Brenn Raven.

Be on the lookout for Freezebloods.

Speak to Brenn and give him the letter. Yarn’s instructions are for you to wait there for word from him. While you wait, go kill **Salmon** for your dinner. Return **two salmon** to Brenn.

Report to **Jarvan Tember** (he is located on a hill behind Brenn’s village). Jarvan has a letter that you are to take back to Juno. Speak with Juno. Then deliver a letter from Juno to Iron Eagle.

At this point, you must choose a path:

- **Path 1 (Defensive):** A more defensive path that turns attackers away from you.  
- **Path 2 (Offensive):** A more offensive path. This ability is a backstab (note you MUST be behind your enemy).

Choose your path and receive **2,814,929 XP**.
Halas.Shaman:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Beril O'Leary  
Beril wants you to buy a **Shepherd's Mantle**. You can get one for free from **Tailor Akesson**.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Beril O'Leary  
Beril sends you to talk to **Spiritmaster Lera**. She binds you and sends you off to talk to **Coachman Dudley**.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Beril O'Leary  
Beril asks you to kill rats and return to him with **three strands of rat fur**.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Trista  
Trista will make you a new weapon. He needs the following items:

- **Oilstone** — Purchase from Merchant Mallie  
- **Bar of Iron Ore** — Purchase from Benen O'Leary  
- **Small Spider Eyes** — Drop from spiderlings

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Beril O'Leary  
Beril sends you to kill **Freezeblood Wardens**. They are located in **Everfrost**, southeast of the town entrance.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Beril  
Beril sends you to **Freezeblood Hordes** for **two steel bars**. They spawn in the same camp as the **Goblin Icemasters** and **Icecrushers**. Head west–northwest from Halas.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Beril  
1. Talk to Beril; he sends you to **Nilmo**. To find Nilmo: From Halas, run west along the mountains. Look for a large stone monolith alone atop a hill. Go to it and face south. You should see two igloos on a patch of ice; go south from the southern igloo. Soon, you'll come to a small camp with three barbarians — Nilmo is here.

2. Nilmo sends you to kill **2 White Owls** for their feathers. From where Ferris is, go northwest a ways. Search and find the owl, kill it, loot the feather, return to Nilmo.

3. Return to Beril.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Elder Felligan  
1. Talk to Felligan in the bank. He sends you to kill **Freezeblood Scavengers** (CONs White). To find them: Head west from the gate. You will cross the Icecrusher lake, then pass through the double guard towers, and end up at a large pillar. Southeast from where **Trukat** spawns is where **Gunkat** spawns. Freezeblood Scavengers are at either location. Kill them and loot **three Tribunal Rings**.

2. Return to Felligan.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Elder Felligan  
1. Talk to Felligan in the bank. He sends you to kill the Freezebloods' leader, **Kurnor** (CONs Yellow). To find him: From the Halas tunnel, go west beyond the guard towers. Pass through the gap in the mountains, and when you hit the river, turn to your left. Not too far ahead will be an igloo. There will be some Scavengers and Kurnor himself. Kill him, loot the necklace, return to Elder Felligan.

2. Elder Felligan sends you to **Beril O'Leary**. Return to Elder Felligan.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Beril O'Leary  
1. Talk to Beril O'Leary. He sends you to **Deltor Cyclor**. Exit Halas via the tunnel, head southeast to the river, follow the river — he is on the west bank.

2. Deltor sends you to **Yarn Icefrost**. From Deltor's position, head due west to Yarn's igloo.

3. Yarn sends you to **Firemaster Drumm**, who is in **Diren's Hold**. He is located next to the banker on the 2nd floor of a tower. From Yarn, head back to the river and follow it south to Diren's Hold.

4. Firemaster Drumm sends you to kill **two Salmon** (CONs White). The salmon are in the river near Diren's Hold. Kill them, loot 2, return to Firemaster Drumm.

5. Firemaster Drumm sends you to **Jarvan Tember**, who is located on the mountain top next to Diren's Hold.

6. Return to Beril O'Leary. He sends you to **Elder Felligan** for your reward and path choice. The reward is **2 million XP**. You choose between:  
   - A **one-handed weapon** and a **pet buff**, or  
   - A **two-handed spear** and an area debuff called **Decaying Wind**.
Halas.Warrior:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Marik McPherson  
Marik asks you to get a **Warrior's Tunic** from Tailor Freya. It's free.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Marik McPherson  
Marik sends you to Spiritmaster Kere who binds you and **sends** you to Coachman Dudley.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Marik McPherson  
Marik wants you to kill rats. Go out of town and kill them until you have **three rat furs**.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Derry McQuaid  
Derry will make you a new weapon if you get the following items for him:

- **Oilstone** — Purchase from Merchant Mallie  
- **Iron Ore** — Purchase from Benen O'Leary  
- **Ruined Bat Wing**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Marik McPherson  
Marik sends you to kill **Freezeblood Wardens**. They are located in Everfrost, southeast of the town entrance.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Marik McPherson  
1. Talk to Marik McPherson — he has 3 tasks. Head west by northwest from Halas.

   **1.1** Kill a **Freezeblood Icemaster** (CONs Wht), loot **ice axe**.  
   **1.2** Kill a **Freezeblood Icecrusher** (CONs Wht), loot **icycap**.  
   **1.3** Find **Misty Trailer** and buy a **Wolves of the North sash** for **140 tunar**.

   **To find Misty:** From Halas, run west along the mountains and look for a large stone monolith alone atop a hill. Go to it and face south — you should see two igloos on a patch of ice. Go south from the southern igloo. Soon you'll come to a small camp with three barbarians — Misty is here.

2. Take all your items back to Marik McPherson — he rewards you.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Marik McPherson  
1. Talk to Marik McPherson — he sends you to **Ferris McDougal** to buy **Burlap Thread** for **145 tunar**. Return to Marik.

   **To find Ferris:** From Halas, run west along the mountains and look for a large stone monolith alone atop a hill. Go to it and face south — you should see two igloos on a patch of ice. Go south from the southern igloo. Soon you'll come to a small camp with three barbarians — Ferris is here.

2. Marik sends you to kill a **White Owl** (CONs Wht) for a feather. From Ferris's camp, go northwest. Search for the owl, kill it, loot the feather, return to Marik.

3. Marik rewards you.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Eldar Joram  
1. Talk to Eldar Joram — he sends you to kill a Freezeblood goblin named **Gunkat** (CONs Wht).

   **Directions:** Head west from the Halas tunnel exit. Travel from one stone landmark to the next. Go past the three Barbarian guard towers and look for the stone remains of a building that is no longer there. Go west, up and over the hill next to you; as you come down the other side you will see one lone, well-guarded igloo.

2. Kill Gunkat, loot **two chests**, return to Eldar Joram.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Eldar Joram  
1. Talk to Eldar Joram — he sends you to kill a Freezeblood goblin named **Trukat** (CONs Wht).

   **To find Trukat:** From Halas, run west along the mountains and look for a large stone monolith alone atop a hill. From the monolith, go west past the Barbarian guard towers and look for the stone remains of a building that is no longer there. From there, go west, up and over the hill next to you; on the other side you will see one lone well-guarded igloo. Trukat is on the hill opposite yours with the igloo.

   Kill him, loot **knife**.

2. Get **495 tunar** and go see **Ferris McDougal**. Buy:  
   - **Blued Bear Skin Fur**  
   - **Blued Bear Skin Sash**

3. Return to Eldar Joram.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Marik McPherson  
1. Talk to Marik — he sends you to **Deltor Cyclor**. Exit Halas via the tunnel, head southeast to the river, follow the river; he is on the west bank.

2. Deltor sends you to **Yarn Icefrost**. From Deltor's position, head due west to Yarn's igloo.

3. Yarn sends you to **Pratcher**, who is in **Diren's Hold**, next to the Banker on the 2nd floor of a tower. Head back to the river and follow it south to Diren's Hold.

4. Pratcher sends you to kill **two Salmon** (CONs Wht). They are in the river near Diren's Hold. Kill, loot 2, return to Pratcher.

5. Pratcher sends you to **Jarvan Tember**, who is located on the mountain top next to Diren's Hold.

6. Return to Marik — he sends you to Eldar Joram for your final reward and path choice.

**Reward:** ~**2.8 million XP** and a choice of:

- **Life Path:** *Blade of War* and *Pillar of Might*  
- **Strength Path:** *Bellow* and a *Sword of Rage*

Highbourne.Alchemist:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Melina Quiscellin
Talk to Melina Quiscellin. She will send you to get your uniform from Merchant Hanna, who is directly across from the guild house. Buy the uniform free of charge.

**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Melina Quiscellin
Speak to Melina Quiscellin. She sends you to talk with Spiritmaster Alcadia. Speaking to her sends you to Coachman Galdah, who is visible from there. Talk to him and return to Melina.

**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Truborne Jaegir
Speak with Truborne Jaegir. He asks you to collect **2 tarantula leg tips**. Just exit Highbourne from either gate and look for hatchlings to kill.

**6,900 XP** and a **Hardening Agent** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Truborne Jaegir
Speak with Truborne Jaegir. He asks you to bring him a **cracked beetle horn** and **100 tunar**. Kill beetles around the gates of the city and whatever else is around for the tunar you'll need. Sell all loot you have except the cracked beetle horn until you have 100 tunar (this should only take 9–13 pieces of loot). Return to Truborne for your reward.

**17,000 XP** and the **Alchemist's Log**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Truborne Jaegir
Talk to Truborne Jaegir. You're told to retrieve a **strange poison sac** from a **banded king snake**. The snakes can be found near rock piles north of the northern Highbourne gate, or east and slightly north out of the eastern gate. This is the level 5 quest for all Erudites, so look for help or be ready to die for every one you kill. Once you have the poison sac, bring it to Truborne for your reward.

**36,500 XP** and the **Crude Refinement** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Truborne Jaegir
Speak with Truborne Jaegir. You're sent to **Qeynos** to talk to the alchemy guild master there and kill a **greyflesh pike**.

To get to Qeynos, exit Highbourne and head west until you reach the coast. Once there, follow it north. You'll pass two villages before reaching Qeynos. Sign the coachman's ledger. The alchemy guild is in the nobles court, in the southeast corner of the city.

He then tells you to get the pike. The pike is under the docks in Qeynos. Exit the city and go to the west side to find the docks. Somewhere near should be the pike. Kill it and bring the fillet to the guild master. He needs some tunar (about **130**) to extract the oil you need. Bring it to him, then return home with the oil and give it to Truborne.

**157,474 XP**, a **Crude Sublimation** scroll, and **Treated Gloves**

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Truborne Jaegir
1. Talk to Truborne Jaegir. He has you investigate the properties of the **Banded Kingsnake Poison** from an earlier quest and sends you to find **three additional poisons**.
2. The first poison comes from a **Broken Tarantula Fang**. Kill spiders around and near Highbourne (large spiders may also work).
3. The second comes from the **Elusive Stone Ant** (cons yellow). To find it, head north from the North Gate along the border between Highbourne (N) and Highbourne (NE).
4. The final poison can be bought in **Wyndhaven** from a fisherman on a raft north of town. Do **not** give him 2,000 tunar — pay **300 tunar**. There's a merchant on the raft if you need to sell.

**556,753 XP** and the **Alchemy Hammer**

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Truborne Jaegir
Start with your master. He sends you to **Stoneclaw** to kill a **ribbed snake** and return with the poison sack. Stoneclaw is one zone east of Highbourne. The ribbed snake is in the **NE part** of Stoneclaw in a hilly area with trees and boulders. There are also Emperor Snakes and a Zombie nearby. When found, there were two of them on a hillside (conned dark blue at level 14).

Return to Truborne, then go speak to **Jargan Nicks** in Qeynos. Return again to Truborne in Highbourne. Then buy **lotion** from Merchant Ninny for **450 tunar**. Quest completes. You receive **Crude Quickening**, a self–SOW-type ability that increases movement speed. You can stack three at a time; it costs nearly a full bar of mana at level 14.

**550,698 XP** and the **Crude Quickening** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Truborne Jaegir
He sends you to **Tilliam Nebaulm** (near the blacksmith), who then directs you to **Greyvan** in Wyndhaven. He needs feathers from **Giggen Aviaks** — one male and one female — to clear his name. Giggen Aviaks are east of Highbourne past the Stoneclaw ravines. They should con white at 15. Return to Truborne.

**883,791 XP**

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Truborne Jaegir
1. Talk to Truborne Jaegir. He sends you to an NPC in **Arcadia** in a building in front of the docks. To reach Arcadia, speak to the Dockmaster in Highbourne.
2. Speak to the Arcadia NPC, then walk back toward the dock. Near the end you'll get your first pop-up. Walk a bit more for another pop-up telling you to go underwater and grab the **shiny metal** on the sea floor. Swim down until you get the pop-up, then return to Truborne.
3. Show Truborne what you found. He sends you back to Arcadia, but instead use the item in your inventory. Target yourself, use the charge, and you'll be teleported to the **Plane of Sky**. Jump off, and you'll spawn in Highpass. Return to Highbourne, then go to **Wyndhaven** and speak with the Mayor. To reach Wyndhaven, go north along the coastline from Qeynos.
4. The Mayor sends you to **Murnf**. Go north from Wyndhaven to the mountain line, pass through near the coast or a nearby break, then head straight east to the village. Sign the coachman's ledger and speak to the **Captain** in the tower.
5. The Captain sends you to a **Sage NPC** in a tower at **Gramash Ruins (C)** northeast of the Captain's tower. Speak to a guard who sends you to **Kara Village** to kill a thief. Coach to Klick'Anon and follow the road west to Kara (S). Look for **Taereg Bandits** near the lake. The target mob spawns inside the camp and cons yellow at 20. Kill it and return to the guard.
6. You are now allowed to meet the Sage. Touch the teleportation orb to reach the upper level and speak with him.

**2,814,929 XP** and one of:
- **Student's Knack** (increases power pool and regen)
- **Klick'Anon Cocktail** (AoE potion)
Highbourne.Cleric:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Arch Bishop Erah
Buy a Silversun Ring from Merchant Kulesh.

**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Arch Bishop Erah
Speak to Spiritmaster Helshah. Speak to Coachman Galdah.

**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Bishop Felkahn
Kill dragonflies. Bring back 2 damaged firefly wings.

**6,900 XP** and a **Minor Blessing** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Bishop Felkahn
Buy leather strip and iron ore from Merchant Shudan by the docks. Also need 1 cracked rat tooth.

**17,000 XP** and **Ironsun Mace**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Bishop Felkahn
Kill banded kingsnake. Bring back poison sack.

**36,500 XP** and a **Holy Shock** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Bishop Felkahn
Go talk to Dushuan Anju, an enchanter in the room by the north gate.

After speaking with Dushuan, you are sent to kill the goblin **Nubja**. From the North gate, head out and look for the mob near the gate. He wanders and has a long respawn time. Note: Nubja likely spawns only at night in Tunaria (night begins at half past the hour).

Kill Nubja, loot the horn of silence, and return to Dushuan Anju to collect your reward. Return to Bishop Felkahn.

**157,474 XP**, an **Endure Ailment** scroll, and **Light Cloth Pants**

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Bishop Felkahn
1. Talk to Bishop Felkahn on the bridge. He sends you to **Duke Geoff Melnorn** in Hagley. Go to Qeynos, then east on the middle road to Hagley. Duke wants **300 tunar**. He is in an inn just east of the village on the hill.
2. Pay Duke 300 tunar, then kill **Rory Redface** (cons yellow). From Hagley, head north to a hill north of the main village gate. Bandits spawn on the hill at night. Kill them until Rory spawns. Kill, loot the ring, return to Duke. Note: Rory spawns only at night (half past the hour).
3. Duke sends you back to Bishop Felkahn.

**556,753 XP** and **Ironsun Morningstar**

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Bishop Felkahn
1. Talk to Bishop Felkahn, who sends you to **Lord Yardley of Blakedown** (east of Qeynos in Hagley). Follow the north road to Yardley house upstairs.
2. Lord Yardley sends you to kill **Pavel the Human Thief** and **Zara the Barbarian Thief**.

2.1 Pavel (cons yellow):
- Location 1: Near ex-blacksmith (Johann Greyman's) house, along main road west, next to a woodpile.
- Location 2: East side of Blakedown, near a bridge, city side.
- Location 3: From the bridge, follow the river north to a waterwheel.
Kill, loot the love letter, return to Lord Yardley.

2.2 Zara (cons red): Lord Yardley sends you to **Maxwell Rigar** in Forkwatch Keep. Find the tallest building, go to balcony. Maxwell says Zara is in one of four bottom towers in Forkwatch Keep. Kill, loot Bandit's necklace, return to Maxwell.

5. Maxwell Rigar returns you to (? Check your log) Mu Nan or Bishop Felkahn for your rewards.

**550,698 XP** and a **Disrupt Undead** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Bishop Felkahn
1. Talk to Bishop Felkahn. He sends you to **Mu Nan**, who sends you to **Jeeves the Squire** (Bayle Manor, 1st floor, Qeynos). Enter Qeynos through East gate, go west, right a bit north, enter The Greenway, left south, enter last doorway on right. Continue east to next doorway for Bayle Mansion.
2. Jeeves sends you to obtain two signatures:
- 1st signature: **Captain Bordengahst** in Forkwatch Keep, highest tower.
- 2nd signature: **Saerk** at Saerks Tower via East Trade Road from Highpass.
3. Take signatures to **William Nothard**, High Councillor of the Iron Coffer in Freeport (west portion, from North Gate, south on Middle Road, first doorway right, west through next doorway).
4. William sends you to **Fredrik** in an inn in Highpass across from coach.
5. Fredrik sends you to kill a **Kithicor Thug** near Saerks Tower, loot letter. Return to Jeeves the Scribe, then Bishop Felkahn.

**883,791 XP**, an **Endure Affliction** scroll, and **Guard of Peace**

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Bishop Felkahn
1. Talk to Felkahn. He sends you to **Captain Ironforge**, hiding in the watch tower north of the prison.
2. Captain Ironforge sends you to **Jimmy the Snitch**.
3. Jimmy wants a pardon, sent back to Captain Ironforge.
4. Captain Ironforge sends you to **Jeeves the Scribe** in Qeynos.
5. Jeeves sends you to kill **Grend Darkmaw** (cons DB) near Hagley, east of Qeynos. Kill, loot tunic, return to Jeeves (may require multiple attempts).
6. Jeeves gives you the pardon, return to Jimmy.
7. Jimmy wants a suit, sends you to **Taliana Quickthimble** (NW corner, beggar's district, house on end).
8. Taliana sends you to buy her enchanted needle (1000 tunar) from Merchant Grieg, and to kill **Furdle Nimdar**, loot tanned bear hide, return to Taliana, then Jimmy.
9. Jimmy gives the password: "Fuzzy Knuckles". Go kill **Vernon Blackhand** (cons LB) with group/invis. Use hallway, tell ogre password, kill, loot gloves, return to Captain Ironforge, then Felkahn.

**2,814,929 XP** and choose either:
- **Disease Ward** (raises resistances)
- **Field Dress** (heals a small amount)
Highbourne.Enchanter:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Master Delar
Delar asks you to get a Keeper's Robe from Merchant Kulesh. Get it (it's free).

**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Master Delar
Delar sends you to Spiritmaster Keyston, who binds you and sends you to Coachman Galdah.

**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Keeper Ilishan
Begin by talking with Keeper Ilishan (on the floor below the spiritmaster). He will ask you to kill a rogue lion and obtain a NO TRADE pelt from the body. The rogue lion can be found along the east road from Highbourne. It cons yellow at level 7, but you can kill it alone if you entice a blue mob, make it attack, then cast Heavy Arms, and then cast Arcane Bolt as often as possible until your mob dies. Then assault the lion with Chaotic Feedback and Arcane Bolt as fast as possible. Return the pelt to Keeper Ilishan for some good XP and **Endure Arcane**.

**157,474 XP**, an **Endure Arcane** scroll, and **Fur Lined Gloves**

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Master Delar
1. Talk to Master Delar, who sends you to kill **Skeletal Dogs** (cons yellow). They spawn in ruins directly east from the East Gate of Highbourne in Stoneclaw zone. Kill, loot robe if needed, return to Master Delar.
2. Master Delar sends you to kill the traitor **Ganron Blackart** (cons white or yellow) in a ravine to the east. Follow the mountain east, enter the third opening, stay right, find cave. Cast invis before entering to avoid panther. Kill, loot, return to Master Delar.

**556,753 XP** and the **Keeper's Staff**

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Keeper Draid
1. Talk to Draid. He sends you to a graveyard in Druids Watch to get a popup and pick **Greyweed** at night using invis. Return to Draid.
2. Draid sends you to **Maryan** in Stoneclaw zone, east of Highbourne, through the second valley.
3. Maryan sends you to kill **Spotted Lions** outside the walled town to the west. Kill, loot pelt, return to Maryan.
4. Maryan gives you the book, return to Draid.
5. Draid sends you to **Guard (Smirg or Smeji)** in the watchtower north next to the prison in Qeynos Prison zone.
6. Guard Smirg sends you to kill **Hagar Loftlin** (cons yellow), randomly wandering outside the prison, usually NW of the tower. Kill, loot shackles, return to Draid.

**550,698 XP** and a **Lumbering Arms** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Keeper Asimoz
1. Talk to **Toshel** (down the hall from Master Veljhan), who sends you to **Fenra** at the Library (top floor, right).
2. Fenra sends you back to Toshel.
3. Toshel sends you to **Maryan** in Stoneclaw ravines.
4. Maryan sends you to kill a **Genorous Zombie** (cons white), head north, kill, return to Toshel, then Fenra.
5. Fenra sends you to **Nalej**, at one end of Wyndhaven.
6. Nalej sends you to his fishing boat in the water due south, wait until nightfall, kill **Brownie Thief** (cons white) and pet crab. Kill, loot, return to Nalej, then Toshel.
7. Toshel sends you to **Vedilion Brthstaw** in the church in Qeynos, return to Toshel.

**883,791 XP**, an **Alarming Visage** scroll, and **Watersilk Gloves**

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Master Delar
1. Talk to Master Delar. He sends you to **Captain Meruin** at the docks.
2. Captain Meruin sends you to **Farny the Woodcutter** near Melton (north to river, then east; Farny is N-NE from Melton, surrounded by red cons).
3. Farny wants **1,300 tunar**, also sends you to kill **Goretusk the Boar** (cons yellow, NE of Farny). Kill, loot hoof, return to Farny, then Captain Meruin.
4. Captain Meruin sends you to **Maryan** of Aviak Village in Stoneclaw zone. Enter Aviak Village.
5. Maryan sends you to kill **Aviak Chick** (cons white) roaming hills NE of village. Kill, loot No Trade Captured Aviak Chick, return to Maryan, return star charts to Captain Meruin.
6. Captain Meruin sends you to **Mayor Reively** in Wyndhaven. Walk the road to find him.
7. Mayor Reively sends you to kill **Blinkbart Bagglebaff** (cons yellow) on a hill east of windmill and smith shop. Kill, loot, return to Mayor, then Captain Meruin, then Master Delar.

**2,814,929 XP**, choose between:
- **Glimmering Arcanum** (burst of power for yourself, Spacious Mind)
- **Glimmering Wand** (burst of power for fellow travelers, Power Boon)

5. Maryan sends you to kill **Aviak Chick** (cons white), roaming hills NE of village. Kill, loot No Trade Captured Aviak Chick, return to Maryan, return star charts to Captain Meruin.

7. Mayor Reively sends you to kill **Blinkbart Bagglebaff** (cons yellow) on a hill east of windmill and smith shop. Kill, loot, return to Mayor, then Captain Meruin, then Master Delar.

**2,814,929 XP**, choose from:
- **Frozen Mark** (increases the toughness of your pet; gives it a damage shield and increases its attack)
- **Lava Stone** (summons a stone with three charges of Lava Strike, a fire-based direct damage spell)
Highbourne.Necromancer:
>💡 **Note:** For a quick cut to the east gate, explore the Nec Guild (the Hidden) and you will find a Shimmering Portal. Talking to the portal will allow you to port to the Hidden Gate, which is in a cave, to the east of Highbourne. As most of your low level quests are out the east gate, this is a nice short cut.

4. Sent to **Fredrik** in an inn in Highpass.
5. Kill a **Kithicor Thug** near Saerk's Tower, loot letter, return to Jeeves, then Ulana. **883,791 XP** & the **Knight's Bash Scroll**, receive **Sunhound Tunic**

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Ulana Stillmind

Klick A'non.Alchemist:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
Speak with Lanlin Ogledmaggen, the Guildmaster. He sends you to Tailor Nokar to pick up a **Student's Uniform**. Report back to Lanlin Ogledmaggen.

**Note:** To find Tailor Nokar, leave the building with Lanlin, go directly southwest to the wall, then turn northwest down the long hallway. At the T intersection, turn left towards the market. When you see the Banker's hut go south and you will find Tailor Nokar in the second building on the left. **430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
Go speak to Spiritmaster Savi, near the **Bridge of Amazing Impracticality**. Leave the building with Lanlin, go southwest to the wall, turn northwest down the long hallway. At the T intersection, turn left towards the market, pass the Banker's hut. On the left, a little gatehouse (ignore Spiritmaster Kettle). Pass through to find **Spiritmaster Savi**. Speak with Savi to bind your spirit.

Then go to **Coachman Rizkar** and sign the ledger (southwest outside the city, left side of the road). Report back to Lanlin Ogledmaggen. **2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
Speak with Lanlin Ogledmaggen. The guild is running low on **Bat Wings**. Head outside the city and slay bats, returning with **2 Ruined Bat Wings**. **6,900 XP** & receive the **Hardening Agent Scroll**

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
Speak with Lanlin Ogledmaggen. He sends you to **Alchemist Ambrakma** (tables northwest of the guild) to gather:
- Glass Beaker from **Samwe** (lab on Stemwater Lake, go south past Coachman)
- Wooden Tube from **Folsop** (near quarry behind rocks)
- **Ant Chitin** from killed ants
Return all supplies to Ambrakma. **17,000 XP** & receive the **Soft Iron Shaft**

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
A new species called **Mindwhippers** outside Klick'Anon. Return a **Stunned Mindwhipper** to the guild. Exit the city, go west to exit gates, then south along the mountains (SW quadrant). Slay mindwhippers until the item drops. Report back to Lanlin. **36,500 XP** & receive the **Crude Refinement Scroll**

---

# Level 7

**NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
Lanlin wants something from his brother **Zigbar** in **Kara Village** (west of Klick'Anon). Follow path west past city walls to the village. Speak with Zigbar to receive an alchemy recipe. Report back to Lanlin.

Lanlin has another errand: slay **Blackpaw** (bear, CON yellow@7) south of Klick'Anon, collect **Dried Honey Fur**, return to Lanlin. **157,474 XP** & receive **Crude Sublimation Scroll** and **Silk Spun Gloves**

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
Deliver a note to **Lyriam Kaelean** in Fayspires. Then kill an **Orc Wizard** near the Hatebone Orc cave and return its staff to Lyriam. Follow paths between hills; orcs are present in this area. Receive a note from Lyriam, return to Lanlin. **556,753 XP** & receive **Brown Gnarled Staff**

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
1. Slay a **Fire Goblin Alchemist** (CON db+@13) from Lavastorm Mountains, return minerals to Lanlin.
2. Take rock to **Goben Gernhard** in Kara Village (NW tower). Recover stolen **Rose Quartz** from **Taereg Jewel Thief** (CON yellow@13) in multiple spawn points in Kara. Return to Goben.
3. Goben identifies the mineral as **Saltpeter**, buy blue salts, return to Lanlin. **550,698 XP** & receive **Crude Quickening Scroll**

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
1. Travel to **Moradhim** to find **Dreggen Hardtoe** (bring tunar). Multiple routes described.
2. Speak with **Protector Koal**; he sends you to slay **Grizglurg** (CON yellow@15) to get a holy symbol.
3. Return holy symbol to Koal, receive powdered atacanite. Return to Dreggen, then gather **Barium** from caves south with **Eldemore**'s permission.
4. Retrieve barium with pickaxe, return minerals to Lanlin. **883,791 XP** & receive **Lanlin's Padded Bracers** and **Faulty Refinement Scroll**

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Lanlin Ogledmaggen
1. Deliver shipment to **Muniel** in MTG(SE) (Tea Garden, 2nd floor north building).
2. Speak with **Truborne Jaegir** in Highbourne to exchange info for **Starfire Ore**; collect 4 glands from Giant Stink Bugs (CON yellow@20).
3. Travel to **Trail's End**, slay **Stoneite Golems** (CON yellow@20), loot **Starfire Ore**, deliver to Lanlin. **2,814,929 XP**, choose between:
- **Student's Knack** (increases power pool and regeneration, plus hammer)
- **Klick'Anon Cocktail** (potent AoE potion, plus compendium)
Klick A'non.Cleric:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Teka Harnswoof 
Speak with Teka Harnswoof, the Guildmaster. Teka asks you to go to Tailor Tavin and pick up an Acolyte's Robe. Report back to Teka Harnswoof.
**Note:** To find Tailor Tavin, follow the path south and east; when it ends, head east. When you reach the wall, face north to see Tailor Tavin alongside his brother Prenlip in a merchant stand.
**Reward:** 430 XP

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Teka Harnswoof 
Speak with Teka Harnswoof. Speak with Spiritmaster Bage, who is just to the west of Teka. Spiritmaster Bage will bind you and send you to sign the ledger with Coachman Rizkar. Return to Teka.
**Note:** Follow the path to the end, then head east. Watch for a gatehouse to the south (with a ramp on either side). Pass through the gate, then over the Bridge of Amazing Impracticality and up the ramp leading outside. Coachman Rizkar is just to the south on your left-hand side.
**Reward:** 2,200 XP

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Teka Harnswoof 
Speak with Teka Harnswoof. The church needs two strands of rat fur. Leave the city and slay rats out past the Coachman. Return 2 strands of fur to Teka.
**Reward:** 6,900 XP and receive the Minor Blessing scroll

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Master Micah 
Speak with Master Micah. He will make you a new weapon if you bring him these components:
- Lubricating Oil - Purchase from Merchant Samwe. Head south past the coachman to Stemwater Lake; Merchant Samwe is up in the tower
- Dusting Feathers - Purchase from Merchant Folsop, down the ramp beneath the market
- 2 Cracked Ant Pincers - slay ants outside the city until you get what you need
Return to Master Micah with the items.
**Reward:** 17,000 XP and receive the Initiate's Mallet

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Teka Harnswoof 
Speak with Teka Harnswoof. A new species of creature has been found just outside the great walls protecting Klick'Anon. They are called mindwhippers; you must return a live mindwhipper to the guild.
**Note:** Exit the city; at the Coachman, travel west along the road to exit the city's walls. Once through the exit gates travel south along the mountainside (until you are in the SW quadrant). Here you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CON red@5). Slay the mindwhippers until they drop a "stunned mindwhipper" and report back to Teka Harnswoof.
**Reward:** 36,500 XP and receive the Holy Shock scroll

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Teka Harnswoof 
1. Speak with Teka Harnswoof, who tells you that the Earblowers are in need of spare parts for the Rivervale windmills. Go to Merchant Samwe (in the tower at Stemwater Lake, south of the coachman) and purchase 3 small gear wheels.
2. Now go to Waysender Glowbap and he will teleport you to Rivervale. The Waysender can be found east of the gatehouse, down the ramps past the lava pit.
3. Find and speak with Zale Earblower; he can be found on the east side of the lake, near the windmill (Rivervale [C]).
After talking to Zale, he will ask you to find Zarene Earblower and deliver the gear wheels. Look for Zarene Earblower in the Earblower Manor northwest of the bridge over the lake, up against the mountain on the north side of Rivervale. Deliver the gear wheels to Zarene; return to Zale with two of the gear wheels.
4. Zale's rumpled cap was stolen by goblin burglars and he wants it back. He gives you the Endure Ailment scroll to help you. Travel to Misty Thicket west of Rivervale (through the tunnel; don't forget to sign the coach—if you die the waysender will not send you back). Follow the path through Misty Thicket, past the windmill to the north end of the wall. Head around the wall and then head west. The goblin burglars (CON yel@7) spawn past the pickclaws towards the druidic stone on top of a hill (a bit to the north on the side of a hill, Misty Thicket [C]). You may have to kill a few until the rumpled cap drops. Return to Zale Earblower with his rumpled cap.
5. Speak to Waysender Windfoot to be transported home (located directly SE of the tunnel to Misty Thicket). Return to Teka Harnswoof.
**Reward:** 157,474 XP and receive Teka's Greaves

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Teka Harnswoof 
1. Speak with Teka Harnswoof. You are to assist Stily Hornbar in his study of the Coldpaw gnolls. You will find Stily in the Coldpaw camp, which are not aggressive to you.
**Note:** Leave Klick'Anon past the coachman and follow the path west. When you reach the large upright rock (10 seconds away), travel southwest to find the small gnoll camp (go to the right of that huge mountain in the way, continue west). Stily Hornbar is in the camp by a tree.
2. Talk to Stily Hornbar. He wants to give the gnolls a talisman as a friendly gesture. Go to Master Micah in your guild and tell him about the talisman. In order to create the talisman, some materials are needed:
- a punctured widow's eye (CON db@10); farm widow spiderlings south of the city gates
- holy symbol of Brell. Merchant Folsop will sell you one; he's near the lava pit and the model clockworks in the SE part of town
When you have these items, return to Master Micah and he will give you the Talisman of Brell.
3. Return to Stily Hornbar. Deliver the talisman to the Coldpaw leader, Renard Coldpaw. Renard wants a show of bravery. Find the bones of Coldpaw dogs south of Klick'Anon and return two bones to Renard.
**Note:** Travel south of Klick'Anon through the south gate (the one with Watchman Ilsey). Travel through the gates and head SE towards green mist with a stone and search for skeletal dogs (CON db-wht@10) found just south of this.
4. Returning the chewed-up bones to Renard will get you the Dogtooth Mace. Speak to Stily Hornbar.
**Reward:** 556,753 XP

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Master Micah 
1. Speak with Master Micah. The mushroom pickers are broke; go to Jarlo at the mushroom farms and find out what's wrong. Jarlo can be found near the thieves guild, located in the lower levels, by the pond behind a big machine.
2. Speak with Jarlo Busrobber. He needs help getting a new control board for the pickers that don't work. Head to the Clockwork Village and slay Model II PE's (CON yel@13) until you get 2 control boards. Return to Jarlo Busrobber.
**Note:** Exit Klick'Anon through the east gate and travel east to cross over the mountains. You'll see the village in the distance.
**Note:** While there, also find and slay clockwork spiders (model XXIII) to loot two spider legs—you'll need them later.
3. Jarlo Busrobber sends you to Master Micah. Master Micah has discovered that Allister Flobbergrop is behind the strange clockwork. Contact Allister's assistant Psova Brinkbar. You find her near Allister.
**Note:** Leave Klick'Anon through the east gate. Follow the mountain to the left (to the Lavastorm waysender). Up ahead you'll find a little shack, a mine entrance. Psova is standing there.
4. Speak with Psova Brinkbar; she tells you the clockworks are malfunctioning and have taken Allister away. Psova needs your help. Slay clockwork spiders (model XXIII) and collect 2 spider legs. Return to Psova Brinkbar.
**Note:** Hopefully you did this the first time you were at the Clockwork Village, but if not, head east until you can cross the mountain; you'll see the Clockwork Village up ahead.
5. Now Psova needs a magnifier from Camwe Gearcrafter, another assistant of Allister's. Find and slay Camwe and return the magnifier to Psova.
**Note:** Travel south from Psova to find Camwe Gearcrafter (CONs red@13) wandering near a defiled druid ring, with a green glow (Rogue Clockworks (SW)).
6. Return to Master Micah.
**Reward:** 550,698 XP and receive the Ward Death scroll

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Teka Harnswoof 
1. Speak with Master Micah. Report back to Psova as soon as possible (out the east gate of Klick, follow mountain left). Speak with Psova Brinkbar.
2. Psova needs help in deactivating the rogue clockworks. Psova has noted the movements of a certain patrol drone inside of Clockwork Village. The Patrol drone (XJ5) Cons yel@15. Return its clockwork shield to Psova Brinkbar.
3. Psova needs one of Allister's books. Find Allister and bring Psova his book entitled Clockworkopedia.
**Note:** Travel south from Psova's location. West of the River Saren is the Tomb of Elders in Collonridge Cemetery. Allister's tombstone is at the northeast area outside the tomb. After finding Allister's tomb, dig to find Clockworkopedia. [Go to Collonridge Cemetery, find the signpost, but you can't scan for it like a signpost. Walk up to it and read it; this will find the journal.]
Give Allister's book to Psova Brinkbar.
4. Now you must travel to Rivervale and take Psova's plans to Zale Earblower. Zale will look over Psova's plans, and in the meantime sends you to speak to his wife, Zarene Earblower. Zarene wants to bake a mushroom pastry. Search for the Kithicor Myconid stalk and take it to Zarene Earblower. (See Level 7 quest above for details on where Zale and Zarene are in Rivervale.) Find, slay, and loot the myconid stalk and return to Zarene Earblower.
**Note:** Cross the lake back towards Zale and head east through the tunnel to reach the northeastern forest on the other side. Continue on the path east until the path ends, keep going on an easterly course till you see the Kithicor myconids (CON yel@15).
5. Return to Zale Earblower and pick up Psova's plans. Return the plans to Psova. Receive Psova's Bracers. Return to Teka Harnswoof.
**Reward:** 883,791 XP and receive the Endure Affliction spell

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Teka Harnswoof 
1. Speak with Teka Harnswoof. Teka cannot make Psova's contraption work. Take it to Snafitzer so he can fix it.
**Note:** Snafitzer's clockwork house is north of Tethelin. Coach to Fayspires, then Tethelin (Teth is west of Fay). Travel west from Tethelin to the gnomish observatory up on the mountainside. Climb the wide metal ramp to the top. Cross over the mountain and continue west to Snafitzer's house (Snafitzer's House (SW)).
2. Speak with Snafitzer. He needs Moradhim ore to fix the contraption. Travel to Moradhim and buy some ore for Snafitzer from Merchant Brant (take 640 tunar with you). Merchant Brant can be found upstairs in a building near the coach. Return to Snafitzer with the ore.
3. Snafitzer will fix the device but wants a favor. An orc named Grug has been causing trouble. Head to the Druk and kill Prophet Grug (Cons yel@20) and bring Snafitzer back his staff as proof.
**Note:** Travel back across the mountain and down the ramp, returning to Tethelin. From Tethelin, follow the path east to the river. Follow the river south to reach the Druk (C) — it's a huge cave entrance at the end of the river. Enter the cave and make your way down to the bottom. At the point where the tunnel starts going 'up' again, stop and look to your right — you should see a ramp leading down with Grug at the bottom.
4. Snafitzer will now give you the fixed contraption; return to Teka Harnswoof. Now take the contraption to Psova Brinkbar.
5. Psova needs you to get something from the Halflings of Bobble-by-water. Seek Barly Sowser and get a hollowed shaft.
**Note:** From Psova's location, travel south to reach the River Saren. Follow the river south to reach Bobble-by-water. Barly Sowser is on the west side of the river, in a field.
6. Ask Barly Sowser for a hollowed shaft. Barly will give you the shaft if you help with a favor. There is a great tree to the west of Bobble-by-water. Somehow it's been corrupted. Get Barly a piece of its root. Go down the tunnels of the tree and get a wailing root and return it to Barly.
**Note:** From Barly, travel west to the Green Rift zone. When you reach the path, follow it northwest (north of the big canyon). In the distance you will see a huge tree, the Wailing Tree. At the bottom of the tree is a tunnel entrance. Enter the tunnel and take a left (most mobs don't see through invisibility, but root spirits do); make your way through a couple of large rooms, you will get a popup, pluck the root and it's yours.
7. Barly will now give you the hollowed shaft. Return to Psova Brinkbar. Psova will now give you the contraption and send you to the Clockwork Village to kill Unit 1 (Cons yel@20). Head east over the mountain from Psova's location to the Clockwork Village. From the entrance to the village, head diagonally to your left, go to the last hut on the left in a corner to find Unit 1 (triggered spawn), this should be the south wall. There may be a placeholder, which will be the mob in the center in the back. Slay and loot the Control Gear from Unit 1 and return to Teka Harnswoof.
**Reward:** 2,814,929 XP and choose between:
- Disease Ward, which greatly increases the resistances of your target (all six)
- Field Dress, which sends a pulse of life toward your target, healing them immediately.

# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Professor Temwiddle 
Temwiddle asks you to buy a Student's Uniform. Find Tailor Nokar in the marketplace and get one for free.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Professor Temwiddle 
Temwiddle sends you to see Spiritmaster Savi, who binds you and sends you to Coachman Rikzar.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Professor Temwiddle 
Temwiddle wants you to collect two firefly wings. Go out of town and kill the various flies.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Professor Valespin 
Valespin will make you a new staff if you bring him the following ingredients:
- Empty Bottle - Purchase from Merchant Guzzlewugs
- Small Metal Rod - Purchase from Merchant Samwe
- Snake Scale
- Rat Claw

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Professor Temwiddle 
Temwiddle sends you to get a Stunned Mindwhipper. Go out the west gate, and turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW), you will see a beehive structure, surrounded by Mindwhippers (CONs red). You may need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Professor Temwiddle 
Buy 3 gold springs from the merchant above the water near the lava flow. Find the waysender; he sends you to Rivervale. Be sure you sign the coach here before you leave. Find the Earblowers; they live in the north part of town. Talk to Zale's wife; she thanks you for the springs, then tells you to go talk to Zale. Zale is located across the bridge not near any windmills. He asks you to kill a goblin burglar and get his staff back. Burglars con yellow and they drop different pieces of Zale's equipment, so it may take multiple kills to get this item. Return to Zale, he sends you back to Klik to see Temwiddle.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Professor Temwiddle 
1. Talk to Temwiddle; she sends you to Engineer Eagglefoot, who is in the laboratory on the lake. He says that he has lost his notebooks and sends you to find them. Talk to Temwiddle, she sends you to Covelbun Andelfoof and Diplomat Grabble; each has one.

**The Covelbum Andelfoof quest:**
1. Find Covelbum Andelfoof in Klik-Anon; he will tell you that he gave the notebook to Spiritmaster Savi.
2. Find Spiritmaster Savi in the brick house just before the bridges to leave Klik on the right.
3. Savi needs a Chipped Snake Fang from a Moss Snake and Ink, which can be found in Klik in the bottom area, where the rogue merchants are.
4. After you give her these things she will say that she cleaned off the notebook and will give it to you.

**The Diplomat Grabble quest:**
1. To find Diplomat Grabble, go out of the west gate and travel down the road until you reach a village of elves. Diplomat Grabble will be in a tall building on the right.
2. When you talk to him he will say that he had the notebook, but a huge red monster jumped him and he dropped it when he ran away. He tells you that the notebook should be inside the hive somewhere.
3. To find the second notebook, go straight south until you reach a wasp hive. You may want to invis by the hive because the wasps will con red to you.
4. To complete this quest you might need a level 10-12 group to help you reach the inside of the hive. Once you enter the hive, a message will pop up that you see a pile of papers and you rummage through it and find the second notebook.
5. Return the page you found in the wasps’ nest to Diplomat Grabble; he will verify that it is the correct page.
6. Once you have both notebooks, go back to the Engineer, who tells you to return to Temwiddle.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Professor Valespin 
1. Valespin sends you to find Model II PE (CONs yellow) in the Rogue Clockworks and return to him the Mechanagic Fluid. Go out the eastern gate, head east to the mountains, travel southeast bypassing the mountains. Around the mountain bend, turn northeast to find the camp of Rogue Clockworks. Model II PE roam around here. You may need to kill a few to get Mechanagic Fluid. Also kill two of the rat clockworks for their tails. Kill, loot, return to Valespin.
2. Valespin sends you to talk to Psova, located just north of the east gate.
3. Psova sends you to obtain two mechanical rat tails from any clockwork that is a rat. Kill, loot, return to Psova.
4. Psova sends you to find Camwe Gearcrafter (Rogue Clockworks SW), located south of her. You will find a small skeleton around some glowing stones with a monster named Camwe Gearcrafter. Kill, loot, return to Psova Camwe's scalpel.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Professor Valespin 
1. Talk to Teka Harnswoof (next to Master Minka). He sends you to talk to Psova, out the east gate along the mountains.
2. Psova sends you to the clockwork village to kill a Patrol Droid XJ5 (CONs yellow), kill, loot shield, return to Psova.
3. Psova sends you to find Allister's journal. Go to Collenridge Cemetery, find the signpost, but you can't scan for it like a signpost. Walk up to it and read it; this will find the journal. To find the cemetery, go out the west gate of Klick, go west past the river, look for a building with undead all around. Be careful getting to the building; lots of reds and yellows in the area. Return to Psova.
4. Psova sends you to Zale in Rivervale, give him the book, and he sends you to talk to his wife.
5. Zale's wife sends you to kill a mushroom man, who drops a myconid stalk. Go out the east gate of Rivervale and head east to Kithcor Forest (E), kill, loot, return to Zale's wife. Return to Zale. Return to Psova.
6. Psova sends you back to Teka Harnswoof.

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Professor Temwiddle 
1. Talk to Professor Temwiddle in the Klik-Anon enchanters guild; he sends you to Snafizter. To find Snafizter: Coach to Fayspires and head west into the zone of Snafizter's House (SW). You'll see an observatory area on the top of a mountain range; continue west along this mountain until you come to a house with mechanical legs.
2. Snafizter sends you to Merchant Bryant in Mordahim to buy Mordahim ore. To find Bryant: Coach to Mordahim; Bryant is in one of the houses on the same street that the coachman is. The ore costs 640 tunar. Return to Snafizter.
3. Snafizter sends you to kill Prophet Grug (CONs DB to WHT?), an Orc, located in the caves of The Druk. The Druk caves can be located by following the south road out of Fayspires. When you reach the bridge, follow the river south until it ends. The cave will be visible from the river's end. Prophet Grug is located at the bottom of the cave on the east side. Kill, loot mantle, return to Snafizter. Return to Professor Temwiddle.
4. Professor Temwiddle sends you to Psova in Klick. To find Psova: Head out of the East Gate and make a sharp northeast turn along the mountain, follow the mountains until you come to what appears to be a mine shaft. Psova moves around a lot here.
5. Psova sends you to Barley Sowers in Bobble-by-Water. Barley can be found farming in the city and across the bridge on the west side of the city.
6. Barley sends you to find some Wailing Tree Root in order to make the Hollowed Shaft. The Wailing Tree is northwest of Barley Sowers in Green Rift (NE). When you enter the northern area of the Green Rift zone, you will see a LARGE tree in the distance! Head for that, invis yourself, and enter the underground passageway. You do not have to kill anything to get the root; you merely have to go north until you enter the second chamber. You'll get a message saying that you found some Wailing Tree Root. Avoid Root Spirits, as they are the only ones who can see through invisibility. When you enter the second chamber, walk around the wall until you get a popup asking if you would like to pull a root. Do so. Return to Barley. Return to Psova.
7. Psova sends you to kill Unit 1 in Rogue Clockworks. Head east from Psova to Rogue Clockworks, get invis, and enter the Clockworks village. Unit 1 is towards the back in a house with two guards. Kill, loot power core, return to Professor Temwiddle.
