# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Werlib Quackook 
You need to go get a Student's uniform from Tailor Nokar (it's free).

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Werlib Quackook 
Werlib sends you to Spiritmaster Lacy, who binds you and sends you to Coachman Rizkar.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Werlib Quackook 
Werlib sends you out of town to kill rats, return with two strands of rat fur.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Professor Dandersoft 
Dandersoft will make you a new staff if you bring him the following items:
- A Copper Spring - Purchase from Merchant Samwe
- Bottle - Purchase from Grocer Guzzlewugs
- Snake fang
- Ant Chitin

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Werlib Quackook 
Werlib sends you to get a stunned mindwhipper. Head out the west gate, turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW); you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CONs Red). May need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Werlib Quackook 
1. Talk to Werlib, he has a note that must be delivered to Lyriam in Fayspires. On your way to Fayspires, stop at Kara Village and speak to Zigbar (he is near the centre of town).
2. Zigbar tells you about an angry wasp. Just north of the village there is a mindwhipper wasp (CONs yellow), kill, loot, return its eye to Zigbar.
3. Now continue west to Fayspires. While in Fayspires, get your coach. The coach is along the path before you get to the city. Lyriam Kaelean is in the mage guild. Go to the left of the city and take the first building you come to. Now give him the note and he will give you a note to give to Werlib. Return to Werlib.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Werlib Quackook 
1. Werlib wants you to go to Kara Village (C); talk to Gearcharmer, he can be found by a building on the west side of town. To find Kara, head out west gate of Klick.
2. Gearcharmer wants his device back; three Orc Thieves (CONs Blue) have it, they are south of Kara near a Beehive. Return to Gearcharmer.
3. Gearcharmer says the device is broken, take it to Gligbin in Klick. To find Gligbin, as you enter Klick through the white gate, look right. You'll need 197 tunar.
4. Gligbin needs Resin from an Orc Witchdoctor to fix the device. To find this Witchdoctor (CONs Blue), coach to Fayspire, from Fay coach head SE on road. When the road wraps around west, stop, look east; you should see some orc huts. To the right of the huts is a mountain; on the south side of this mountain is a tunnel (Fayspire SE), enter it, go past first right, the Witchdoctor is on the right side of the tunnel. Most orcs CONs lb to db. Return to Gligbin. Return to Gearcharmer.
5. Return to Werlib.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Siltha 
1. Siltha wants 4 Royal Wasp Guard wings. To find Royal Wasps (CONs DB to WHT to 13), from Siltha, head south to a large beehive, or from Teth coach, head NW. Enter the beehive, get yourself on the right side, and very carefully pull one of the guards away from the Queen (CONs red to 13). Loot 4 wings. Return to Siltha.
2. Siltha wants a spyglass from an Orc Gatewatcher. To find this Gatewatcher (The Druk (C)), from Fay coach, head SE on road till you get to a bridge, cross over bridge and follow river till ends. You should see a large orc tunnel. The Gatewatcher is just inside the entrance. Kill and loot. Return to Siltha.
3. Siltha wants the skull of Vitsh (CONs db to 13) from his tomb. To find Vitsh's tomb, go back to the orc tunnel described in step 2. Then head NE, you will soon come upon another tunnel; this is the tomb. Vitsh has two guards (CONs db to 13). You may need to kill Vitsh several times. Loot skull. Return to Siltha.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Werlib Quackook 
1. Talk to Werlib. He sends you to Fayspiregate (SE) Barges to talk to the Overseer Evief.
2. Overseer Evief wants you to speak with a barbarian in Direns Hold. To get there, speak with Waysender Carowyn in Fayspires, near the north door. Carowyn sends you to Moradhim (sign the coach). From Moradhim coach, run NW, slightly west, to Direns Hold (NE). You want to speak to Dorrun Hammerfist - he has a very special hammer for stonework. In order to get it, you must do him a favour.
3. Hammerfist wants Trapmaw (CONs DB to 15) dead. Trapmaw is a bear that spawns near Direns Village (Direns Village NE). There is a large mountain next to Direns Village; the bear is on the opposite side of the mountain. Kill, loot, return to Hammerfist in Direns, he gives you the hammer. Return to Overseer Evief.
4. Overseer Evief sends you to Freeport to Haldrin. To find Haldrin, enter main hall, first door on left; he is standing next to door. He wants a Sand Rune from a Sandcaster (CONs DB to 15). To find this Sandcaster (Northern Ro W), from FP coach run south while staying on top of the hills. After you pass the area of the Madmen, you will see the Nashier camp. The Sandcaster is in one of the huts. Kill, loot, return to Overseer Evief.
5. Overseer Evief sends you to kill a Stonemason (CONs DB to 15) in a pirate camp. To find this Pirate camp (Rogue Clockwork NE), coach to Klick, from coach head out east gate, head east. When you get to a large mountain, head south till you can cross east, then make way to the east coast, head north along coast. When you get to the Pirate camp (Pirates CONs red to 15), you will find the Stonemason near a large rock. You can avoid the Pirates easily. Kill, loot, return to Overseer Evief.
6. Return to Werlib.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Werlib Quackook 
1. Talk to Werlib Quackook in Klick, he sends you to Yiprew in Kara Village. To find Kara Village, from Klick coach, head out west gate, follow road west. Yiprew is standing next to a well.
2. Yiprew wants a Necromancer's Handbook from a Delf, Thailav D'yal, in Fayspire Gate. To find Fayspire Gate (E), from the most northern point in Fayspires, swim north, on land run north till you reach impassable mountains, then head east; you will see ruined Fayspires, the entrance. To find the Delf (CONs Yellow@20), enter the ruined Fayspire; he is the center in the back. There are several guards. Most mobs CON lb to db. Kill, loot, return to Yiprew.
3. Yiprew sends you to Snafitzer's House (SW). Talk to Snafitzer; to find him, coach to Tethelin and head west to the Gnome Observatory. Snafitzer's house is on the west side of the mountain. Snafitzer needs supplies from a small village south of him; however, this village is on the other side of those impassable mountains! Go to Tethelin coach. Coach to Moradhim, head east and across a lake to a tunnel in the mountains (Shon-To Monastery C). The small village is on the other side of the tunnel. Talk to Craftsmaster Pete; he will need 525 Tunar. Return to Snafitzer. Snafitzer sends you back to Yiprew.
4. Yiprew sends you to Collinridge Cemetery to get a Rib of a Crumbling Corpse (CONs Yellow@20). To find the Cemetery, from Yiprew, head southeast to Collinridge Cemetery (W). The mob is within the cemetery walls; enter east entrance, head east and enter next door east. Crumbling Corpse is to the right. Mobs CONs lb to db. Kill, loot, return to Yiprew.
5. Yiprew sends you back to Collinridge Cemetery (SE), to get the Essence of a Marauding Soul on the 'Crest of the Duelists' hill. From the cemetery, head southeast to Collinridge Cemetery (SE) to a flat-topped hill with many three-pronged stonewall structures on it. Easy to find in daylight. The Marauding Soul (CONs white) spirit spawns next to a lone tree. Has a long respawn time? You may need to kill several times for the drop. Kill, loot, return to Yiprew.
6. Return to Werlib Quackook; he will reward you.

# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Go to Tailor Tavin and get a Tattered Robe for free.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Grear sends you to Spiritmaster Zake who binds you and sends you to Coachman Rizkar.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Grear wants you to head out of town, kill ants, and return with two cracked ant pincers.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Bal Noonittle 
Bal will make you a new staff if you bring him the following items:
- Gear Wheel - Purchase from Merchant Samwe
- Meat Chunk - Purchase from Merchant Folsop
- Sliver of Snake Meat
- Fractured Firefly Thorax

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Hosrottle sends you to get a stunned mindwhipper. Head out the west gate, turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW); you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CONs Red). May need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Talk to Grear to get the quest. He tells you he needs to pay off some trolls for some work done. He sends you to the waysender to be sent to Freeport. To find the waysender, go out the false wall and make a right past the lava pit. On the other side of the lava, there is a tunnel. Go down to find the waysender.

You are now going to Freeport. Sign the coach while you are here. Then go back to the dock you showed up on and talk to the guy all the way at the end. He will send you to Hazinak. Once in Haz, go into the walled area and make a left; keep going left through two doors and you will see a coachman. Sign here too. Behind Coachman Drooga you will see a green tent. The troll you need is inside. Talk to him and he will give you something to give to Grear. Go back out to the dock and use the waysender on the same dock to go back to Klick and turn in your report.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Speak to Grear, and he sends you to visit Dragoon X'Talin. To find X'Talin, go out the west gate. Follow the mountain range westerly to the river and swim down it. You will eventually come to a tower on your left. The Dragoon is in the top. Talk to him and he will ask you to kill tomb rats and bring back a sigil. To get to the tomb rats, go back to the river and continue swimming down. You will find another tower on your right that is covered in tomb rats. Kill until you find a sigil. Bring this back to X'Talin.

He will then tell you it belongs to Arzen and ask you to kill him. To get to Arzen, go down the tower and head up the hill you see when you come out the door (it's directly behind the tower). At the top you will get a pop-up asking to shout his name; do so. Arzen appears coming up the hill. Kill him and take the paper you find back to X'Talin. The Dragoon tells you what a good gnome you are and sends you back to Grear.

Grear wants you to go find Guryon and get the collar off his dog. Run back to the river and swim down past the Dragoon and the tomb rat towers. A bit further down you will see a green tent on the right. Run around this area until a pop-up appears. If it says they aren't there, leave a little distance and keep coming back until they appear. Once they appear, be sneaky and kill the dog, Grim, outside. If you're lucky, you will not aggro the humanoids. Take the collar back to Grear.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Speak with Grear once again and he starts talking about dark elves. You must go to Neriak. To get to Neriak, go to the river and swim down it until you get to an area with a red tent on the right and fungus cockroaches on the left. Head east from here. Eventually you will see it in the distance. Outside Neriak you will see a small camp. This is where the coachman and Captain V'Ekelos are.

Sign the coach and go into the green tent at the end. V'Ekelos wants you to go inside Neriak and do an errand for a man in a bar. To find the bar, go into Neriak and when you get to the main hall (right after the bridge) make a right through the doorway. Enter the next room and there will be a big yellowish tavern. Talk to the guy at the back; he will want you to kill tavern rats. You need to kill the "tavern rat breeder" and bring its tail back to him. The placeholder for this rat is just outside the last room on the bottom.

He then sends you back outside to the Captain. Next you get to go to Freeport. V'Ekelos wants you to buy him some nightshade from Merchant Gilgash. You can find Gilgash in the big building by the docks; he's in the bottom part. Take this back to the captain. Now he tells you some sob story and wants you to kill Helthea at Pilgrims Inn. Coach back to Freeport. Go out the North Gate and follow the road north; it winds through the desert and then the area turns green. The path looks like it's about to split; take the right-hand path and you will come across an Inn. Walk up to the doorway and a pop-up will appear. Then Helthea appears. She won't aggro you until you hit her. Kill her and take the proof back to Captain V'Ekelos in Neriak.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Grear is sending you to Captain V'Ekelos for another quest. V'Ekelos babbles something about some hatestone and wants you to go talk to the Ghostly Mage to find out where it is.

Lore on Ghostly Mage: Zelthil J'Narus utterly annihilated a mage called Surxal, and Surxal's spirit roams the Duelers Crest in Collonridge Cemetery. Known as the "Ghostly Mage," this spirit is bound to do the will of J'Narus.

To find this mage, go west from the tent with the captain, cross the river, go past the red tent with Jarek and keep an eye out for a big hill on the right. Go up this hill and you will see many undead. Look for a big white ghost. Talk to the Ghostly Mage (don't attack, he's Level 35) and he will tell you the hatestone is on Croc Island in Freeport.

Coach to Freeport. To get to Croc Island, follow the shore south until you get to the Whale Bones. Look west; that island is where you want to be. I recommend using invisibility. Run around the southern side of the island. You should see a big conical rock. Around this you will get a message that a guy named Croc probably has the hatestone. You need to go to Highpass to meet an old friend to coerce Croc out of his hidey hole.

There is no really easy fast way to get to Highpass the first time unless you know a high-level wizard, so you have to run. If you go west from Freeport, you will eventually come across a large mountain in the Tomb of Kings area. Follow this north and go around it to the other side. Start heading back south. You will need to go southwest a little ways until you get to Bastable Village zone. Once there, head west. You should find a road that leads to Highpass. Sign the coach. Talk to Foonklim upstairs; he will want 600 tunar to draw out Croc. Pay him and he will tell you to meet him at the Whale Bones in Freeport. Coach back to Freeport and meet him at the Whale Bones. He will slowly swim out to the island and taunt Croc into coming out of his house. You will most likely need help to kill Croc. Once you have the hatestone, take it back to Captain V'Ekelos. He then sends you back to Grear.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
1. The Dark Elves are asking for help again. Travel to Fort Seriak and speak with Denouncer S'Kor. He sends you to kill Ghoul Captain (CONs DB) on the island in the center of Lake Nerius. The Ghoul Captain walks a path between Castle and dock. Kill and loot the quest items; you may need to kill several times for the needed loot to drop. Return to Denouncer T'Skor.
2. Talk to Elder Gregor at Collonridge Cemetery. He's located at the top of the first tower when you walk in the front door. Invis and wait for Gregor. There are three DB skeletons and a whole bunch of different Elders.
3. Elder Gregor sends you to kill the Elder of Hodstock (CONs Yel). Hodstock is in the western part of Hodstock & Tembly. Kill, loot record, return to Elder Gregor.
4. Return to Castle Felstar and kill Captain Holberg (CONs DB). He is a trigger spawn and shows up when you walk in the right spot.
5. Return to Denouncer T'Skor.
Klick A'non.Rogue:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva wants you to get a Junker's Tunic. Get one from Merchant Folsop for free and return to gain level 2.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva sends you to Spiritmaster Ula who binds you and sends you to Coachman Rizkar. He signs you in and sends you back to Briva for experience.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Mistress Briva asks you to kill bats and return to her with two pieces of bat meat. Your reward is experience and a **Scroll of Sneak**.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Junker Plim 
Plim will make you a new weapon if you bring him the following items:
- Iron Ore - Purchase from Merchant Folsop
- Copper Spring - Purchase from Merchant Samwe
- Rat Whisker
- Cracked Ant Pincer

Your reward is experience and a **Footpad's Shank**.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva sends you to get a stunned mindwhipper. Head out the west gate, turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW); you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CONs Red). May need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Talk to Mistress Briva for this quest. She tells you to go out and collect four Size 3 Whirlygigs. They are found on Model III clockworks in the junk heap next to Merchant Folsop's shop. Clockworks will be there, but if you kill them, the Model III clockworks will eventually spawn. All the clockworks in this area are level 7 and do not cause any negative faction. Not all of the Model III clockworks will drop the Size 3 Whirlygigs, so you might have to kill more than 4 to gather the quest materials. Once you turn in the four Whirlygigs, you receive enough experience to level you, a new ability: **Acrobatics** (an Agility buff), and **Grease Stained Trousers**.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva sends you to investigate rumors of a foul magic in the works by a DELF named Jarek N'Toxis. Jarek lives in a red tent on the western bank of the River Saren, west of Neriak. He sends you to collect the pieces he needs to finish his experiment. You'll need the leg from a spikeshell crab found on the shore southeast of Neriak. Then grab a wing from the fungus cockroaches on the bank opposite Jarek. The mobs con white. Jarek uses the items to create a giant insect, which kills him and attacks you. Jarek's Creation cons yellow, and its drop is the evidence Briva wants. Reward: **556,000 XP** and a new shank.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva sends you to speak with Lady Furess U'Dedne in Neriak. You can find U'Dedne by reading the obelisks that mark the different houses in Neriak. U'Dedne directs you to Freeport to buy an antiqued bracelet from Merchant Gilgash and collect a package from Nalzik P'Thek. Waysender Ti'Thox will waysend you if you want. Gilgash and P'Thek are in the same building, but P'Thek says a courier named V'Ghen already picked up the package. U'Dedne tells you to go speak to Dragoon V'Ghen in a tower directly north of Neriak. The Dragoon points you to his brother in a tent by the tower. You must kill Valrean V'Ghen to obtain U'Dedne's chalice. Valrean cons yellow.

Reward: 100 Faction with House U'Dedne; 10 Faction with the Indigo Brotherhood; 10 Faction with Citizens of Neriak; **550,698 XP**; and **Night Breath Scroll**.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
Briva tells you that House N'Jarus in Neriak is impressed by your work for House U'Dedne. N'Jarus is moving to replace U'Dedne as 2nd house in Neriak. Speak to Zethil N'Jarus, who wants your help in planting an item in House U'Dedne. Purchase the **Lantern of Ages** from Merchant Gilgash in Freeport. Waysender Ti'Thox will waysend you if you like. To go with the lantern, Zethil needs a certain gem from the Final Thoughts that roam near the Crest of the Duelist in Collinridge Cemetery west of Neriak. Finally, Zethil needs the foot of an oriote raven directly south of Neriak. Both mobs are white-con casters. The Final Thoughts roam an area of high-agro undead, and the oriote ravens cluster despite their neutral con when you attack. The finished **Enchanted Lantern** you take to Lady Furess U'Dedne is a spying device.

Reward: **883,791 XP**; **Vaulter's Balance Scroll**; and **Junker's Tunic**.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Mistress Briva 
1. Talk to Briva, who sends you to Zethil J'Narus in Neriak.
2. Zethil sends you to Quartermaster T'Nak at Fort Seriak in Castle Felstar.
3. T'Nak wants a bribe of 1000 Tunar, then sends you to kill Courier B'Malin (CONs LB). To find the courier: Head to the River Saren (the North-South river west of Klick) in the eastern side of Collinridge Cemetery to intercept the courier. Kill, loot a runed cylinder, return to Zethil.
4. Zethil sends you to kill two (2) Groundskeepers.
4.1 Groundskeeper W'Lai (CONs Yel) in Collinridge (C) in the first chamber of the cemetery. Kill, loot finger.
4.2 Groundskeeper F'Redal (CONs Yel) in Castle Felstar (N) roams around. Kill, loot femur.
5. Return to Zethil, return to Briva for your reward.
Klick A'non.Warrior:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Captain Buntattle 
Buntattle asks you to get a Watchman's Tunic. Get one for free from Tailor Nokar and return to gain level 2.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Captain Buntattle 
Buntattle sends you to Spiritmaster Kettlemaw who binds you and sends you to Coachman Rizkar. He signs you in and sends you back to Buntattle for experience.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Captain Buntattle 
Buntattle wants you to learn how to fight. Head out of town and start killing bats until you get two bat wings and then return for experience and a **Scroll of Kick**.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Sergeant Grem 
Grem will make you a new weapon if you bring him the following items:
- An Oilstone - Purchase from Merchant Folsop
- A Gold Spring - Purchase from Merchant Samwe
- A Cracked rat tooth
- A Cracked Firefly Thorax

Your reward is a **Guard Sword**.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Captain Buntattle 
Buntattle sends you to get a stunned mindwhipper. Head out the west gate, turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW), you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CONs Red). May need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Captain Buntattle 
Captain Buntattle sends you to Rivervale to help fix the Windmills there. You must first visit Merchant Samwe and purchase the parts to fix the Windmills, which are a Gear Wheel for 38 tunar, a Gold Spring for 54 tunar, and a Metal Rod for 52 tunar. Take these and find Waysender Glowbop to get sent to Rivervale. Once there, head North to find a house with Zarene Earblower. Speak with her and she sends you to find her husband Zale Earblower. Zale can usually be found wandering between the Windmills that circle the lake in Rivervale. He gives you a **Scroll of Furious Defense** for delivering the items, and then asks if you would retrieve a torn page that was stolen from him by a Goblin Burglar. Goblin Burglars can be found west of the wall in the Misty Thicket. Return the page to him and take the waysender back to Klick'Anon. Speak with Captain Buntattle to receive your reward, **Buntattle's Greaves**.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Captain Buntattle 
Watchman Prit is missing and it is your job to find him. He was last seen in the vicinity of the Mindwhipper Hive in Klick'Anon. When you find Prit he is speaking in gibberish. Answer him back in gibberish and report your findings to Captain Buntattle. He tells you that Kettlemaw can help you with Prit. Tell Spiritmaster Kettlemaw about Prit's condition and he says that only Kettlemaw's Brew can help knock him out of his stupor. To make his specialty he requires three items: a Bottle (purchased from Grocer Guzzlewugs in Klick'Anon for 39 tunar), some digested mushrooms (found in the bellies of the Gorged Rats wandering around the mushroom patch just outside of the Southern Gatewall), and an Ant Chitin Section (dropped by Ant Soldiers and Ant Harvesters). Bring these items back to Kettlemaw to receive his brew, then head back to Prit and have him drink it. Prit tells you he is late for a meeting with Grabble, the gnome diplomat to Kara Village, west of Klick'Anon, and he asks if you'll go in his stead. Diplomat Grabble can be found in the tall building in the northeast corner of Kara Village. When you speak to him he confuses you for Prit, the expert on Mindwhipper wasps, and asks if you could retrieve a piece of the Mindwhipper Hive which has appeared south of Kara. These do not drop off of any mob in the area. You need only step inside the hive's entrance to be prompted to take a piece of the hive, so invisibility is a must. Return the piece to Diplomat Grabble and he asks you to take it to Sergeant Grem in Klick'Anon. Give Grem the hive piece and he rewards you with a **Metallic Ranseur**.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Sergeant Grem 
Sergeant Grem wants you to investigate a rumor of a new clockwork east of Klick'Anon with the model number II PE. If you can find it, get its metal frame so he can upgrade Klick'Anon's clockwork Watchmen. II PE can be found just south of the Rogue Clockwork's village. Retrieve and return the metal frame to Grem and he tells you to return east to find either the famed clockwork inventor Allister Fobblegrop or Sergeant Grem's niece, Psova Brinkbar, one of Fobblegrop's four assistants. Find Psova and she will tell you of Unit 1, the thinking clockwork built by Fobblegrop. Unit 1, believing Fobblegrop to be "flawed" had him escorted out of the Rogue Clockwork's village and taken to the mineshaft east of Klick'Anon, where you initially found Psova wandering and confused. She and the other assistants were attacked by Rogue Clockwork rats and spiders. She saw one of her comrades fall, but knows not what has happened to the others. If you can retrieve Schematic pages 1 and 2 from the Rogue Clockwork rats and spiders, she thinks she may be able to stop the Rogue Clockworks altogether. Return the pages to her and she tells you that she needs the toolbox of her fellow assistant Camwe Gearcrafter. He was last seen heading south away from the conflict with the Rogue Clockworks. Follow the mountain range east of Psova south. A little further south of the end of the mountain range is a circle of standing stones with an eerie green glow about them. Amongst them you will find the undead remains of Camwe. Defeat the undead Camwe and retrieve his toolbox.

Return to Psova and relay the fate of Camwe to her. She is upset but knows that with the help of others she will be able to put an end to this Rogue Clockwork menace. Hand in Camwe's toolbox and you'll receive your reward, a **Scroll of Rapid Strike**, which is the upgraded version of the level 1 ability Quick Strike.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Sergeant Grem 
1. Talk to Teka Harnswoof (next to Master Minka). He sends you to talk to Psova, out the east gate along the mountains.
2. Psova sends you to the clockwork village to kill a Patrol Droid XJ5 (CONs Yel), kill, loot shield, return to Psova.
3. Psova sends you to find Allister's journal. Go to Collinridge Cemetery, find the signpost, walk up to it and read it to find the journal. To find the cemetery, go out the west gate of Klick, go west past the river, look for a building with undead all around. Be careful getting to the building, lots of reds and yellows in the area. Return to Psova.
4. Psova sends you to Zale in Rivervale, give him the book and he sends you to talk to his wife.
5. Zale's wife sends you to kill a mushroom man, who drops a myconid stalk. Go out the east gate of Rivervale and head east to Kithcor Forest (E), kill, loot, return to Zale's wife. Return Zale. Return to Psova.
6. Psova sends you back to Teka Harnswoof.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Captain Buntattle 
1. Talk to Captain Buntattle, he sends you to Snafizter. To find Snafizter: Coach to Feyspire and head west into the zone of Snafizter's House (SW). You'll see an observatory area on the top of a mountain range; continue west along this mountain until you come to a house with mechanical legs.
2. Snafizter sends you to Merchant Bryant in Mordahim to buy Mordahim ore. To find Bryant: Coach to Mordahim, Bryant is in one of the houses on the same street that the coachman is. The ore costs 640 tunar. Return to Snafizter.
3. Snafizter sends you to kill Prophet Grug (CONs DB to WHT?), an Orc, who is located in the caves of The Druk. Thedruk caves can be located by following the South road out of Fayspires. When you reach the bridge, follow the river south until it ends. The cave will be visible from the river's end. Prophet Grug is located at the bottom of the cave on the east side. Kill, loot bracers, return to Snafizter. Return to Captain Buntattle.
4. Captain Buntattle sends you to Psova in Klick. To find Psova: Head out of the East Gate and make a sharp northeast turn along the mountain, follow the mountains until you come to what appears to be a mine shaft. Psova moves around a lot here.
5. Psova sends you to Barley Sowers in Bobble-by-Water. Barley can be found farming in the city across the bridge on the west side of the city.
6. Barley sends you to find some **Wailing Tree Root** to make the Hollowed Shaft. The wailing tree is northwest of Barley Sowser, in Green Rift (NE). Enter the northern area of the Green Rift zone, head for the large tree, invis yourself and enter the underground passageway. You do not have to kill anything to get the root; go north until you enter the second chamber, you'll get a message saying that you found some Wailing Tree Root. Avoid Root Spirits. In the second chamber, pull a root and return to Barley, then back to Psova.
7. Psova sends you to kill Unit 1 in Rogue Clockworks. Head east from Psova to Rogue Clockworks, get invis and enter the Clockworks village. Unit 1 is towards the back in a house with two guards. Kill, loot log, return to Captain Buntattle.

**Path 1:** Bellow - Increases health & heals instantly and also a one-handed runework axe. Bellow increases your hit points by 300 and heals 300.

**Path 2:** Pillar of Might - Increases AC and taunts target and also a runework poleaxe. Pillar of Might is a major taunt and self AC buff for a short period of time.
Klick A'non.Wizard:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Professor Pansoof sends you to Tailor Nokar for a Student's Uniform. Return to Professor Pansoof for your experience to level 2.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Professor Pansoof sends you to see Spiritmaster Hansel to bind. Then see Coachman Rikzar who will sign you up on the stable list, return to Professor Pansoof for your experience.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Pansoof wants you to go out and hunt snakes and bring back two ruined snake scales. Your reward is experience and a Scroll of Arcand Bindings.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Professor Cranslip  
Cranslip will make you a new staff if you bring him the following items:  
- Bottle - Purchase from Grocer Guzzlewugs  
- Small Gear - Purchase from Merchant Samwe  
- Ruined Bat Wings  

Your reward is experience and a Wizard's Staff.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Professor Panslip  
Panslip sends you to get a stunned mindwhipper. Head out the west gate, turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW), you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CONs Red). May need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Professor Pansoof asks you to buy three gear wheels and bring them to Zarene Earblower in Rivervale. Buy the gear wheels from Merchant Samwe and then speak to Waysender Glowbap who will teleport you to Rivervale. Give the gears to Zarene and she will ask you to help out Zale Earblower. Zale asks you to help get back a bag that was stolen by thieves. Head into Misty Thicket and find the Goblin Burglers. They are northwest of the city gate. They will eventually drop a worn bag. Bring this back to Zale. Then go to Waysender Windfoot to teleport back to Klick'Anon and talk to Pansoof for your reward. You will receive a Scroll of Burning Flame and Pansoof's Pantaloons.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
Pansoof asks you to go help out Hosco Brixwak at the Dam. Hosco asks you to get him the items he needs to fix the dam. He sends you to Watchman Jenkins at the southeast gate who tells you about a strange clockwork he saw. The Strange Clockwork can be found to the south and it drops a Lava Vent Piece. Bring that back to Brixwak.  
He next wants you to go talk with Darela Lightfoot, who lives in Kara Village and get some Pixie Dust. She will give it to you if you first bring her a Mindhipper Venom Sac. This drops from either Mindwhipper Drones or Frenzied Hunter Wasps, both of which spawn to the south of the village. Return with it and she will give you the Pixie Dust.  
Bring the dust back to Hosco and he will give you a Mechanastaff and a note for Pansoof. Return to Pansoof for experience.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Professor Cranslip  
Talk to Prof. Cranslip to start the quest. She tells you to go get a master gear from a Model II PE clockwork east of Klick'Anon. Go out the east gate and go southeast into Rogue Clockwork zone. There should be a tall mountain range there. Go around it to the south and then go east toward the clockwork town, you should see the Model II PE's walking around. The Model II PE's are level 15. Loot a master gear from one and return to Prof. Cranslip.  
Give Prof. Cranslip the master gear. She then says to find Allister Fobblegrob or Psova Brinkbar east near clockworks. Go out east gate and go east along left wall until you get to a collapsed mine. Psova Brinkbar is near the mine in northwest Rogue Clockwork zone. She wants you to get 2 drained clockwork batteries from the clockwork rats and spiders near clockwork town. Go southeast from mine to the mountain. Climb around the mountain by going south, you will then see the clockwork town to the east. The rat and spider clockworks are level 13 to 15. Loot 2 drained clockwork batteries from them and return to Psova. Give her the batteries and she then says to find Camwe Gearcrafter and get her balance. Go south from the mine. Camwe Gearcrafter is in southwest Rogue Clockwork zone near a bunch of glowing green rocks. Camwe Gearcrafter is level 16. Loot Camwe's balance and return to Psova. Give Psova the balance and you get 550,698 exp and the spell scroll Element Guard.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Professor Cranslip  
Talk to Prof. Cranslip to start the quest. She sends you out to talk to Psova again. Psova wants you to get armor from patrol drone XJ5. Go to the entrance of clockwork town in Rogue Clockwork zone and wait for the patrol drone XJ5 to come out of town so you don't have everybody in town jumping on you. Wait until it comes all the way out and then attack it and loot the armor. The patrol drone XJ5 cons yellow at 16.  
Return to Psova and give her the armor. She then tells you to look for Allister Fobblegrop and get his book titled Autonomy Theory, and to look southwest toward the haunted cemetery south of Klick'Anon. Go southwest into Collinridge Cemetery zone. Outside of the big building in the north part of the zone is a stone marker. Target the marker and read it. Choose look for the book and you will get the Autonomy Theory book. I recommend that you put on invis before you go into the Collinridge zone, you can read the stone marker while invisible.  
Return to Psova and give her the book. She then asks you to take a note (Psova's battle plans) to Zale Earblower in Rivervale.  
Coach to Bobble By Water then to Rivervale. If you did not register at the Bobble By Water coach and Rivervale coach you will have to walk. Give the battle plans to Zale Earblower near the windmill at the other exit from Rivervale across the lake from where you came in from the coach. Zale says he needs time to read the battle plans and to go talk to his wife Zarene.  
Zarene Earblower is in the northwest part of town in the building north of the bank. Zarene tells you to get sap from a Kithicor Myconid and tells you to look in North Kithicor east of Loreth Kith.  
Go out the exit next to where Zale is standing and follow the road northeast, at an intersection go north or east you want to get to the central to north part of North Kithicor zone. You will then come to a village. The Kithicor Myconid is just to the east of the village. Attack and loot a Kithicor Myconid sap. The Kithicor Myconid cons yellow at 16.  
Return to Rivervale and give Zarene the sap. She gives you the Shocking Gaze spell scroll and tells you to go back and talk to Zale. Go back to Zale and talk to him. He gives you back the battle plans and tells you to give the plans back to who wrote them.  
Coach to Bobble By Water then to Klick'Anon, or use return home spell if you are bound in Klick'Anon. Then return to Psova and give her the battle plans. She gives you Psova's Robe and says to return to your professor. Go and talk to Prof. Pansoof and you will get 883,971 exp.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Professor Pansoof  
1. Talk to Professor Pansoof in Klick'Anon, he sends you to Snafitzer. To find Snafitzer: From Klick, coach to Fay, then coach to Teth. If you don't have Teth coach, just run/swim from Fay coach west till you see an Elf tree-city (Teth) head towards it, once at Teth look for the only ground building, that is the coach. From Teth coach, head directly west from the coach till you see a huge mountain telescope on top (Gnome Observatory). Snafitzer's tree-house (Snafitzer's House (SW)) is on the west side of that mountain.  
2. Snafitzer sends you to Mordheim to buy some Mordheim Ore from Merchant Brant at a cost of 640 tunar. Merchant Brant is near the coach, in a building and upstairs. Mordheim coach is outside of the city's main entrance and past the quarry. Return to Snafitzer.  
3. Snafitzer sends you to kill Prophet Grug (CONs Yel) for his Boot! Grug is located in a cave at The Druk (C). Enter the tunnel, head down to the bottom. As you make your way through the tunnels and you begin to head UP again, you went too far! In fact, when you reach the first ramp heading up, stop, look to the right, you will see a ramp going down, at the bottom of that ramp is Grug. Return back to Snafitzer. Return to Professor Pansoof.  
4. Pansoof sends you to Psova. To find Psova; from Klick coach, head out the west exit. Once outside of the west exit, make a sharp left (north) turn along the mountains, soon, you will see a mineshaft, Psova roams near it!  
5. Psova wants Hollow Shaft from Barley Sowser in Bobble-By-Water. To find Barley; from BBW coach make your way to the most western part of BBW, Barley is in farming field.  
7. Barley wants a Wailing Root. To find this Wailing Root; From Barley, head west to the Green Rift zone, when you come upon the rift canyon head north, soon in the distance you will see a very large tree (the Wailing Tree). At the bottom of the tree is a tunnel entrance, enter it. Inside the tunnels are lots of undead mobs (CONs from LB to yellow at 20), most don't see invis, but Root Spirits does! As you enter the tunnel make a left turn, make your way past two or three large rooms, in the second or third room you will get a POPUP message, pluck the root and it's in your inventory. FYI; festering roots from Root Spirit is not what you want! You may need to bring help the mobs swarm and have large agro ranges. Inside the tunnels, there are no safe places to die and Rez back too. Return to Barley. Return to Psova.  
8. Psova sends you to the Clock Work Village to kill Unit 1 (CONs yel). To Find Clock Work Village; from Klick coach, head out the east exit, head east till you reach a large mountain. Head up the side of the mountain till you can go no further, then run south along the mountain, all the while trying to turn east again, soon you will be able to head east, do so, as soon as you do, head north along the mountain, you will see the Clock Work Village. To find Unit 1; From the entrance to Clock Work Village, head diagonally to your left, go to the last hut on the left in the corner, this is where Unit 1 will be. Unit 1 is triggered spawn and may have a placeholder, which will be the mob in the center and in the back. If you have invis, you can reach the hut with no trouble. Also, if you see yourself dying, run behind that hut in the corner and die there, then you can rez back safely! Most mobs are LB. Loot the Specs from Unit 1. Return to Psova. Return to Pansoof.  
9. Speak to Professor Pansoof again and you will receive the choice of one of two spells with an item, which are Burning Clash (DD and Low Aggro) with a 2h Staff or Mental Focus (Power regeneration over time) with 1h Wand.

Moradhim.Cleric:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Bishop Gundar  
Bishop Gundar asks you to purchase an Acolyte Robe. Merchant Dondi will give you one for free. Reward: **430 XP**.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Huldor  
Huldor sends you to Spiritmaster Bico, who binds you and then sends you to Coachman Doba. Reward: **2,200 XP**.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Huldor  
Leave the city and hunt badgers. Return three pieces of badger meat to Spellsmith Huldor as part of your training. Reward: **6,900 XP** and a **Minor Blessing Scroll**.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Huldor  
Spellsmith Doldanaf will make you a new weapon. You need:  
- Block of ore - Purchase from Armorer Origson  
- Crafted Handle - Purchase from Tailor Chloe  
- Spiderling Leg  
- Chipped Raven Beak

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Huldor  
Spellsmith Huldor wants you to help him slay the frosteye shamen in the area.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Ulla  
1. Talk to Ulla, who sends you to Raldir. From the Moradim gates, take a right (west) and follow the zone-wall. After passing the first icy river, you will see Raldir standing next to a tree.  
2. Talk to Raldir, then return to Ulla.  
3. Ulla sends you to kill the Red Eyed Monster (CONs Wht-Yel) northwest of town, across the river. Kill it, loot the item, and return to Ulla.  
4. Ulla flags you for the kill. Return to Raldir to cure him. He gives you a note. Return to Ulla.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Ulla  
1. Talk to Ulla, who sends you to Bren Raven in Diren's Hold (west of Moradhim, inside the fort, second floor of the tower).  
2. Bren Raven sends you to kill a Goblin Alchemist, loot the cure, and return.  
3. Bren Raven sends you to talk to Leader Jarvan Tember of the stronghold on the mountain near Diren's Hold.  
4. Jarvan Tember sends you to kill Marauders inside a dark tower/spire near Diren's Hold. Loot a key.  
5. Talk to Amber and free her, then return to Jargon for your rewards.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Ulla  
1. Talk to Ulla, who sends you to Baga Village to kill guards until one drops an Oversized Claw. Return to Ulla.  
2. Ulla sends you to a named NPC in the Enclave of the Bear. From Baga Village, follow the south mountain west then east to reach the cave entrance.  
3. Talk to the named NPC, who sends you to a halfling prisoner.  
4. The halfling wants to make a bet; pay 225 tunar if you lose.  
5. Return to Ulla for your rewards.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Ulla  
1. Ulla sends you to Kairan in Chiasta (Shon-To Monastery zone). Follow the coach east, then across the lake and through the tunnel to the village.  
2. Kairan requires a Seisen Gi from a Voidfist or Ironskin. Retrieve it and return to Kairan.  
3. Kairan gives you a key to the arcane chest in the Monastery. Retrieve the contents and return to Kairan.  
4. Kairan gives a letter to deliver to Ulla.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Spellsmith Ulla  
1. Ulla sends you to Elder Joram in Halas (in the bank).  
2. Joram sends you to destroy the Orb of Parathior in the Freezeblood Goblin underwater caves west of Halas. Swim to the throne room, defeat mobs, retrieve the Orb, and return to Joram.  
**NOTE:** To find the caves, follow the frozen lake with two igloos, then the cleft in the mountains.  
**NOTE:** To find the throne room, swim underwater, go through the tunnels, defeat Berserkers, then multiple goblins, including the Goblin King.  
3. Joram sends you to Belgar Karakson in Moradhim to collect two pages of Karak's Research from Orc Acolytes and Orc Prophets in The Druk. Return to Joram.  
**NOTE:** Belgar Karakson is in the mushroom room in Moradhim's Residential District.  
**NOTE:** Orcs are in the cave, turn right at the first passage, follow to the bottom.  
4. Joram sends you to kill a Goldfeather Aviak (CONs Yel) near Goldfeather Erie (C). Loot and return to Joram.  
5. Joram teleports you to Mt. Hatespike to crush the Orb of Parathior in lava tubes. Teleport back to Joram.  
6. Joram sends you back to Belgar Karakson in Moradhim to turn in the pages for your final reward.
Moradhim.Paladin:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Ungrist the Prophet  
Ungrist sends you to buy a Dwarvan Burial Shroud from Merchant Domdi. Return to the Prophet who will send you to Doomwalker Gazad.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Doomwalker Gazad  
Doomwalker Gazad sends you to Spiritmaster Bico, who then sends you to Coachman Doba in the stables. Return to Bico, return to Gazad.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Doomwalker Gazad  
Doomwalker Gazad wants some Slashed Pawn Belts from Frosteye Runts.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Spellsmith Doldanaf  
Doldanaf will craft you a weapon if you return the following items:  
Cracked Snake Fang - Snake  
Chipped Raven Beak - Crow  
Block of Ore - Armorer Origson  
Crafted Handle - Merchant Erfila

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Doomwalker Gazad  
Doomwalker Gazad wants a talisman from the Frosteye Shamans. They are found to the northwest from the city. Follow the mountains to the north/northeast, when you come upon the first river follow it westernly, not too far, start scanning the hills for shamans! Kill, loot, return to Gazad.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Doomwalker Foria  
1. Talk to Foria who sends you to Logger Kripp outside the city. He's found in a house on the road.  
2. Kripp sends you to kill The Red Eyed Monster (CONs Wht-Red), which is found northwest of town, right across the river. If you follow the mountains to the North/Northeast, when you come across the first river, just past that you will see a lone Guard Rivalrd(SP?). Right behind the Guard you will see a darkened area, which the game calls a frozen lake. The darkened area is the area to look.  
Kill, loot his eye and an Axelogger Family Ring, return to Logger Kripp.  
3. Return to Foria with the eye.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Doomseeker Foria  
1. Talk to Foria, who sends you to Bren Raven, who is located west of Moradhim, in Diren's Hold, inside the fort, go all the way back, on the second floor of the tower.  
2. Bren Raven sends you to kill Frosteye Lurkers, which can be found northeast of the hold, near the small river. You may need to kill a few Frosteyes to get the Lurkers to spawn. Kill, loot blow gun, return to Bren Raven.  
3. Bren Raven sends you to Jarvan Tember, who can be found way up on top of that tall hill next to Diren's Hold Fort.  
4. Jarvan Tember sends you to kill some Marauders, very near Diren's Hold, head eastish, look for a dark tower/spire; the Marauders are inside. There are 3 of them! You may need a group for this part. Kill, loot key!  
5. With the key set Amber free, she's the little wolf. Return to Jargon for your rewards.

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Doomwalker Foria  
1. Talk to Foria, who sends you to Baga Village to kill guards. From Mordadhim, head due south, from the coach, to Baga Village zone. Find the village and kill guards at the gate until one drops an Oversized Claw. Loot, return to Foria.  
2. Foria sends you to a Named-human-NPC in the Enclave of the Bear. Before you go, get 225 tunar! From Baga Village, follow the south mountain (from the back-side of Baga). It will wind West and East a little. It's in the SOUTH part of the Baga Village zone. You will see a ranger tree-tower outside the cave entrance. -OR- To find the Enclave run straight through Baga and follow the mountains to your left all the way. At the end of the mountains is the cave entrance to the Enclave.  
3. Enter the cave and scan around for the NPC. Talk to the Named-human-NPC, he sends you to a halfling held prisoner in his cave.  
4. The Halfling Prisoner wants to make a bet, do so, if you lose you will need to pay him 225 tunar. He tells something about Sensei Monks.  
5. Return to Doomwalker Foria for your rewards.

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Doomwalker Foria  
1. Foria sends you to Kairan in the hidden village due east of Moradhim, which is Shon-to Monastery zone. Head out to the coach, and then turn directly East and follow that path until you come to a lake. You will be in the Shon-To Monastery Zone. Across the lake, you will see a tunnel that you have to go through. On the other side of the tunnel is the village Chiasta. From the tunnel entrance on the other side, you will want to head south/southeast, and look for an oriental-looking building. Kairan will be on the left side.  
2. Kairan says you must retrieve a Seisen Gi from a Voidfist or Ironskin, before he will trust you. These monks are found in the lower level of the Seisen Monastery a little northwest of Moradhim. At the tunnel entrance, head northwest, you will see the Shon-to on top of the mountains across the lake. Enter Shon-to, follow hallways till you come across the Voidfist or Ironskins. Invis helps some, but not 100%. Kill till they drop the Sensei Gi. Return to Kairan with the Sensei Gi.  
3. Kairan gives you a key to the arcane chest located at the bottom of the Monastery where you got the Gi. Return to the Monastery and retrieve the contents of the chest, (Talk to the chest and open it) bringing them back to Kairan. To find the chest: enter Shon-to, make first right, make way down the ramps. CON around for the chest. You will need to kill the Voidfist or Ironskins that are near! Return to Kairan.  
4. Kairan will then give you a letter to give to Foria.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Ungrist the Prophet  
1. Ungrist (Dwarf Paladin Guild Master) sends you to Elder Joram in Halas. Joram is in the bank.  
2. Joram sends you to destroy the Orb of Parathior that is in the Freezeblood Goblin's underwater caves, due west of Halas. The Orb is located in Ikcil's throne room in a locked chest. Make your way to the throne room, and keep killing mobs until a Treasurer appears. Kill him and loot his key, then CON/TALK to the locked chest to open it, get the Orb. Return to Joram.  
***NOTE*** To find the Freezeblood Goblin's underwater caves, due west of Halas: Head west until you get to a frozen lake that has two (2) igloos on it. Ahead and a little to your right, you will see a pair of Guard Towers. Ahead and to your left, you will see a cleft in the mountains. Turn towards the cleft, keeping the igloos on your left, and the guard towers on your right. After a short run, you will come to a little lake that has a lot of floating ice on it. If you look to the left side of the lake, at the bottom of the lake, you will see a white dot. The cave entrance is underwater in a river.  
***NOTE*** To find the throne room: Swim underwater and go in the entrance. Go through the little entrance, then turn right and go through the short ice tunnel. You will be in a room with 2 Berserkers, there will also be a small pond in the middle of the room. Kill the Berserkers, and go down the passageway they are guarding. This leads to another room full of Goblins, that should con white or yellow to you at level 20. Kill them, but do not loot the bodies, as they have a fast respawn rate. Go through the very short tunnel to the left as you enter the room, to another room; where you must again kill the mobs, without looting. To the left, is a tunnel leading down into a room. In this room, you will find the Goblin King and his chest, as well as multiple goblin Clerics, and Mystics, all of which are casters.  
3. Joram sends you to Belgar Karakson, who is in Moradhim. This Belgar Karakson sends you to kill Orc Acolytes and Orc Prophets at the bottom of the caves in The Druk (C ). Keep killing till you get two (2) pages of Karak's Research (Pages 1 and 2) to drop! Return to Joram.  
***NOTE*** To find This Belgar Karakson: In Moradhim, go into the city. Make your way to the mushroom room, then follow the path in the North side of the wall, leading you into the Residential District in Moradhim. Belgar Karakson is in the last house to the right.  
***NOTE*** To find the Orc Acolytes and Orc Prophets to kill: Enter the cave, turn right at the first passage and follow it down to the bottom. You should come to a room that has 2 Orc Prophets, and a Prophet named Grug in it. This is the area.  
4. Joram sends you to kill a Goldfeather Aviak (CONs Yel), From Moradhim coach, run along the mountains north, soon you will see Aviaks and their city (Goldfeather Erie (C )). Kill, loot a goldfeather, return to Joram.  
5. Joram now knows how to destroy the orb, he gives you a teleport gem (for the return trip) and teleports you into Mt. Hatespike. Go to the lava tubes and CON/TALK to the tubes, crush the feather over the orb then drop the Orb into the lava. Teleport back to Joram.  
6. Joram sends you back to that Belgar Karakson in Moradhim. Give to Belgar Karakson the pages you got in the mines and he gives you your reward.  
**Choice:**  
(A) Warhammer and the ability to transfer some AC to another player.  
(B) Warblade and a Taunt that enhances your AC for 12 seconds.

Moradhim.Warrior:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** General Oxfist  
Oxfist wants you to get a Recruit Tunic. You can get it from Merchant Dora for free.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Sergeant Fortug  
Fortug sends you to see Spiritmaster Codwin, who binds you and sends you off to Coachman Doba.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Sergeant Fortug  
Sergeant Fortug wants you to learn how to fight. Head out of town and start killing rats and return when you have three strands of rat fur.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Sergeant Gordison  
Gordison will fashion you a new weapon. He needs you to bring him the following items:  
- Block of Ore - Purchase from Armorer Origson  
- Leather Strip - Purchase from Tailor Chloe  
- Ruined Bat Wing  
- Flattened Tarantula Eye - drops from any spider

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Sergeant Fortug  
Fortug wants you to slay the frosteye shamen that are in the area. Head north/northwest along the mountain, at the first river, follow it westward. Scan hilltops for shamans!

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Lieutenant Adessa  
1. Talk to Adessa, who sends you to Logger Kripps, who can be found on the second floor of the first little house West of Coachman Doba.  
2. Kripp sends you to kill the Red Eyed Monster (CONs wht)  
3. Head north/northwest along the mountains, cross the first river and start scanning for a lone Guard Rivalrd (SP?).  
4. Talk to the guard, has you kill the monster. A red eyed rat will spawn close by you. Kill and loot ALL items. Talk to guard again. Return to Adessa.  
5. Adessa sends you to Kripp, then return to Adessa. Now you delete whatever items the quest didn't need.

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Lt. Addessa  
1. Talk to Lt. Addessa, who sends you to Bren Raven, who is located west of Moradhim, in Diren's Hold, inside the fort, on the second floor of the tower.  
2. Bren Raven tells you that the Frosteye Orcs have teamed up with the Freezeblood Goblins of the north to combine in attacking DH. Their main objective is to use Goblin Sappers to destroy the dam that controls the flow of the small river next to DH. If you can kill a Goblin Sapper and retrieve the Lore item on him, the barbarian will be able to reinforce the dam from further attacks. The Goblin Sappers are just north of DH. Kill, loot the lore item, return to Bren.  
3. Bren Raven sends you to Jarvan Tember, who can be found way up on top of that tall hill next to Diren's Hold Fort.  
4. Jarvan Tember sends you to kill some Marauders, the Marauders are very near Diren's Hold, head eastish, look for a dark tower/spire, the Marauders are inside. There are 3 of them! You may need a group for this part. Kill, loot key!  
5. With the key set Amber free, she's the little wolf. Return to Jargon for your rewards.
