In this room, you will find the Goblin King and his chest, as well as multiple goblin Clerics, and Mystics, all of which are casters.  
3. Joram sends you to Belgar Karakson, who is in Moradhim. This Belgar Karakson sends you to kill Orc Acolytes and Orc Prophets at the bottom of the caves in The Druk (C ). Keep killing till you get two (2) pages of Karak's Research (Pages 1 and 2) to drop! Return to Joram.  
***NOTE*** To find This Belgar Karakson: In Moradhim, go into the city. Make your way to the mushroom room, then follow the path in the North side of the wall, leading you into the Residential District in Moradhim. Belgar Karakson is in the last house to the right.  
***NOTE*** To find the Orc Acolytes and Orc Prophets to kill: Enter the cave, turn right at the first passage and follow it down to the bottom. You should come to a room that has 2 Orc Prophets, and a Prophet named Grug in it. This is the area.  
4. Joram sends you to kill a Goldfeather Aviak (CONs Yel), From Moradhim coach, run along the mountains north, soon you will see Aviaks and their city (Goldfeather Erie (C )). Kill, loot a goldfeather, return to Joram.  
5. Joram now knows how to destroy the orb, he gives you a teleport gem (for the return trip) and teleports you into Mt. Hatespike. Go to the lava tubes and CON/TALK to the tubes, crush the feather over the orb then drop the Orb into the lava. Teleport back to Joram.  
6. Joram sends you back to that Belgar Karakson in Moradhim. Give to Belgar Karakson the pages you got in the mines and he gives you your reward.

Neriak, Nektulos.Alchemist:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Raemiss D'Mariji  
Speak to Raemiss D'Mariji. He tells you to go purchase a charred uniform from Tailor Giliean who is at the Blue Flame Forge.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Raemiss D'Mariji  
Talk to Raemiss, he sends you to Spiritmaster Z'Tottl outside the Alchemist cottage. Spiritmaster Z'Tottl sends you to Coachman Lothi. Return to Raemiss.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Raemiss D'Mariji  
1. Talk to Raemiss, he sends you to Unsayra N'Voriss in the tent across from the house that Alchemists begin in.  
2. Unsayra sends you to go get a Broken Raven Feather and Ruined Snake Scale from Nektulos Forest and return.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Unsayra N'Voriss  
Talk to Unsayra N'Voriss in the tent across from the house that Alchemists begin in. She tells you to bring back a Cracked Raven Egg and a pair of Burlap Leggings from Tailor Soldark. Tailor Soldark can be found at the bottom of the ramp inside the entrance to Neriak. The leggings will cost you 105 Tunar.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Unsayra N'Voriss  
Talk to Unsayra in the tent across from the house that Alchemists begin in. She tells you to bring back a Bloodfeather from a Bloodfeather Raven. The Bloodfeather Ravens con red, and are found near the coast by firebats.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Unsayra N'Voriss  
Unsayra will send you after Zezilbe Veldinox who is headed to Klick'Anon. I found him by going through the south gate on the far side of the lake from the coach and heading in a southeast sort of direction. Veldinox roams on a hillside not far from the gate, and on a low hill between two mountains (Klick'Anon SE). She cons yellow to a Level 7 and was an easy kill for 2, however, she is surrounded by rats with DoT and lots of other mobs that also con yellow at Level 7. Also, be careful of the decaying skellies that con red and have a huge agro radius.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Unsayra N'Voriss  
Speak to Unsayra N'Voriss in the tent across from the house that Alchemists begin in. She asks you to find Madam Widow Silk from a Madam Widow. The Madam Widow can be found due south from the first mountain you see at the entrance ramp to Neriak. The Madam Widow cons yellow at Level 10.  
Speak again to Unsayra N'Voriss then go speak to Alaeith N'Voriss (Unsayra's Sister) who is an Enchanter and apprentice to the Enchanter's Guild Master. Bring her the Concentrated Widow Silk you got from Unsayra.  
Alaeith N'Voriss asks you to find the Animated Sorceress west of Neriak to kill her and bring back her skull. She's actually in the Collonridge Cemetery (NE) on top of a hill southwest of Tomb Rat Tower. She cons yellow.  
Bring the skull back to Alaeith and then take the Death Madam's stone she gives you back to Unsayra.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Unsayra N'Voriss  
Speak to Unsayra N'Voriss in the tent across from the house that Alchemists begin in. She tells you to speak with Master Torlin in the basement of the Blind Fish Tavern.  
Master Torlin wants you to go assassinate Metilosh U'Dedne and bring back some of his hair. He tells you to first go speak to Guard Dran outside Metilosh's cottage. He asks for 225 Tunar to introduce you to Metilosh. Metilosh tells you to get some wine from the crate at the top of the stairs. Give him the wine. Once he is poisoned, kill him and take the hair. He cons white. Unfortunately it does give you a negative faction hit. Return the hair to Master Torlin.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Master Torlin  
Talk to Torlin in the basement of the Blind Fish Tavern.  
Go to Black Swan Inn, speak to Dwarf Greble Blackrock. He wants a potion that will eat through wood beams like those in a mine. Head back to Master Torlin in Neriak to get the potion you need.  
Master Torlin tells you he needs 3 ingredients first to make the potion.  
Vefariss D'Mariji in the Alchemist Cottage will give you the Crassthorn Sap.  
The Giant Widow Spider can be found in the Central Collenridge Cemetery Zone and cons yellow/red at level 15.  
The Giant Leafcutter Ant is more tricky to find. It's found in Northern Kithicor (W). It's on a hill on the east side of a path. There were no other major landmarks to use as a point of reference. It cons yellow.  
Return these ingredients to Master Torlin. He will give you a Corrosive Solution to give to Greble Blackrock back at the Black Swan Inn.  
Bring back the Dwarven Mineral Salts to Torlin.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Master Torlin  
1.1 Talk to Master Torlin, he sends you to kill a Goblin Alchemist (CONs Yel) in Saerk's Tower (W). The Goblin Alchemist roams near a goblin camp. Kill, loot Scrying Powder.  
1.2 Now, run to The Green Rift (SW) and talk to Devik Gal'Saris, who stands among Dark Elfs in the city.  
2. Devik wants two items:  
2.1 [Wabeth Grass] Kill two (2) Wandering Herbalis (CONs Yel) for their Wabeth Grass drop. Wandering Herbalis roams in Mu Lin's Reach (NW, N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W). There seems to be only two roaming around at any given time. Kill two, loot two Wabeth Grass.  
2.2 [Pethoni Cactus Buttons] Kill two (2) Orc Gatherers (CONs Yel) for their Pethoni Cactus Buttons. Run to NorthernWestern Ro (NE, E, SW) desert, they roam around there. Kill two, loot two Pethoni Cactus Buttons, return to Devik. Return to Torlin.  
3. Torlin sends you to Glixin, in Bastable Village, to buy two potions, one with a red dot, and the other with a blue dot (cost 6000 Tunar). Buy, return to Torlin.  
4. Torlin asks you to choose which potion to use. Theory here: I THINK the red dot means damage path, and the blue dot means mana path. Choose one, then Torlin gives you the choice of a Mace and Mana Potion, or a Tome and an Explosive Potion.
Neriak, Nektulos.Cleric:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Theologist S'Tai  
S'Tai asks you to go buy a Nektulos Buckler. You can get it for free at Merchant Diziria.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Theologist S'Tai  
S'Tai will send you to talk to Spiritmaster Sharun, who binds you and sends you off to see Coachman Lothi.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Denouncer V'Thoth  
V'Thoth wants you to train your fighting skills. Head out of town and kill snakes and return with two ruined snake scales.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Denouncer V'Thoth  
Denouncer V'Thoth asks you to get a LEATHER STRIP and IRON ORE from MERCHANT ROKER at the Blue Flame Forge. She is the merchant located in the Blacksmith forge.  
You also need a ruined bat wing. (If you are reading this ahead of time get it while you are out on your Level 3 quest getting your snake scales).  
Return to Denouncer V'Thoth.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Denouncer T'Vhoth  
You are next asked to kill a fire bat and return with a torn fire bat wing. The Fire Bats are found in the hills north of Neriak. At level 5, you will need help to kill them.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Theologist S'Tai  
1. Talk to Theologist S'Tai, he sends you to Waysender T'Thox, who is outside of the Blind Fish Tavern. Give the note to Waysender T'Thox and he will teleport you to Freeport to talk to Dockmaster Endol.  
2. Endol is at the end of the dock you teleport to. He teleports you to the Hazinak Outpost.  
3. Find Denouncer R'Noxt, who is upstairs in a building, in the large courtyard. Denouncer R'Noxt gives you a report to take back to S'Tai.  
4. Dockmaster D'Eleth will teleport back to Freeport. He is at the end of the dock.  
5. Waysender Abodai will teleport back to Neriak. He is on the dock.  
6. Back in Neriak talk to S'Tai.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Theologist S'Tal  
1. Talk to Theologist S'Tal, he sends you to Dragoon X'Talin. To find him, go west to the river and follow it north. His tower will be on the right side of the river.  
2. X'Talin sends you to kill a Tomb Rat, and get an undead sigil. (Just follow the river back south and it will be on your right.) Bring the sigil back to X'Talin.  
3. X'Talin sends you to kill Arzen. To find Arzen, look directly north of the Dragoon's tower; there is a hill with rocks on top. When you go to the top of this hill, you'll get a popup. Kill, loot papers, return to X'Talin.  
4. X'Talin sends you back to Theologist S'Tal.  
5. Theologist S'Tal sends you to kill Xeruin (CONs Yel). From Neriak, go west until you hit the river, follow it north until it turns west. You will see an encampment of tents. Outside the tent will be a dog named Grim (CONs Wht). Kill Grim and Garyuon (CONs Yel) first, then kill Xeruin, loot ring, return to Theologist S'Tal.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Denouncer V'Thoth  
1. Talk to Denouncer V'Thoth, he sends you to Durinex U'Dedne.  
2. Durinex U'Dedne sends you to Forgun E'Phet, he is in the Double Dagger.  
3. Forgun E'Phet sends you to kill a Tavern Rat Breeder (CONs Wht to Yel?). Kill, loot tail.  
4. Durinex U'Dedne sends you to kill Thrun at Pilgrim's Inn, and to buy a Chalice of the Fallen from Merchant Gilgash at the Smiling Serpent Inn while in Freeport.  
**NOTE:** To find Pilgrim's Inn, go around the outside of Freeport until you see a road that starts heading north. Follow this road as it winds around and you will eventually come to the inn. This road will eventually lead you to Highpass, keep running to sign coach.  
5. Bring all this back to Durinex. Return to Denouncer V'Thoth.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Denouncer V'Thoth  
1. Talk to Denouncer V'Thoth, he sends you to Zethil N'Jarus north of the blacksmith. Take some tunar with you, you will need it in step 4.  
2. Zethil sends you to talk to the Ghostly Mage over in Collonridge Cemetery.  
Lore on Ghostly Mage: Zelthil J'Narus utterly annihilated a mage called Surxal, and Surxal's spirits roam the Duelers Crest in Collonridge Cemetery. Known as the "Ghostly Mage" this spirit is bound to do the will of J'Narus.  
To find the Ghostly Mage, head west from the ramp at Neriak. When you get to Jarek N'Toxis, head a bit north.  
3. Ghostly Mage sends you to Croc Island by Freeport to find his Hatestone Dust. From Freeport, head south down the coast until you get to the whale bones. Swim out to the island just off the coast (Freeport Croc Island). Wander around on the coast near the little shack until you get a popup (It can usually be found directly S, S/W of the hut, in the centre of a rock pillar and 3 trees (Northern Ro (SE))). It will tell you Croc is on the island. From here, you must travel to Grobb to hire trolls. In Grobb, find the troll camp right outside.  
4. Talk to Underlord Bugrish. Pay him to hire some trolls (I think you talk to him twice). Now you must go back to the whale bones by Freeport. Wait there until Grebarg shows up.  
5. Talk to Grebarg, he and the other trolls will begin to head towards Croc Island.  
**NOTE:** The trolls will ONLY KILL CROCODILES. They will not kill Croc himself.  
6. Kill Croc, loot Hatestone Dust, return to Zethil.  
7. Zethil will give you faction. Return to Denouncer V'Thoth.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Theologist S'Tai  
1. Talk to Theologist S'Tai in Neriak, who sends you to Denouncer T'Crit in Fort Seriak, located in the Collonridge Cemetery zone. T'Crit is located at the top of the main tower in the middle of the fort.  
2. Denouncer T'Crit sends you to kill Ghoul Captains (CONs DB) located where the dock meets the land. Kill, loot what your quest log says to loot. You may need to kill a few till your item drops. Return to Denouncer T'Crit.  
3. Denouncer T'Crit sends you to Elder Jerlusk in Collonridge Cemetery, he is found at the top of the tower located in the first area as you enter the cemetery. There are two rats, which guard the lower floor of the tower. At the top of the tower, there are four (4) spawn points; these can be occupied by Skeletons (CONs DB). Kill all until Elder Jerlusk spawns in the middle location. Talk to Elder Jerlusk.  
4. Elder Jerlusk sends you to kill an Elder (CONs Yel) in Hodstock, the Elder in a house guarded by a Guard. Hodstock is located west of the river Saren as you travel south from Neriak. You will pass through Bobble-by-Water zone along the way. You must wait until the guard walks away before attacking the Elder. This could take some time. Kill, loot book, return to Elder Jerlusk.  
5. Elder Jerlusk sends you to kill a named Captain back at the docks of the island. He will spawn in place of a Ghoul Captain as you approach. Kill and loot him, and return to Denouncer T'Crit for your reward.
Neriak, Nektulos.Enchanter:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Dominary K'Jartan, the Guildmaster  
K'Jartan asks you to go buy a Black Sash. You can get it for free at Merchant Kalosk; return to K'Jartan.  
Receive **430 XP**.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Dominary K'Jartan, the Guildmaster  
K'Jartan will send you to talk to Spiritmaster Rendor, who binds you and sends you off to see Coachman Lothi.  
To find the coach: Leave through the archway to the south. Turn east from the Blind Fish Tavern. Continue east through two archways until you come to a north/south junction. Follow the hall south. Continue south from there until you are outside the city and on a path. Follow that path. Find coachman Lothi on the path's south side, standing outside a tent.  
Return to K'Jartan.  
Receive **2,200 XP**.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Enchanter T'Crit  
Find T'Crit downstairs, behind the ramp and in the back room to the right.  
T'Crit wants you to go outside and kill bats. Return with two pieces of bat meat as proof of your deed to Enchanter T'Crit.  
*Note:* While you are outside, also collect the required item from a firefly for your Level 4 quest (Bible says: fractured thorax, but I thought it was a leg segment?).  
Receive **6,900 XP** and the **Crawling Skin Scroll**.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Enchanter T'Crit  
T'Crit asks you to get a few items in order to enchant you a new robe:  
- Buy a cloth yard and a spool of common thread from Merchant Kertal, across from the Blue Flame Forge.  
- Kill fireflies until you can loot a fractured firefly thorax or a leg segment (not sure which, READ YOUR QUEST LOG).  
Return to T'Crit with these supplies and receive: **17,000 XP** and the **Yellow Robe**.

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Enchanter T'Crit  
You are next asked to kill a fire bat and return with a torn fire bat wing. The Fire Bats are found in the hills outside north of Neriak. Some classes will find it hard to solo a firebat at level 5 (CON yel@lvl5), get help or level a bit first. Find, slay, and loot the torn bat wing from the Fire Bat and return to Enchanter T'Crit.  
Receive **36,500 XP** and the **Heavy Arms Scroll**.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Dominary K'Jartan  
1. K'Jartan needs you to retrieve a scroll from an operative working at the Hazinak Outpost. The operative's name is Counselor Du'Klot, and she works for the House of D'Eleth. Talk to Waysender T'Thox, who is outside of the Blind Fish Tavern (you will need 100 tunar to get to Freeport, and another 100 tunar to hire the waysender to get back) and he will teleport you to Freeport to talk to Dockmaster Endol.  
2. Endol is at the end of the dock - he will teleport you to the Hazinak Outpost. Sign the coach!  
3. Retrieve the scroll from Counselor Du'Klot at the Hazinak Outpost.  
4. Return to Dockmaster D'Eleth at the Hazinak docks, he'll send you to Freeport. In Freeport, hire Waysender Abodai to teleport you back to Neriak (or, after retrieving the scroll from Du'Klot, just RH and save yourself the waysender fee).  
5. Return the scroll to Dominary K'Jartan.  
Receive **157,474 XP**, the **Endure Arcane Scroll**, and the **Apprentice Boots**.

---

# Level 10: The Burnished Staff

**Starting NPC:** Dominary K'Jartan  
1. Talk to K'Jartan. He tells you that Xeruin Du'Klot has become a traitor to the cause. Find Xeruin Du'Klot and retrieve the ring given to her by Dominary K'Jartan. To find her, K'Jartan first sends you to speak with Dragoon X'Talin. To find him, go west to the river and follow it north. His tower will be on the north side of the river (on your right). Collonridge Cemetery (N).  
2. X'Talin sends you to kill Tomb Rats until you can loot an arcane undead sigil. Bring it back to X'Talin.  
3. X'Talin explains that the rats that attacked the tower came from the north. You are now to kill Arzen (CONs wht@lvl10). To find Arzen, look directly north of the Dragoon's tower, there is a hill with rocks on top. Go to the top of this hill, get the popup, kill Arzen, loot papers, return to X'Talin.  
4. X'Talin will now send you, with the page you looted from Arzen, to Dominary K'Jartan.  
5. K'Jartan will now send you to kill Guryon and Xeruin, in a tent to the west along the River Saren. From Neriak, go west until you hit the river, follow it north until it turns west. You will see, on your left, an encampment of tents. Wait until mobs spawn. Outside the tent will be a dog named Grim (CONs Wht). Kill Grim and Guryon (CONs Yel) first, then kill Xeruin, loot the ring, and return to K'Jartan.  
Receive **556,753 XP** and the **Burnished Staff**.

---

# Level 13: Assassination

**Starting NPC:** Dominary K'Jartan  
1. Talk to K'Jartan, he sends you to Durinex U'Dedne in the House of U'Dedne.  
2. Durinex U'Dedne sends you to Forgun E'Phet, owner of the Double Dagger Inn (found on main floor in a room to the north).  
3. Forgun E'Phet sends you to kill a Tavern Rat Breeder (CONs LB). Farm Tavern Rats until a breeder spawns. Kill, loot tail, return to Forgun E'Phet. Receive Forgun's note, return to U'Dedne.  
4. Durinex U'Dedne sends you to buy (250 tunar) a "Sea of Chains" from Merchant Gilgash at the Smiling Serpent Inn while in Freeport.  
5. Return to U'Dedne with the Sea of Chains. He then sends you to find Efran (CONs Wht@lvl13) at the Pilgrim's Inn. Slay Efram and return to K'Jartan.  
Receive **550,698 XP** and the **Lumbering Arms Scroll**.

---

# Level 15: The Mindbend Robe

**Starting NPC:** Enchanter T'Crit  
1. T'Crit sends you to speak to Zelthil J'Narus (north of the blacksmith), who wishes to acquire the hatestone dust. Travel west, cross the River Saren, locate the Ghostly Mage on the Dueler's Crest, speak with it.  
2. Ghostly Mage sends you to Croc Island by Freeport to find his Hatestone Dust. From Freeport, head south down the coast to the whale bones. Swim out to the island and find Croc.  
3. Travel to Grobb to hire trolls. Speak with Underlord Burgrish to hire them. Return to whale bones, wait for Grebarg, follow trolls to Croc Island. Kill Croc, loot hatestone dust, return to Zethil J'Narus.  
4. Return to T'Crit for your reward.  
Receive **883,791 XP**, the **Mindbend Robe**, and **Arcane Beckon**.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Dominary K'Jartan  
1. Talk to Dominary K'Jartan in Neriak, who sends you to Denouncer T'Crit in Fort Seriak, Collonridge Cemetery. T'Crit is at the top of the main tower.  
2. Denouncer T'Crit sends you to kill Ghoul Captains (CONs DB) at the dock. Loot quest items. Return to T'Crit.  
3. Denouncer T'Crit sends you to Elder Grott in Collonridge Cemetery. Kill skeletons until Elder Grott spawns. Talk to him.  
4. Elder Grott sends you to kill an Elder (CONs Yel) in Hodstock, guarded by a guard. Kill, loot book, return to Elder Grott.  
5. Elder Grott sends you to kill Captain Thender (CONs DB@lvl20) near Castle Felstar docks. Kill, loot ring, return to T'Crit.  
Receive **2,814,929 XP**.  
Path choice: **Spacious Mind** (increases mana capacity) or **Power Boon** (channel mana into others).
Neriak, Nektulos.Magician:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Elementalist R'Virr wants you to pick up a Red Sash. You can get one for free from Merchant Kalosk.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Elementalist R'Virr sends you to Spiritmaster Rendor, who binds you and sends you off to Coachman Lothi.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Magician Ka'Zuth  
Magician Ka'Zuth wants you to learn how to fight. Go out of the city and kill bats and return to him with two pieces of bat meat.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Magician Ka'Zuth  
Magician Ka'Zuth will make you a new robe. He needs you to get the following items for him:  
- A Cloth Yard - Purchase from Merchant Kertal  
- Common Thread - Purchase from Merchant Kertal  
- Chipped Raven Beak - Drop from Ravens

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Magician Ka'Zuth  
Ka'Zuth next asks you to go slay fire bats and bring back a torn fire bat wing. These spawn in the mountains north of the city.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Talk with R'Virr, he wants you to talk to the waysender, to be teleported to Grobb to talk about an order of frog legs that hasn't come yet. Talk to the waysender and teleport to Grobb. Speak with Chef Grinart. He wants you to bring him two crab legs from the crabs on the beach NW of Grobb. Return to him with the legs. Return to guildmaster.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
First talk to your Elementalist Guildmaster. He informs you that there is a Dark Elf practicing unknown magic, so he wants you to disguise yourself as his apprentice. Go to this Dark Elf, west from Neriak entrance, in his hut by the river.  
He wants you to do some tasks for his magic creation. First, retrieve a claw from a dark clawed crab SE of Neriak by the shore. Second, retrieve a carapace from a fungus roach just across the river from his hut. Bring a friend for the fungus roach because it is an even con at Level 10.  
When you hand in the items, bring a friend because he will summon a yellow con creature. Kill it, loot the carapace, and return to Guildmaster.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Talk to Elementalist R'Virr, he sends you to Lady Furess U'Dedne.  
She wants you to pick up a bracelet she forgot to purchase in Freeport at Merchant Gilgash (costs 226 Tunar). Then go upstairs and talk to Natzik P'Thek about some packages. Natzik says he sent the packages by courier.  
Return to Neriak and give bracelet to Lady Furess. She will tell you to talk to Dragoon V'Ghen at the top of a guard outpost north of Neriak, just past the Firebats.  
Dragoon V'Ghen will tell you to talk to his brother Valraen V'Ghen in the tent below. Talk to Valraen, he cons yellow to level 13. Kill him, loot the packages, and take them to Lady Furess.  
She cannot open it, so go to Freeport, talk to Natzik again. He unlocks the box and gives you the item inside. Take the item back to Lady Furess, then report back to Necromancer D'Unarr.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
Talk to R'Virr, he tells you to speak with Zelthil J'Narus. Buy a Lantern of Ages from Merchant Gilgash in Freeport and bring it back.  
Then collect two more items to complete the gift:  
- Gem of Wit from a Lost Thought in Collonridge Cemetery (Level 15)  
- Oriote Raven Claw at the standing stones (Level 15)  
Take both items back to Zelthil, he enchants the lamp and gives it to you. Give the lamp to Lady Furess U'Dedne, then return to Zelthil.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Elementalist R'Virr  
1. Talk to Elementalist R'Virr. He says Zelthil J'Narus needs your services again.  
2. Zelthil sends you to Quartermaster T'Nak in Fort Seriak.  
3. T'Nak wants 1,000 tunar. He sends you to kill Courier B' Malin (CONs LB) traveling along the River Saren. Exit Neriak heading NW toward the River Saren, cross the river to the SW side and run along it heading NW. Kill Courier B' Malin, loot, return to Zelthil.  
4. Zelthil sends you to kill two mobs, Groundskeepers at Collonridge Cemetery and Castle Felstar (CONs Yel).  
4.1 From Neriak, go west to Lake Nerius, kill Groundskeeper F' Redai at Castle Felstar, loot a femur bone.  
4.2 From Neriak, go southeast to Collonridge Cemetery. Kill Groundskeeper W' Lai in the Tomb of Elders, loot finger bone.  
5. Return bones to Zelthil, he sends you to Elementalist R'Virr.  
6. Talk to Elementalist R'Virr for your reward.
Neriak, Nektulos.Necromancer:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Grand Defiler J`Narus  
Grand Defiler J`Narus asks you to buy a pledging stone. Merchant Perex will give you one for free.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Grand Defiler J`Narus  
1. Grand Defiler J`Narus sends you to Spiritmaster Irios.  
2. Spiritmaster Irios sends you to Coachman Lothi.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Necromancer D`Unarr  
Necromancer D`Unarr wants you to bring him two broken raven feathers. These drop from Magpies and Crows.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Necromancer D`Unarr  
Necromancer D`Unarr offers to make you a new robe. He needs you to bring him the following items:  
- Cloth Yard - Merchant Kertal  
- Common Thread - Merchant Kertal  
- Flattened Tarantula Eye - Various Spiders

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Necromancer D`Unarr  
Necromancer D`Unarr sends you to kill a Fire Bat, which are in the mountains north of Neriak. Kill, loot Torn bat wing, return to Necromancer D`Unarr.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Grand Defiler J' Narus  
1. Talk to Grand Defiler J' Narus, who sends you to a Waysender Thi'thox.  
2. Waysender Thi'thox ports you to Grobb.  
3. Find Chef Blignart, he sends you to kill Weak Crabs (CONs BLU); other crabs will also drop legs but are harder to kill. Keep killing until you get two crab legs. Return to Chef Blignart.  
4. Chef Blignart sends you to the Waysender, who sends you back to Sythonis near the tunnel that leads out of Grobb. Return to Grand Defiler J' Narus.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Grand Defiler J' Narus  
1. Talk to Grand Defiler J' Narus, he sends you to Jerek N' Toxis in a hut near the river west of Neriak.  
2. Jerek N' Toxis sends you to kill a Spikeshell Crab (CONs WHT to YEL), southeast of the city, between a red spire and the shore. You need the shell, not a claw. Kill, loot, return to Jerek N' Toxis.  
3. Jerek N' Toxis sends you to kill a Fungus Cockroach (CONs WHT), just across the river from his hut. Kill, loot antenna, return to Jerek N' Toxis.  
4. He then creates a big bug (CONs yellow), kill it, loot mutated shell, return to Grand Defiler J' Narus.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Necromancer D'Unarr  
1. Talk to D'Unarr. He sends you to Lady Furess U'Dedne.  
2. Lady Furess wants you to pick up a bracelet she forgot to purchase in Freeport at Merchant Gilgash. Use Waysender Ti' Thox to get to Freeport. Ancient Bracelet costs 226 Tunar. Then go upstairs and talk to Natzik P'Thek about packages she left with him. Natzik says he sent the packages by courier.  
3. Return to Lady Furess. Use Waysender Abodai at Freeport docks to return to Neriak. Lady Furess sends you to talk to Dragoon V'Ghen at the top of a guard outpost north of Neriak, past the Firebats.  
4. Dragoon V'Ghen sends you to talk to his brother Valraen V'Ghen (CONs WHT to YEL) in the tent below.  
5. Talk to Valraen, he will attack you. Kill him, loot the packages, return to Lady Furess.  
6. Lady Furess sends you to Freeport to talk to Natzik again. He unlocks the box, give you the item inside. Return to Lady Furess, then back to D'Unarr.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Grand Defiler J'Narur  
1. Talk to Grand Defiler J'Narur, he sends you to Zelthil J'Narus in the House of J'Narus, across from the blacksmith section, upstairs.  
2. Zelthil J'Narus sends you to Merchant Gilgash in Freeport to buy a Lantern of Ages (cost ~100-400?).  
3. Zelthil J'Narus sends you to kill Lost Thought (CONs WHT) in Collonridge Cemetery until a Gem of Obfuscation drops. Kill, loot, return to Zelthil J'Narus.  
4. Zelthil J'Narus sends you to kill Oriote Ravens (CONs WHT) for a beak. They are south of Neriak entrance on a hill. Warning: large aggro range.  
5. Return all items to Zelthil J'Narus, who sends you to Lady Furess U'Dedne. Then return to J'Narus.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Grand Defiler J'Narus  
1. Talk to Grand Defiler J'Narus, he says Zelthil J'Narus needs your services again.  
2. Zelthil sends you to Quartermaster T'Nak in Fort Seriak.  
3. T'Nak wants 1,000 tunar. He sends you to kill Courier B' Malin (CONs LB) along the River Saren. Exit Neriak heading NW, cross river SW side, run NW along it. Kill, loot, return to Zelthil.  
4. Zelthil sends you to kill two mobs, Groundskeepers at Collonridge Cemetery and Castle Felstar (CONs YEL).  
4.1 From Neriak, go west to Lake Nerius, kill Groundskeeper F' Redai at Castle Felstar, loot femur bone.  
4.2 From Neriak, go southeast to Collonridge Cemetery, kill Groundskeeper W' Lai in Tomb of Elders, loot finger bone.  
5. Return bones to Zelthil, he sends you to Grand Defiler J'Narus.  
6. Talk to Grand Defiler J'Narus to choose between two paths: Blood or Power.
Neriak, Nektulos.Rogue:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Kriyn  
Speak to Kriyn, get yourself a thug scarf from Haltek V'Ghen (he is upstairs), then return to Kriyn.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Kriyn  
Kriyn next asks you to see Spiritmaster Xoln, who binds you and sends you to talk with Coachman Lothi.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Agent Cythani  
Cythani wants you to learn how to fight. Head out of town and kill ravens, crows, or magpies. Bring her two broken raven feathers.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Agent Cythani  
Cythani offers to make you a new weapon. She needs you to gather the following ingredients:  
- Iron Ore - Purchase from Merchant Rokar  
- A Leather Strap - Purchase from Merchant Rokar  
- A Flattened Tarantula Eye - Drops from various spiders (some walkthroughs say you need ruined spider fur)

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Cythani  
Cythani sends you off to kill fire bats and return to her with a torn fire bat wing. They are found in the hills north of the city.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Guildmaster Kriyn  
1. Find and speak to Waysender Ti'Thox. Give note to him and he will teleport you to Freeport, outside the Blind Fish Tavern.  
2. At the docks, find Maeyni on the South Tower of the Spiteful Shield. Go through the east wall entrance, then southeast inside the keep to target a loose rock. Talk to it to lower and raise the ladder to Maeyni.  
3. Maeyni sends you to find Biljoe in the coastal village of Temby to get his taxes. Bind in the city before leaving. Travel north along the coastline, beware of RED-REDs. Return to Freeport and give the taxes to Necorik (in the building where Maeyni was, downstairs).

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Necorik the Ghost  
Talk to Necorik at the Spiteful Shield in Freeport. He instructs you to kill a man near the river past the orcs' messed-up house until you reach the tower by the broken bridge. The target appears at night. Take the items back to Necorik for a new dagger.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Necorik the Ghost  
Start at Necorik in Freeport. Travel through the north exit, continue NW to a river, follow the trail to Sareks Tower. Talk to Duminven.  
Duminven sends you to Bastable to find Eliene and her friend, slay both, and return the items to him.  
Eliene spawns randomly outside; her friend is a grave robber under a bridge. Loot both and return items to Duminven, who gives a note to take back to the NPC who started the quest.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Necorik the Ghost  
Start at Necorik, run south until you see the madmen, then into the ocean to Tailor Weylian. She guides you step by step to collect items from:  
- Sidewinder Snakes  
- Sand Skipper Crabs  
- Gargantula (far west of Ro)  
After the Gargantula item, she sends you to a Freeport merchant for Pristine Vulture Feathers.  
Handing in the feathers, Tailor Weylian makes you leggings. Give them to your guildmaster to receive final leggings.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Necorik the Ghost  
Necorik discovered the mark you found is fake. Find the real mark and return it to Corious. Speak to Wilkenson at the docks about the real mark. Do not return to Necorik until delivered to William Nothard.  
**The Troll:** Speak to Madame Telina east of Agent Wilkenson. She cons as Telina the Dark Witch. The real mark is with a Troll named Roj Eir Sew' Eil. From the docks, travel SW to the second nasehir camp SW of Freeport. Kill the Troll and loot the Mark of Louoth. Return it to Telina.  
**The Pirates:** Telina sends you south along the coast to Muniel's Tea Garden. Use the coach if available. Travel south to an island off the coast (NE of the coach) with skeleton pirates (CONs LB-YEL@20). Kill skeletons, loot sand-covered chests until you retrieve the Chiseled Great Axe of Doom. Return to Telina.  
**Waterlogged Treasure Chest:** Travel to a deep valley as per Telina’s vision. From Freeport coach, head south through the desert to a gypsy village. From the center, look NW to Razor Back Fang. Climb the fang mountains, locate a small obelisk in a pool of water, and find the waterlogged chest (avoid 2 red guardians). Retrieve the Etched Helmet of Greatness and bring it to Telina.  
Speak to Necorik the Ghost.  
Receive 2,814,929 XP and choose between:  
- **Avoidance:** makes your opponent forget they want to kill you; plus Dune Dagger  
- **Minor Wound:** a specialized attack, and Rapier of the Burning Sands.
Neriak, Nektulos.Shadowknight:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Zethril Do'Vexis  
Zethril Do'Vexis wants you to purchase a pair of Bone Bracers. You can get them for free from Merchant Perex.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Zethril Do'Vexis  
Zethril Do'Vexis sends you to see Spiritmaster Irios, who binds you and sends you off to talk to Coachman Lothi.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Sythonis U'Dedne  
Sythonis U'Dedne wants you to learn how to fight. Head out of town and kill snakes and collect two snake scales.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Sythonis U'Dedne  
Sythonis U'Dedne wants to make you a new weapon. He needs you to bring him the following items:  
- A Bar of Iron Ore - Purchase from Merchant Rokar  
- A Wooden Shaft - Purchase from Merchant Rokar  
- Chipped Raven Beak - Drop from ravens and magpies

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Sythonis U'Dedne  
Sythonis U'Dedne sends you to kill Fire Bats and return to him with a torn Fire Bat wing. They spawn in the mountains north of the city.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Sythonis U'Dedne  
1. Talk to Sythonis, who sends you to a Waysender Thi'thox.  
2. Waysender Thi'thox ports you to Grobb.  
3. Find Chef Blignart, he sends you to kill Weak Crabs (CONs BLU). Other crabs may drop legs too, but they are harder to kill. Keep killing until you get two crab legs. Return to Chef Blignart.  
4. Chef Blignart sends you to the Waysender, who sends you back to Sythonis. The Waysender is near the tunnel that leads out of Grobb.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Zethril Do'Vexis  
1. Talk to Zethril Do'Vexis, he sends you to Jerek N'Toxis, in a hut near the river west of Neriak.  
2. Jerek N'Toxis sends you to kill a Spikeshell Crab (CONs WHT to YEL), located just on the other side of Neriak, southeast of the city. You need the CLAW, not the shell. Kill, loot, and return to Jerek N'Toxis.  
3. Jerek N'Toxis sends you to kill a Fungus Cockroach (CONs WHT), located just across the river from Jerek's hut. Kill, loot leg, return to Jerek N'Toxis.  
4. Now, he creates a big bug (CONs yellow). Kill it, loot mutated shell, return to Zethril Do'Vexis.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Sythonis U'Dedne  
1. Talk to Sythonis U'Dedne, he sends you to Lady U'Dedne in the House of U'Dedne.  
2. Lady Furess wants you to pick up a bracelet she forgot to purchase in Freeport at Merchant Gilgash (Ancient Bracelet costs 226 Tunar). Then go upstairs and talk to Natzik P'Thek about packages she left with him. He says he sent them by courier.  
3. Return to Lady Furess. Use Waysender Abodai at the docks of Freeport to return to Neriak. Lady Furess sends you to talk to Dragoon V'Ghen at the top of a guard outpost north of Neriak, just past the Firebats.  
4. Dragoon V'Ghen sends you to his brother Valraen V'Ghen (CONs WHT to YEL) in the tent below.  
5. Talk to Valraen, he attacks you. Kill him, loot the packages, and return to Lady Furess.  
6. Lady Furess sends you to Freeport to talk to Natzik again. He unlocks the box and gives you the item inside. Return to Lady Furess, then to Sythonis U'Dedne.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Seloxia  
1. Talk to Seloxia, who is in the room next to Zethril Do'Vexis. She sends you to Zelthil J'Narus in the House of J'Narus, across from the blacksmith section, upstairs.  
2. Zelthil J'Narus sends you to Merchant Gilgash in Freeport to buy a Lantern of Ages (costs ~100–400 Tunar).  
3. Zelthil J'Narus sends you to kill Lost Thought (CONs WHT) in Collinridge Cemetery until a Gem of Deception drops. Kill, loot, return.  
4. Zelthil J'Narus sends you to kill Oriote Ravens (CONs WHT) for one of their eyes, south of Neriak entrance on a hill. Beware of large agro range.  
5. Return all items to Zelthil J'Narus; he sends you to Lady Furess U'Dedne in the House of U'Dedne. Return to J'Narus.  
6. Zelthil J'Narus sends you back to Zethril Do'Vexis for your reward.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Veloxia V'Thoth  
1. Talk to Veloxia V'Thoth. He says Zelthil J'Narus needs your services again.  
2. Zelthil sends you to Quartermaster T'Nak in Ft. Seriak.  
3. T'Nak wants 1,000 Tunar. He sends you to kill Courier B'Malin (CONs LB) traveling along the River Saren. Exit Neriak heading NW towards the river, cross to the SW side, run along it NW. Mostly in Collonridge Cemetery (NE). Kill, loot, return to Zelthil.  
4. Zelthil sends you to kill two mobs: Groundskeepers at Collonridge Cemetery and Castle Felstar, both CONs YEL.  
4.1 From Neriak, due west in the middle of Lake Nerius is Castle Felstar and Groundskeeper F' Redai. Kill, loot femur bone.  
4.2 From Neriak, head southeast to Collonridge Cemetery. Groundskeeper W' Lai is in the Tomb of Elders, left side of the courtyard. Kill, loot finger bone.  
5. Return bones to Zelthil; he sends you to Veloxia V'Thoth.  
6. Talk to Veloxia V'Thoth. He will ask you to choose **Bloodwasp** or **Shadow Tower**.

# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Scornmaster U''Dedne  
Buy worn boots from Merchant Ohaal. Return to Scornmaster U'Dedne.

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Scornmaster U''Dedne  
Speak to Spiritmaster Malta. Speak to Coachman Lothi. Return to Scornmaster U'Dedne.

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Scornblade Vo`Dleth  
Kill spiderlings. Bring back 2 tarantula leg tips.

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Scornblade Vo''Dleth  
Buy wooden shaft and bar of iron ore from Merchant Rokar. Also get 1 firefly leg segment.

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Scornblade Vo''Dleth  
Kill fire bat. Bring back torn firebat wings.

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Scornmaster U'Dedne  
1. Find Waysender Ti'Thox to take you to Freeport. Be sure to stop and sign at the coach if you haven't already.  
2. Then find Dockmaster Endol at the end of the pier. Travel to Hazniak.  
3. Find Scornblade J'Narus and give him the orders. Take his response back to Scornmaster U'Dedne, using Dockmaster D'Eleth from Hazniak to Freeport, and either coaching or use Waysender Abodai who is available for this quest. (Or return home if you're still bound in Neriak)

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Scornmaster U'Dedne  
1. Talk to Scornmaster U'Dedne, he sends you to Dragoon X'Talin. Go west to the river and follow it north; his tower will be on the right side.  
2. X'Talin sends you to kill a Tomb Rat and get an undead sigil. Follow the river south; bring the sigil back to X'Talin.  
3. X'Talin sends you to kill Arzen. Go north of the Dragoon's tower to a hill with rocks. Kill, loot papers, return to X'Talin.  
4. X'Talin sends you back to your guild master.  
5. K'Jarten sends you to kill Xeruin (CONs YEL). From Neriak, go west to the river, follow north until west. Find tent encampment; kill Grim (CONs WHT) and Garyuon (CONs YEL) first, then Xeruin, loot ring, return to Scornmaster U'Dedne.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Scornmaster U'Dedne  
1. Talk to Scornmaster U'Dedne, he sends you to Durinex U'Dedne.  
2. Durinex U'Dedne sends you to Forgun E'Phet in the Double Dagger.  
3. Forgun E'Phet sends you to kill a Tavern Rat Breeder (CONs WHT to YEL?). Kill, loot tail.  
4. Durinex U'Dedne sends you to kill Efram at Pilgrim's Inn, and buy a Sea of Chains from Merchant Gilgash at the Smiling Serpent Inn while in Freeport.  
***NOTE*** To find Pilgrim's Inn, go around the outside of Freeport until you see a road heading north. Follow the road until you reach the inn.  
5. Bring all items back to Durinex.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Scornblade Vo'Dleth  
1. Talk to Scornmaster U'Dedne, he sends you to Zethil N'Jarus north of the blacksmith.  
2. Zethil sends you to the Ghostly Mage in Collonridge Cemetery. The Ghostly Mage is Surxal's spirit, bound to J'Narus. From Neriak, head west to Jarek N'Toxis, then north.  
3. Ghostly Mage sends you to Croc Island by Freeport to find Hatestone Dust. From Freeport, head south down the coast to the whale bones, swim to the island, wait for message, Croc is on the island. Then travel to Grobb to hire trolls.  
4. Talk to Underlord Bugrish, pay to hire trolls, return to whale bones until Grebarg shows up.  
5. Talk to Grebarg; the trolls will head to Croc Island. ***NOTE*** Trolls will only kill crocodiles, not Croc himself.  
6. Kill Croc, loot Hatestone Dust, return to Zethil.  
7. Zethil gives factioning. Return to Scornblade Vo'Dleth.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Scornblade  
1. Talk to Scornblade in Neriak; he sends you to Denouncer T'Crit in Fort Seriak (Collonridge Cemetery zone), top of main tower.  
2. T'Crit sends you to kill Ghoul Captains (CONs DB) where dock meets land. Kill, loot quest items, return to T'Crit.  
3. T'Crit sends you to Elder Willam (?) in Collonridge Cemetery at the top of first tower area. Kill Skeletons (CONs DB) at spawn points until Elder Willam spawns. Talk to him.  
4. Elder Willam sends you to kill an Elder (CONs YEL) in Hodstock, in a house guarded by a guard. West of River Saren, passing Bobble-by-Water zone. Wait until guard walks away. Kill, loot book, return to Elder Willam.  
5. Elder Willam sends you to kill a named Captain at the docks. Spawn replaces a ghoul captain. Kill, loot, return to T'Crit for your reward.
